```{r}
                  "FEV1FVC_pred_decline_z"="FEV1/FVC % predicted (decline)",
                  "MMEF_pred_decline_z"="MMEF % predicted (decline)")

preprocess_dataset <- function(df){
  df <- df %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      Age = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(Age))),
      FEV1_pred = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(FEV1_pred))),
      FVC_pred  = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(FVC_pred))),
      FEV1FVC_pred = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(FEV1FVC_pred))),
      MMEF_pred = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(MMEF_pred))),
      Observed  = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(Observed))),
      Shannon   = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(Shannon))),
      Simpson   = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(Simpson))),
      Gender = factor(as.character(Gender), levels=c("Male","Female")),
      Smoking_status = factor(tolower(as.character(Smoking_status)),
                              levels=c("never","former","current"), ordered=TRUE),
      season_microbiome_sampling = factor(as.character(season_microbiome_sampling),
                              levels=c("Winter","Spring","Summer","Autumn"), ordered=TRUE)
    )

  if (!"RespDx" %in% names(df)) stop("RespDx not found in data; please add it first.")
  df$RespDx <- factor(tolower(as.character(df$RespDx)), levels = c("no","yes"))

  df <- df %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      Observed_z = as.numeric(scale(Observed)),
      Shannon_z  = as.numeric(scale(Shannon)),
      Simpson_z  = as.numeric(scale(Simpson))
    )

  # z-scored "decline" lung vars (higher = worse)
  for (lf in lung_fun_cont) if (lf %in% names(df))
    df[[paste0(lf, "_decline_z")]] <- as.numeric(scale(-1 * df[[lf]]))

  df
}

fit_pooled_mv <- function(df, dataset_name){
  df <- preprocess_dataset(df)
  alpha_z <- c("Observed_z","Shannon_z","Simpson_z")
  lung_z  <- paste0(lung_fun_cont, "_decline_z")

  out <- list()
  for (a in alpha_z){
    for (lz in lung_z){
      need <- c(a, lz, core_covariates)
      if (!all(need %in% names(df))) next
      dat <- df %>% dplyr::select(dplyr::all_of(need)) %>% tidyr::drop_na()
      if (nrow(dat) < 20) next

      fml <- as.formula(paste(a, "~", paste(c(lz, core_covariates), collapse = " + ")))
      fit <- tryCatch(stats::lm(fml, data = dat), error=function(e) NULL)
      if (is.null(fit)) next
      row <- broom::tidy(fit) %>% dplyr::filter(term == lz)
      if (!nrow(row)) next

      out[[length(out)+1]] <- tibble::tibble(
        dataset = dataset_name,
        niche = dplyr::recode(dataset_name, VGO3_NP="NP", VGO3_OP="OP"),
        alpha_metric = a,
        lung_var = lz,
        estimate = row$estimate, std.error = row$std.error, p.value = row$p.value,
        n_used = stats::nobs(fit)
      )
    }
  }
  dplyr::bind_rows(out)
}

mv_all <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  fit_pooled_mv(dataset_list$VGO3_NP, "VGO3_NP"),
  fit_pooled_mv(dataset_list$VGO3_OP, "VGO3_OP")
) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    alpha_metric = dplyr::recode(alpha_metric, !!!pretty_alpha),
    lung_var     = dplyr::recode(lung_var, !!!pretty_lung)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(dataset) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(q.value = p.adjust(p.value, method="BH"),
                stars   = dplyr::case_when(q.value<=0.05~"***", q.value<=0.10~"**", q.value<=0.25~"*", TRUE~"")) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup()

# Plot heatmap
pal <- try(rcartocolor::carto_pal(7, "Geyser"), silent=TRUE)
if (inherits(pal, "try-error")) pal <- c("#2166ac","#67a9cf","#d1e5f0","#f7f7f7","#fddbc7","#ef8a62","#b2182b")
lim <- max(abs(mv_all$estimate), na.rm=TRUE); if (!is.finite(lim)) lim <- 1

plot_df <- mv_all %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    lung_var = factor(lung_var, levels = rev(c("FEV1 % predicted (decline)",
                                               "FVC % predicted (decline)",
                                               "FEV1/FVC % predicted (decline)",
                                               "MMEF % predicted (decline)"))),
    alpha_metric = factor(alpha_metric, levels=c("Observed richness","Shannon diversity","Simpson diversity")),
    niche = factor(dplyr::recode(dataset, VGO3_NP="NP", VGO3_OP="OP"), levels=c("NP","OP"))
  )

p_mv <- ggplot2::ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = alpha_metric, y = lung_var, fill = estimate)) +
  ggplot2::geom_tile(color="white") +
  ggplot2::geom_text(aes(label = stars), size=4) +
  ggplot2::scale_fill_gradient2(low=pal[1], mid=pal[4], high=pal[7], midpoint=0, limits=c(-lim,lim),
                                name="Std. β (per 1 SD worse)") +
  ggplot2::facet_wrap(~ niche, nrow=1) +
  ggplot2::theme_minimal(base_size=12) +
  ggplot2::theme(panel.grid=element_blank(), axis.text.x=element_text(angle=30,hjust=1),
                 strip.text=element_text(face="bold")) +
  ggplot2::labs(x="Alpha diversity metric", y="Lung function metric (decline)",
                title="Multivariable models (pooled; adjusted for Age, Gender, Smoking, Season, RespDx)")

dir.create("../Output/Cross_sectional/Alpha_diversity/Multivariable/Non_stratified", recursive=TRUE, showWarnings=FALSE)
ggplot2::ggsave("../Output/Cross_sectional/Alpha_diversity/Multivariable/Non_stratified/Multivariable_alpha_heatmap.svg",
                p_mv, width=7.0, height=4)
readr::write_csv(mv_all,
  "../Output/Cross_sectional/Alpha_diversity/Multivariable/Non_stratified/Multivariable_alpha_results.csv")

```

### Multivariable (no RespDx covariate) 
```{r}
dataset_list <- list(VGO3_NP = meta_vgo3_np, VGO3_OP = meta_vgo3_op)
alpha_vars   <- c("Observed","Shannon","Simpson")
lung_fun_cont <- c("FEV1_pred","FVC_pred","FEV1FVC_pred","MMEF_pred")
core_covariates <- c("Age","Gender","Smoking_status","season_microbiome_sampling")

pretty_alpha <- c("Observed_z"="Observed richness","Shannon_z"="Shannon diversity","Simpson_z"="Simpson diversity")
pretty_lung  <- c("FEV1_pred_decline_z"="FEV1 % predicted (decline)",
                  "FVC_pred_decline_z"="FVC % predicted (decline)",
                  "FEV1FVC_pred_decline_z"="FEV1/FVC % predicted (decline)",
                  "MMEF_pred_decline_z"="MMEF % predicted (decline)")

preprocess_dataset <- function(df){
  df <- df %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      Age = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(Age))),
      FEV1_pred = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(FEV1_pred))),
      FVC_pred  = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(FVC_pred))),
      FEV1FVC_pred = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(FEV1FVC_pred))),
      MMEF_pred = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(MMEF_pred))),
      Observed  = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(Observed))),
      Shannon   = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(Shannon))),
      Simpson   = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(Simpson))),
      Gender = factor(as.character(Gender), levels=c("Male","Female")),
      Smoking_status = factor(tolower(as.character(Smoking_status)),
                              levels=c("never","former","current"), ordered=TRUE),
      season_microbiome_sampling = factor(as.character(season_microbiome_sampling),
                              levels=c("Winter","Spring","Summer","Autumn"), ordered=TRUE)
    )

  df <- df %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      Observed_z = as.numeric(scale(Observed)),
      Shannon_z  = as.numeric(scale(Shannon)),
      Simpson_z  = as.numeric(scale(Simpson))
    )

  # z-scored "decline" lung vars (higher = worse)
  for (lf in lung_fun_cont) if (lf %in% names(df))
    df[[paste0(lf, "_decline_z")]] <- as.numeric(scale(-1 * df[[lf]]))

  df
}

fit_pooled_mv <- function(df, dataset_name){
  df <- preprocess_dataset(df)
  alpha_z <- c("Observed_z","Shannon_z","Simpson_z")
  lung_z  <- paste0(lung_fun_cont, "_decline_z")

  out <- list()
  for (a in alpha_z){
    for (lz in lung_z){
      need <- c(a, lz, core_covariates)
      if (!all(need %in% names(df))) next
      dat <- df %>% dplyr::select(dplyr::all_of(need)) %>% tidyr::drop_na()
      if (nrow(dat) < 20) next

      fml <- as.formula(paste(a, "~", paste(c(lz, core_covariates), collapse = " + ")))
      fit <- tryCatch(stats::lm(fml, data = dat), error=function(e) NULL)
      if (is.null(fit)) next
      row <- broom::tidy(fit) %>% dplyr::filter(term == lz)
      if (!nrow(row)) next

      out[[length(out)+1]] <- tibble::tibble(
        dataset = dataset_name,
        niche = dplyr::recode(dataset_name, VGO3_NP="NP", VGO3_OP="OP"),
        alpha_metric = a,
        lung_var = lz,
        estimate = row$estimate, std.error = row$std.error, p.value = row$p.value,
        n_used = stats::nobs(fit)
      )
    }
  }
  dplyr::bind_rows(out)
}

mv_all <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  fit_pooled_mv(dataset_list$VGO3_NP, "VGO3_NP"),
  fit_pooled_mv(dataset_list$VGO3_OP, "VGO3_OP")
) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    alpha_metric = dplyr::recode(alpha_metric, !!!pretty_alpha),
    lung_var     = dplyr::recode(lung_var, !!!pretty_lung)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(dataset) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(q.value = p.adjust(p.value, method="BH"),
                stars   = dplyr::case_when(q.value<=0.05~"***", q.value<=0.10~"**", q.value<=0.25~"*", TRUE~"")) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup()

# Plot heatmap
pal <- try(rcartocolor::carto_pal(7, "Geyser"), silent=TRUE)
if (inherits(pal, "try-error")) pal <- c("#2166ac","#67a9cf","#d1e5f0","#f7f7f7","#fddbc7","#ef8a62","#b2182b")
lim <- max(abs(mv_all$estimate), na.rm=TRUE); if (!is.finite(lim)) lim <- 1

plot_df <- mv_all %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    lung_var = factor(lung_var, levels = rev(c("FEV1 % predicted (decline)",
                                               "FVC % predicted (decline)",
                                               "FEV1/FVC % predicted (decline)",
                                               "MMEF % predicted (decline)"))),
    alpha_metric = factor(alpha_metric, levels=c("Observed richness","Shannon diversity","Simpson diversity")),
    niche = factor(dplyr::recode(dataset, VGO3_NP="NP", VGO3_OP="OP"), levels=c("NP","OP"))
  )

p_mv <- ggplot2::ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = alpha_metric, y = lung_var, fill = estimate)) +
  ggplot2::geom_tile(color="white") +
  ggplot2::geom_text(aes(label = stars), size=4) +
  ggplot2::scale_fill_gradient2(low=pal[1], mid=pal[4], high=pal[7], midpoint=0, limits=c(-lim,lim),
                                name="Std. β (per 1 SD worse)") +
  ggplot2::facet_wrap(~ niche, nrow=1) +
  ggplot2::theme_minimal(base_size=12) +
  ggplot2::theme(panel.grid=element_blank(), axis.text.x=element_text(angle=30,hjust=1),
                 strip.text=element_text(face="bold")) +
  ggplot2::labs(x="Alpha diversity metric", y="Lung function metric (decline)",
                title="Multivariable models (pooled; adjusted for Age, Gender, Smoking, Season)")

dir.create("../Output/Cross_sectional/Alpha_diversity/Multivariable/Non_stratified", recursive=TRUE, showWarnings=FALSE)
ggplot2::ggsave("../Output/Cross_sectional/Alpha_diversity/Multivariable/Non_stratified/Multivariable_alpha_heatmap.svg",
                p_mv, width=7.0, height=4)
readr::write_csv(mv_all,
  "../Output/Cross_sectional/Alpha_diversity/Multivariable/Non_stratified/Multivariable_alpha_results.csv")

```


## Stratified
### Univariable
```{r}
dataset_list <- list(VGO3_NP = meta_vgo3_np, VGO3_OP = meta_vgo3_op)
alpha_vars <- c("Observed","Shannon","Simpson")

test_vars <- c(
  "Age","Gender","BMI","season_microbiome_sampling","Education_level",
  "Smoking_status","Asthma_current","Asthma_ever","COPD_emphy_doc_diag",
  "Covid_lastmonth","Atopic","Cortinhal_lastyr","Pneumonia_lastyr",
  "Antibiotics_lastmonth","Antibiotics_lastyr","Farm_childhood",
  "T1_wkprior_NH3","FEV1_pred","FVC_pred","FEV1FVC_pred","MMEF_pred"
)

lung_fun_cont <- c("FEV1_pred","FVC_pred","FEV1FVC_pred","MMEF_pred")
phenotype_components <- c("Asthma_current","COPD_emphy_doc_diag")

pretty_labels <- c(
  "Age"="Age","Gender"="Gender (Female vs Male)","BMI"="Body Mass Index",
  "season_microbiome_sampling"="Season of sampling","Education_level"="Education level",
  "Smoking_status"="Smoking status","Asthma_current"="Current asthma","Asthma_ever"="Asthma ever",
  "COPD_emphy_doc_diag"="COPD/emphysema (doctor diagnosed)","Covid_lastmonth"="COVID-19 in last month",
  "Atopic"="Atopic","Cortinhal_lastyr"="Corticosteroid inhaler (last year)",
  "Pneumonia_lastyr"="Pneumonia in last year","Antibiotics_lastmonth"="Antibiotics last month",
  "Antibiotics_lastyr"="Antibiotics last year","Farm_childhood"="Grew up on a farm",
  "T1_wkprior_NH3"="NH3 week prior to sampling",
  "FEV1_pred"="FEV1 % predicted (decline)","FVC_pred"="FVC % predicted (decline)",
  "FEV1FVC_pred"="FEV1/FVC % predicted (decline)","MMEF_pred"="MMEF % predicted (decline)",
  "Observed"="Observed richness","Shannon"="Shannon diversity","Simpson"="Simpson diversity"
)

desired_order <- c(
  "Age","Gender (Female vs Male)","Body Mass Index","Season of sampling","Education level",
  "Smoking status","Current asthma","Asthma ever","Pneumonia in last year",
  "COPD/emphysema (doctor diagnosed)","COVID-19 in last month","Atopic",
  "Corticosteroid inhaler (last year)","Antibiotics last month","Antibiotics last year",
  "Grew up on a farm","NH3 week prior to sampling",
  "FEV1 % predicted (decline)","FVC % predicted (decline)",
  "FEV1/FVC % predicted (decline)","MMEF % predicted (decline)"
)

# ---- Helpers ----
preprocess_dataset <- function(df) {
  num_vars <- intersect(c("Age","BMI","T1_wkprior_NH3","FEV1_pred","FVC_pred","FEV1FVC_pred","MMEF_pred"), names(df))
  if (length(num_vars)) df[num_vars] <- lapply(df[num_vars], function(x) suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(x))))
  if ("Gender" %in% names(df)) df$Gender <- factor(as.character(df$Gender), levels = c("Male","Female"))
  if ("Smoking_status" %in% names(df)) {
    df$Smoking_status <- factor(tolower(as.character(df$Smoking_status)),
                                levels = c("never","former","current"), ordered = TRUE)
  }
  if ("Education_level" %in% names(df)) {
    df$Education_level <- factor(tolower(as.character(df$Education_level)),
                                 levels = c("low","medium","high"), ordered = TRUE)
  }
  if ("season_microbiome_sampling" %in% names(df)) {
    df$season_microbiome_sampling <- factor(as.character(df$season_microbiome_sampling),
                                            levels = c("Winter","Spring","Summer","Autumn"), ordered = TRUE)
  }
  # Ensure RespDx is present and correctly leveled
  if (!"RespDx" %in% names(df)) stop("RespDx not found in data; please add it first.")
  df$RespDx <- factor(tolower(as.character(df$RespDx)), levels = c("no","yes"))
  df
}

std_coef_one <- function(y_scaled, x) {
  fit_and_tidy <- function(x_std) {
    dat <- tibble::tibble(y = as.numeric(y_scaled), x_std = as.numeric(x_std))
    dat <- dat[stats::complete.cases(dat), , drop = FALSE]
    if (nrow(dat) < 3) return(NULL)
    fit <- tryCatch(stats::lm(y ~ x_std, data = dat), error = function(e) NULL)
    if (is.null(fit)) return(NULL)
    slope <- broom::tidy(fit) %>% dplyr::filter(term == "x_std")
    if (!nrow(slope)) return(NULL)
    list(beta = slope$estimate, p = slope$p.value)
  }
  if (is.factor(x) && is.ordered(x))             return(fit_and_tidy(scale(as.numeric(x) - 1L)))
  if (is.factor(x) && nlevels(droplevels(x))==2) return(fit_and_tidy(scale(as.numeric(x != levels(x)[1]))))
  if (is.numeric(x))                              return(fit_and_tidy(scale(x)))
  NULL
}

# Use RespDx to create two labeled strata
stratum_levels <- c("No respiratory diagnosis","Respiratory diagnosis")
add_stratum_label <- function(respdx) ifelse(respdx == "yes", stratum_levels[2], stratum_levels[1])

run_univ_stratum <- function(df0, dataset_name, stratum_name) {
  if (nrow(df0) < 5) return(tibble::tibble())
  dfp <- preprocess_dataset(df0)

  keep_vars  <- setdiff(intersect(test_vars, names(dfp)), phenotype_components)
  keep_alpha <- intersect(alpha_vars, names(dfp))

  purrr::map_dfr(keep_alpha, function(a) {
    y_scaled <- scale(dfp[[a]])
    purrr::map_dfr(keep_vars, function(v) {
      out <- std_coef_one(y_scaled, dfp[[v]])
      if (is.null(out)) return(tibble::tibble())
      tibble::tibble(dataset = dataset_name, stratum = stratum_name,
                     alpha = a, variable = v,
                     coefficient = out$beta, p_value = out$p)
    })
  })
}

# Counts per DATASET × STRATUM
counts <- purrr::imap_dfr(dataset_list, function(dat, ds_name) {
  dat <- preprocess_dataset(dat)
  tibble::tibble(
    dataset = ds_name,
    stratum = stratum_levels,
    n_in_stratum = c(
      sum(dat$RespDx == "no",  na.rm = TRUE),
      sum(dat$RespDx == "yes", na.rm = TRUE)
    )
  )
}) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    niche = dplyr::recode(dataset, "VGO3_NP"="NP", "VGO3_OP"="OP", .default = dataset),
    niche_stratum_lab = paste0(niche, " (n=", n_in_stratum, ")"),
    stratum_lab_xlsx  = paste0(stratum, " (n=", n_in_stratum, ")")
  )

col_levels <- counts %>%
  dplyr::arrange(match(stratum, stratum_levels), match(niche, c("NP","OP"))) %>%
  dplyr::pull(niche_stratum_lab) %>% unique()

# Run: split by RespDx directly
univ_strat <- purrr::imap_dfr(dataset_list, function(dat, ds_name) {
  dat <- preprocess_dataset(dat)
  strata <- list(
    `No respiratory diagnosis` = dplyr::filter(dat, RespDx == "no"),
    `Respiratory diagnosis`    = dplyr::filter(dat, RespDx == "yes")
  )
  purrr::imap_dfr(strata, ~ run_univ_stratum(.x, ds_name, .y))
})

# Clean, flip signs, stars, join labels/counts
univ_strat <- univ_strat %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    coefficient = dplyr::if_else(variable %in% lung_fun_cont, -coefficient, coefficient),
    significance = dplyr::case_when(
      p_value < 0.001 ~ "***",
      p_value < 0.01  ~ "**",
      p_value < 0.05  ~ "*",
      TRUE ~ ""
    ),
    variable = dplyr::recode(as.character(variable), !!!pretty_labels, .default = as.character(variable)),
    alpha    = dplyr::recode(as.character(alpha),    !!!pretty_labels, .default = as.character(alpha)),
    stratum  = factor(stratum, levels = stratum_levels)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::left_join(counts, by = c("dataset","stratum")) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    niche             = factor(niche, levels = c("NP","OP")),
    niche_stratum_lab = factor(niche_stratum_lab, levels = col_levels)
  )

present <- desired_order[desired_order %in% univ_strat$variable]

plot_df <- univ_strat %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    variable = factor(variable, levels = rev(present)),
    alpha    = factor(alpha, levels = c("Observed richness","Shannon diversity","Simpson diversity"))
  ) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(stratum, niche_stratum_lab, variable) %>%
  dplyr::filter(any(!is.na(coefficient))) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup()

fill_lim <- max(abs(plot_df$coefficient), na.rm = TRUE)
pal <- try(rcartocolor::carto_pal(7, "Geyser"), silent=TRUE)
if (inherits(pal, "try-error")) pal <- c("#2166ac","#67a9cf","#d1e5f0","#f7f7f7","#fddbc7","#ef8a62","#b2182b")

make_stratum_plot <- function(level, show_y = FALSE, show_x = FALSE) {
  df_s <- dplyr::filter(plot_df, stratum == level)
  p <- ggplot2::ggplot(df_s, ggplot2::aes(x = alpha, y = variable, fill = coefficient)) +
    ggplot2::geom_tile(color = "white") +
    ggplot2::geom_text(ggplot2::aes(label = significance), size = 4,
                       vjust = 0.5, position = ggplot2::position_nudge(y = -0.2)) +
    ggplot2::scale_fill_gradient2(
      low = pal[1], mid = pal[4], high = pal[7],
      midpoint = 0, limits = c(-fill_lim, fill_lim),
      name = "Std. coef."
    ) +
    ggplot2::facet_grid(cols = ggplot2::vars(niche_stratum_lab),
                        scales = "free_y", space = "free_x") +
    ggplot2::theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
    ggplot2::theme(
      panel.grid  = ggplot2::element_blank(),
      axis.text.x = ggplot2::element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1),
      strip.text  = ggplot2::element_text(face = "bold"),
      plot.title  = ggplot2::element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
    ) +
    ggplot2::labs(title = level)
  if (show_y) p <- p + ggplot2::ylab("Predictor (↑ = higher alpha per 1 SD ↑ in predictor)") else
    p <- p + ggplot2::theme(axis.title.y = ggplot2::element_blank())
  if (show_x) p <- p + ggplot2::xlab("Alpha diversity metric") else
    p <- p + ggplot2::theme(axis.title.x = ggplot2::element_blank())
  p
}

p_nord <- make_stratum_plot("No respiratory diagnosis", show_y = TRUE,  show_x = FALSE)
p_resp <- make_stratum_plot("Respiratory diagnosis",    show_y = FALSE, show_x = TRUE)

p_uni_strat <- p_nord / p_resp + patchwork::plot_layout(guides = "collect") +
  ggplot2::theme(legend.position = "right")

print(p_uni_strat)

plot_dir <- "../Output/Cross_sectional/Alpha_diversity/Univariable/Stratified"
dir.create(plot_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
ggplot2::ggsave(
  file.path(plot_dir, "Univar_alpha_diversity_heatmap_stratified.svg"),
  p_uni_strat, width = 6, height = 8.5
)

out_dir <- "../Output/Cross_sectional/Alpha_diversity/Univariable/Stratified"
dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

long_xlsx <- univ_strat %>%
  dplyr::transmute(
    dataset,
    niche,                                           # NP / OP
    niche_label = as.character(niche_stratum_lab),   # "NP (n=..)" or "OP (n=..)" per stratum
    stratum,                                         # factor (two levels)
    stratum_label = counts$stratum_lab_xlsx[
      match(paste(dataset, stratum), paste(counts$dataset, counts$stratum))
    ],
    n_in_stratum,
    alpha, variable, coefficient, p_value, significance
  ) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(stratum, niche, alpha, variable)

writexl::write_xlsx(
  list("univariable_results" = long_xlsx),
  file.path(out_dir, "Univar_alpha_diversity_stratified.xlsx")
)

```
### Multivariable
```{r}
dataset_list <- list(
  VGO3_NP = meta_vgo3_np,
  VGO3_OP = meta_vgo3_op
)

alpha_vars     <- c("Observed","Shannon","Simpson")
lung_fun_cont  <- c("FEV1_pred","FVC_pred","FEV1FVC_pred","MMEF_pred")
core_covariates <- c("Age","Gender","Smoking_status","season_microbiome_sampling")

# Preprocess (ensure RespDx only)
preprocess_dataset <- function(df) {
  df <- df %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      Age           = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(Age))),
      FEV1_pred     = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(FEV1_pred))),
      FVC_pred      = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(FVC_pred))),
      FEV1FVC_pred  = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(FEV1FVC_pred))),
      MMEF_pred     = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(MMEF_pred))),
      Observed      = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(Observed))),
      Shannon       = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(Shannon))),
      Simpson       = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(Simpson))),
      Gender = factor(as.character(Gender), levels = c("Male","Female")),
      Smoking_status = factor(
        tolower(as.character(Smoking_status)),
        levels = c("never","former","current"),
        ordered = TRUE
      ),
      season_microbiome_sampling = factor(
        as.character(season_microbiome_sampling),
        levels = c("Winter","Spring","Summer","Autumn"),
        ordered = TRUE
      )
    )

  if (!"RespDx" %in% names(df)) stop("RespDx not found in data; please add it first.")
  df$RespDx <- factor(tolower(as.character(df$RespDx)), levels = c("no","yes"))

  df <- df %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      Observed_z = as.numeric(scale(Observed)),
      Shannon_z  = as.numeric(scale(Shannon)),
      Simpson_z  = as.numeric(scale(Simpson))
    )

  for (lf in lung_fun_cont) {
    if (lf %in% names(df)) {
      df[[paste0(lf, "_decline_z")]] <- as.numeric(scale(-1 * df[[lf]]))
    }
  }
  df
}

fit_models_for_dataset <- function(df, dataset_name, stratum_label) {
  alpha_z_vars     <- c("Observed_z","Shannon_z","Simpson_z")
  lung_decline_var <- paste0(lung_fun_cont, "_decline_z")
  results_list <- list()

  for (alpha_col in alpha_z_vars) {
    if (!alpha_col %in% names(df)) next
    for (lung_col in lung_decline_var) {
      if (!lung_col %in% names(df)) next
      needed <- c(alpha_col, lung_col, core_covariates)
      if (!all(needed %in% names(df))) next

      form <- as.formula(paste(alpha_col, "~", paste(c(lung_col, core_covariates), collapse = " + ")))
      fit <- tryCatch(stats::lm(form, data = df), error = function(e) NULL)
      if (is.null(fit)) next

      td <- broom::tidy(fit)
      lung_row <- td[td$term == lung_col, , drop = FALSE]
      if (!nrow(lung_row)) next

      lung_row$dataset      <- dataset_name
      lung_row$stratum      <- stratum_label
      lung_row$alpha_metric <- alpha_col
      lung_row$lung_var     <- lung_col

      results_list[[paste(alpha_col, lung_col, sep = "_")]] <- lung_row
    }
  }
  dplyr::bind_rows(results_list)
}

# Pretty labels
pretty_alpha <- c(
  "Observed_z" = "Observed richness",
  "Shannon_z"  = "Shannon diversity",
  "Simpson_z"  = "Simpson diversity"
)
pretty_lung <- c(
  "FEV1_pred_decline_z"     = "FEV1 % predicted (decline)",
  "FVC_pred_decline_z"      = "FVC % predicted (decline)",
  "FEV1FVC_pred_decline_z"  = "FEV1/FVC % predicted (decline)",
  "MMEF_pred_decline_z"     = "MMEF % predicted (decline)"
)

postprocess_results <- function(res_df) {
  if (is.null(res_df) || !nrow(res_df)) return(tibble::tibble())
  res_df %>%
    dplyr::group_by(dataset, stratum) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      p_adj = p.adjust(p.value, method = "BH"),
      sig_label = dplyr::case_when(
        p_adj < 0.05 ~ "***",
        p_adj < 0.10 ~ "**",
        p_adj < 0.25 ~ "*",
        TRUE ~ ""
      )
    ) %>%
    dplyr::ungroup() %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      alpha_metric = dplyr::recode(alpha_metric, !!!pretty_alpha),
      lung_var     = dplyr::recode(lung_var,     !!!pretty_lung)
    ) %>%
    dplyr::select(dataset, stratum, alpha_metric, lung_var,
                  estimate, std.error, statistic, p.value, p_adj, sig_label)
}

# Run models for the two strata (RespDx == no / yes)
all_results_noResp  <- list()
all_results_yesResp <- list()
stratum_counts <- list()

for (dataset_name in names(dataset_list)) {
  raw_df  <- dataset_list[[dataset_name]]
  prep_df <- preprocess_dataset(raw_df)

  n_no  <- sum(prep_df$RespDx == "no",  na.rm = TRUE)
  n_yes <- sum(prep_df$RespDx == "yes", na.rm = TRUE)
  stratum_counts[[length(stratum_counts) + 1]] <- tibble::tibble(
    dataset = dataset_name, stratum = "No respiratory diagnosis", n_in_stratum = n_no
  )
  stratum_counts[[length(stratum_counts) + 1]] <- tibble::tibble(
    dataset = dataset_name, stratum = "Respiratory diagnosis", n_in_stratum = n_yes
  )

  df_noResp  <- prep_df %>% dplyr::filter(RespDx == "no")
  df_yesResp <- prep_df %>% dplyr::filter(RespDx == "yes")

  all_results_noResp[[dataset_name]]  <- fit_models_for_dataset(df_noResp,  dataset_name, "No respiratory diagnosis")
  all_results_yesResp[[dataset_name]] <- fit_models_for_dataset(df_yesResp, dataset_name, "Respiratory diagnosis")
}

counts_df <- dplyr::bind_rows(stratum_counts)

res_noResp_clean  <- dplyr::bind_rows(all_results_noResp)  %>% postprocess_results()
res_yesResp_clean <- dplyr::bind_rows(all_results_yesResp) %>% postprocess_results()

combined_two <- dplyr::bind_rows(res_noResp_clean, res_yesResp_clean) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    niche = dplyr::case_when(dataset == "VGO3_NP" ~ "NP",
                             dataset == "VGO3_OP" ~ "OP",
                             TRUE ~ as.character(dataset)),
    niche = factor(niche, levels = c("NP","OP")),
    stratum = factor(stratum, levels = c("No respiratory diagnosis","Respiratory diagnosis"))
  ) %>%
  dplyr::left_join(counts_df, by = c("dataset","stratum")) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(niche_label = paste0(niche, " (n=", n_in_stratum, ")"))

desired_order <- c(
  "FEV1 % predicted (decline)",
  "FVC % predicted (decline)",
  "FEV1/FVC % predicted (decline)",
  "MMEF % predicted (decline)"
)

plot_df <- combined_two %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    lung_var = factor(lung_var, levels = rev(desired_order)),
    alpha_metric = factor(alpha_metric,
                          levels = c("Observed richness","Shannon diversity","Simpson diversity"))
  )

lim <- suppressWarnings(max(abs(plot_df$estimate), na.rm = TRUE))
if (!is.finite(lim)) lim <- 1

pal <- try(rcartocolor::carto_pal(7, "Geyser"), silent = TRUE)
if (inherits(pal, "try-error")) pal <- c("#2166ac","#67a9cf","#d1e5f0","#f7f7f7","#fddbc7","#ef8a62","#b2182b")

heatmap_two <- ggplot2::ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = alpha_metric, y = lung_var, fill = estimate)) +
  ggplot2::geom_tile(color = "white") +
  ggplot2::geom_text(aes(label = sig_label), size = 4) +
  ggplot2::scale_fill_gradient2(
    low = pal[1], mid = pal[4], high = pal[7],
    midpoint = 0, limits = c(-lim, lim),
    name = "Std. β (per 1 SD\nworse lung function)"
  ) +
  ggplot2::facet_grid(rows = vars(stratum), cols = vars(niche), scales = "free_y", space = "free_y") +
  ggplot2::theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  ggplot2::theme(
    panel.grid  = ggplot2::element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = ggplot2::element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1),
    strip.text  = ggplot2::element_text(face = "bold")
  ) +
  ggplot2::labs(
    x = "Alpha diversity metric",
    y = "Lung function metric (decline)"
  )

print(heatmap_two)

ggplot2::ggsave(
  "../Output/Cross_sectional/Alpha_diversity/Multivariable/Stratified/Multivar_alpha_diversity_heatmap_stratified.svg",
  heatmap_two, width = 6.5, height = 4.5
)

readr::write_csv(
  combined_two %>%
    dplyr::transmute(
      dataset,
      niche = as.character(niche),
      niche_label,
      stratum,
      n_in_stratum,
      alpha_metric,
      lung_var,
      estimate, std.error, statistic, p.value, p_adj, sig_label
    ) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(stratum, niche, alpha_metric, lung_var),
  "../Output/Cross_sectional/Alpha_diversity/Multivariable/Stratified/Multivariable_alpha_div_stratified.csv"
)

```

# Beta diversity
## Decide whether to stratify
```{r}
# ============================
# PERMANOVA interaction: lung_z * RespDx + covariates
# Decides whether to stratify by RespDx based on q_interaction
# ============================

# --- Settings ---
lung_outcomes <- c("FEV1_pred","FVC_pred","FEV1FVC_pred","MMEF_pred")
covars_adj    <- c("Age","season_microbiome_sampling","Gender","Smoking_status")
q_threshold   <- 0.10          # e.g., 0.10
n_min         <- 6
perms         <- 999
set.seed(202501)

datasets <- list(
  list(ps = ps_vgo3_np_filtered, name = "VGO3_NP", niche = "NP"),
  list(ps = ps_vgo3_op_filtered, name = "VGO3_OP", niche = "OP")
)

# --- Helpers ---
otu_as_rows <- function(ps) {
  m <- as(otu_table(ps), "matrix")
  if (taxa_are_rows(ps)) m <- t(m)
  mode(m) <- "numeric"
  rownames(m) <- sample_names(ps)
  m
}

choose_strata <- function(meta) {
  if ("WorkerID" %in% names(meta)) return(meta$WorkerID)
  if ("FarmID"   %in% names(meta)) return(meta$FarmID)
  NULL
}

`%||%` <- function(a,b) if (!is.null(a) && length(a)) a else b

# --- Core ---
run_interaction_only <- function(ps, dataset_name, niche) {
  otu  <- otu_as_rows(ps)
  meta <- as(sample_data(ps), "data.frame")
  stopifnot(all(rownames(meta) %in% rownames(otu)))

  # Use existing RespDx only
  if (!"RespDx" %in% names(meta)) stop("RespDx not found in sample_data.")
  meta$RespDx <- factor(tolower(as.character(meta$RespDx)), levels = c("no","yes"))

  # Coerce covariates
  if ("Age" %in% names(meta)) meta$Age <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(meta$Age)))
  for (v in c("season_microbiome_sampling","Gender","Smoking_status"))
    if (v %in% names(meta)) meta[[v]] <- factor(meta[[v]])

  out <- list()

  for (y in lung_outcomes) {
    if (!y %in% names(meta)) next

    m <- meta[, c("RespDx", y, covars_adj[covars_adj %in% names(meta)]), drop=FALSE] |>
      dplyr::mutate(!!y := suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(.data[[y]])))) |>
      tidyr::drop_na()

    ids <- intersect(rownames(otu), rownames(m))
    if (length(ids) < n_min || nlevels(droplevels(m$RespDx)) < 2) next

    m  <- m[ids, , drop = FALSE]
    m[[paste0(y,"_z")]] <- as.numeric(scale(m[[y]]))
    ord <- vegan::vegdist(otu[ids, , drop = FALSE], method = "bray")

    rhs <- c(paste0("`", y, "_z`*RespDx"),
             paste0("`", covars_adj[covars_adj %in% names(m)], "`"))
    fml <- as.formula(paste("ord ~", paste(rhs, collapse = " + ")))

    strata_var <- choose_strata(meta[ids, , drop = FALSE])
    fit <- vegan::adonis2(fml, data = m, permutations = perms, by = "margin",
                          strata = strata_var)

    td <- broom::tidy(fit) |> dplyr::mutate(term_clean = gsub("`", "", term))
    # handle either ordering of the interaction label
    int_terms <- c(paste0(y, "_z:RespDx"), paste0("RespDx:", y, "_z"))
    row_int <- td |> dplyr::filter(term_clean %in% int_terms) |> dplyr::slice_tail(n = 1)
    row_lng <- td |> dplyr::filter(term_clean == paste0(y, "_z")) |> dplyr::slice_tail(n = 1)

    out[[length(out)+1]] <- tibble::tibble(
      dataset = dataset_name, niche = niche, variable = y, n_used = length(ids),
      R2_lung = row_lng$R2 %||% NA_real_,  p_lung = row_lng$p.value %||% NA_real_,
      R2_int  = row_int$R2 %||% NA_real_,  p_int  = row_int$p.value %||% NA_real_
    )
  }
  dplyr::bind_rows(out)
}

# ---- Run & decide ----
perm_int <- dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(datasets, function(d)
  run_interaction_only(d$ps, d$name, d$niche)))

decisions <- perm_int %>%
  dplyr::group_by(dataset) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(q_int = p.adjust(p_int, method = "BH")) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    star_int = dplyr::case_when(
      is.na(q_int)  ~ "",
      q_int <= 0.05 ~ "***",
      q_int <= 0.10 ~ "**",
      q_int <= 0.25 ~ "*",
      TRUE          ~ ""
    ),
    stratify = dplyr::if_else(!is.na(q_int) & q_int < q_threshold, "Stratify", "No stratify")
  )

# Save + simple heatmap
out_dir <- "../Output/Cross_sectional/Beta_diversity/Strata_decision"
dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
readr::write_csv(decisions, file.path(out_dir, "PERMANOVA_strata_decision.csv"))

pretty_outcomes <- c(
  "FEV1_pred"    = "FEV1 % predicted",
  "FVC_pred"     = "FVC % predicted",
  "FEV1FVC_pred" = "FEV1/FVC % predicted",
  "MMEF_pred"    = "MMEF % predicted"
)
desired_order <- c("FEV1 % predicted","FVC % predicted","FEV1/FVC % predicted","MMEF % predicted")

plot_df <- decisions %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    outcome_lab = dplyr::recode(variable, !!!pretty_outcomes, .default = variable),
    outcome_f   = factor(outcome_lab, levels = rev(desired_order)),
    niche       = factor(niche, levels = c("NP","OP")),
    neglog10_q  = -log10(pmin(q_int, 1))
  )

p <- ggplot2::ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = niche, y = outcome_f, fill = neglog10_q)) +
  ggplot2::geom_tile(color = "white") +
  ggplot2::geom_text(aes(label = star_int), size = 3.6) +
  ggplot2::scale_fill_gradient(low = "grey95", high = "grey20",
                      name = expression(-log[10]("(adj p for interaction)"))) +
  ggplot2::theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  ggplot2::theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
                 axis.title = element_blank()) +
  ggplot2::labs(title = "PERMANOVA interaction (lung × disease): stratify?",
       subtitle = paste0("Decision rule: q_interaction < ", q_threshold, " ⇒ Stratify"))
ggplot2::ggsave(file.path(out_dir, "PERMANOVA_strata_decision_heatmap.svg"), p, width = 6.2, height = 3.8)
print(p)

```
## Non-stratified
### Univariable
```{r}
# ============================================
# Univariable PERMANOVAs (non-stratified)
# Uses existing RespDx if you include it in the variable list
# ============================================

samples_as_rows <- function(ps) {
  M <- as(otu_table(ps), "matrix")
  if (taxa_are_rows(ps)) M <- t(M)
  rownames(M) <- sample_names(ps)
  rownames(M) <- trimws(rownames(M))
  mode(M) <- "numeric"
  M
}

# Minimal preprocessing: coerce types and ensure RespDx factor (no rebuilding)
preprocess_dataset <- function(df) {
  num_vars <- intersect(c("Age","BMI","T1_wkprior_NH3","FEV1_pred","FVC_pred","FEV1FVC_pred","MMEF_pred"), names(df))
  if (length(num_vars)) df[num_vars] <- lapply(df[num_vars], function(x) suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(x))))

  for (v in c("Gender","Smoking_status","Education_level","season_microbiome_sampling","RespDx")) {
    if (v %in% names(df)) df[[v]] <- as.factor(df[[v]])
  }
  # normalize RespDx explicitly
  if ("RespDx" %in% names(df)) df$RespDx <- factor(tolower(as.character(df$RespDx)), levels = c("no","yes"))
  df
}

prep_meta_from_ps <- function(ps, preprocess_fn) {
  meta_raw <- as(sample_data(ps), "data.frame")
  meta_raw$sample_id <- sample_names(ps)
  rownames(meta_raw) <- meta_raw$sample_id

  meta <- preprocess_fn(meta_raw)
  meta <- as.data.frame(meta)

  if (!"sample_id" %in% names(meta)) {
    if (!is.null(rownames(meta))) meta$sample_id <- rownames(meta) else
      stop("preprocess_dataset() removed both 'sample_id' and rownames(meta).")
  }
  meta$sample_id <- trimws(as.character(meta$sample_id))
  rownames(meta) <- meta$sample_id
  meta
}

align_and_bray <- function(otu_mat, meta_df, min_overlap = 3L) {
  rn_otu  <- trimws(rownames(otu_mat))
  rn_meta <- trimws(rownames(meta_df))
  common  <- intersect(rn_otu, rn_meta)
  if (length(common) < min_overlap) {
    stop(sprintf("Fewer than %d overlapping samples (OTU=%d, meta=%d, overlap=%d).",
                 min_overlap, nrow(otu_mat), nrow(meta_df), length(common)))
  }
  otu_mat <- otu_mat[common, , drop = FALSE]
  meta_df <- meta_df[common, , drop = FALSE]
  list(
    bray_mat = as.matrix(vegan::vegdist(otu_mat, method = "bray")),
    meta     = meta_df
  )
}

var_is_testable <- function(df, var, min_n = 3L) {
  x <- df[[var]]
  if (is.null(x)) return(FALSE)
  x <- x[!is.na(x)]
  if (length(x) < min_n) return(FALSE)
  if (is.numeric(x)) return(stats::sd(x) > 0)
  if (is.factor(x) || is.character(x)) {
    tab <- table(x)
    return(length(tab) >= 2L && all(tab >= 2L))
  }
  FALSE
}

beta_df <- function(dist_mat, meta, var) {
  m_sub <- meta[!is.na(meta[[var]]), , drop = FALSE]
  if (!"sample_id" %in% names(m_sub)) m_sub$sample_id <- rownames(m_sub)
  ids <- intersect(rownames(dist_mat), m_sub$sample_id)
  if (length(ids) < 3L) return(list(ord_sub = NULL, m_sub = NULL, ids = character(0)))
  ord_sub <- as.dist(dist_mat[ids, ids, drop = FALSE])
  m_sub   <- m_sub[match(ids, m_sub$sample_id), , drop = FALSE]
  list(ord_sub = ord_sub, m_sub = m_sub, ids = ids)
}

do_permanova <- function(ord, meta, var) {
  fit <- vegan::adonis2(as.formula(glue::glue("ord ~ {var}")), permutations = 999, data = meta)
  broom::tidy(fit) |>
    dplyr::filter(!term %in% c("Residual","Total"))
}

check_dispersion <- function(dist_matrix, meta, var) {
  sub_meta <- meta[!is.na(meta[[var]]), , drop = FALSE]
  if (!"sample_id" %in% names(sub_meta)) sub_meta$sample_id <- rownames(sub_meta)
  ids <- intersect(rownames(dist_matrix), sub_meta$sample_id)
  if (length(ids) < 3L)
    return(tibble::tibble(disp_p = NA_real_, disp_note = "Skipped: <3 overlapping samples"))
  d <- as.dist(dist_matrix[ids, ids, drop = FALSE])
  sub_meta <- sub_meta[match(ids, sub_meta$sample_id), , drop = FALSE]
  x <- sub_meta[[var]]
  if (is.factor(x) || is.character(x)) {
    x <- as.factor(x); tab <- table(x)
    if (length(tab) < 2L || any(tab < 2L))
      return(tibble::tibble(disp_p = NA_real_, disp_note = "Skipped: <2 groups with ≥2 samples"))
    model <- vegan::betadisper(d, x); perm <- vegan::permutest(model)
    tibble::tibble(disp_p = perm$tab[1, "Pr(>F)"], disp_note = NA_character_)
  } else {
    dm <- as.matrix(d); dist_avg <- rowMeans(dm, na.rm = TRUE)
    p <- summary(lm(dist_avg ~ x))$coefficients[2, 4]
    tibble::tibble(disp_p = p, disp_note = NA_character_)
  }
}

sig_lab <- function(p) dplyr::case_when(
  is.na(p)  ~ NA_character_,
  p < 0.001 ~ "***",
  p < 0.01  ~ "**",
  p < 0.05  ~ "*",
  TRUE      ~ ""
)

# Variables & pretty labels
variables_common <- c(
  "Age","Gender","BMI","season_microbiome_sampling","Education_level",
  "Smoking_status","Asthma_ever","Covid_lastmonth","Atopic","Cortinhal_lastyr",
  "Pneumonia_lastyr","Antibiotics_lastmonth","Antibiotics_lastyr","Farm_childhood",
  "T1_wkprior_NH3","FEV1_pred","FVC_pred","FEV1FVC_pred","MMEF_pred"
)
phenotype_components <- c("Asthma_current","COPD_emphy_doc_diag")
# Include RespDx if you want its univariable PERMANOVA too:
vars_non_strat <- c(variables_common, phenotype_components, "RespDx")

pretty_labels_beta <- c(
  "Age"="Age","Gender"="Gender (Female vs Male)","BMI"="Body Mass Index",
  "season_microbiome_sampling"="Season of sampling","Education_level"="Education level",
  "Smoking_status"="Smoking status","Asthma_current"="Current asthma","Asthma_ever"="Asthma ever",
  "COPD_emphy_doc_diag"="COPD/emphysema (doctor diagnosed)","Covid_lastmonth"="COVID-19 in last month",
  "Atopic"="Atopic","Cortinhal_lastyr"="Corticosteroid inhaler (last year)",
  "Pneumonia_lastyr"="Pneumonia in last year","Antibiotics_lastmonth"="Antibiotics last month",
  "Antibiotics_lastyr"="Antibiotics last year","Farm_childhood"="Grew up on a farm",
  "T1_wkprior_NH3"="NH3 week prior to sampling",
  "FEV1_pred"="FEV1 % predicted","FVC_pred"="FVC % predicted",
  "FEV1FVC_pred"="FEV1/FVC % predicted","MMEF_pred"="MMEF % predicted",
  "RespDx"="Respiratory disease (COPD/asthma)"
)

desired_order_beta <- c(
  "Age","Gender (Female vs Male)","Body Mass Index","Season of sampling","Education level",
  "Smoking status","Current asthma","Asthma ever","Pneumonia in last year",
  "COPD/emphysema (doctor diagnosed)","COVID-19 in last month","Atopic",
  "Corticosteroid inhaler (last year)","Antibiotics last month","Antibiotics last year",
  "Grew up on a farm","NH3 week prior to sampling",
  "FEV1 % predicted","FVC % predicted","FEV1/FVC % predicted","MMEF % predicted",
  "Respiratory disease (COPD/asthma)"
)

# Runner (non-stratified)
run_dataset_nonstrat <- function(ps, dataset_name, niche, preprocess_fn = preprocess_dataset) {
  otu  <- samples_as_rows(ps)
  meta <- prep_meta_from_ps(ps, preprocess_fn)

  aligned <- align_and_bray(otu, meta, min_overlap = 3L)
  bray <- aligned$bray_mat
  meta <- aligned$meta

  message(sprintf("[NON-STRAT %s] overlap after alignment: %d samples", dataset_name, nrow(meta)))

  test_vars <- intersect(vars_non_strat, names(meta))
  testable  <- purrr::keep(test_vars, ~ var_is_testable(meta, .x, 3L))
  if (!length(testable)) return(tibble::tibble())

  purrr::map_dfr(testable, function(v) {
    parts <- beta_df(bray, meta, v)
    if (is.null(parts$ord_sub) || is.null(parts$m_sub) || !var_is_testable(parts$m_sub, v, 3L)) {
      return(tibble::tibble(term = v, sumsq = NA_real_, R2 = NA_real_, F = NA_real_, p.value = NA_real_,
                    n_used = ifelse(is.null(parts$ord_sub), 0L, length(attr(parts$ord_sub, "Labels"))),
                    variable = v, dataset = dataset_name, niche = niche,
                    disp_p = NA_real_, disp_note = "Skipped: insufficient data"))
    }
    fit  <- do_permanova(parts$ord_sub, parts$m_sub, v)
    disp <- check_dispersion(bray, meta, v)
    tibble::tibble(term = fit$term, sumsq = fit$sumsq, R2 = fit$R2, F = fit$statistic, p.value = fit$p.value,
           n_used = length(parts$ids), variable = v, dataset = dataset_name, niche = niche) |>
      dplyr::bind_cols(disp)
  })
}

datasets <- list(
  list(ps = ps_vgo3_np_filtered, name = "VGO3_NP", niche = "NP"),
  list(ps = ps_vgo3_op_filtered, name = "VGO3_OP", niche = "OP")
)

perm_ns <- purrr::map_dfr(datasets, ~ run_dataset_nonstrat(.x$ps, .x$name, .x$niche))

# BH adjust within dataset
perm_ns <- perm_ns |>
  dplyr::group_by(dataset) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    q.value = p.adjust(p.value, method = "BH"),
    label_p = sig_lab(p.value),
    label_q = sig_lab(q.value)
  ) |>
  dplyr::ungroup()

# Save CSV
out_dir_ns <- "../Output/Cross_sectional/Beta_diversity/Univariable/Non_stratified"
dir.create(out_dir_ns, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
readr::write_csv(perm_ns, file.path(out_dir_ns, "Univariable_PERMANOVAs_non_stratified.csv"))

# Plot 
bar_df <- perm_ns %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(R2)) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    term_lab = dplyr::recode(variable, !!!pretty_labels_beta, .default = variable),
    niche    = factor(niche, levels = c("NP","OP")),
    sig      = ifelse(!is.na(p.value) & p.value < 0.05, "p < 0.05", "ns"),
    stars_p  = dplyr::case_when(
      is.na(p.value)  ~ "",
      p.value < 0.001 ~ "***",
      p.value < 0.01  ~ "**",
      p.value < 0.05  ~ "*",
      TRUE            ~ ""
    )
  ) %>%
  dplyr::filter(term_lab %in% desired_order_beta) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(term_f = factor(term_lab, levels = rev(desired_order_beta)))

nice_ceiling <- function(x, step = 0.0025) step * ceiling(x / step)
xlim_all <- nice_ceiling(max(bar_df$R2, na.rm = TRUE) * 1.05)

stars_legend_df <- tibble::tibble(
  stars_level = factor(c("*","**","***"), levels = c("*","**","***")),
  x = 0, y = 0
)

p_uni_nonstrat <- ggplot2::ggplot(bar_df, aes(x = R2 * 100, y = term_f, fill = sig)) +
  ggplot2::geom_col(width = 0.7) +
  ggplot2::geom_text(
    data = dplyr::filter(bar_df, sig == "p < 0.05" & stars_p != ""),
    aes(x = pmax((R2 * 100) / 2, 0.1), y = term_f, label = stars_p),
    color = "white", fontface = "bold", size = 3.2, vjust = 0.75
  ) +
  ggplot2::facet_grid(cols = vars(niche), scales = "free_y", space = "free_y", drop = FALSE) +
  ggplot2::scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c(0, xlim_all * 100),
    breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 5),
    labels = scales::label_number(accuracy = 0.1),
    expand = ggplot2::expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05))
  ) +
  ggplot2::scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("p < 0.05" = "#F28E2B", "ns" = "grey30"),
    breaks = c("ns","p < 0.05"),
    labels = c("Non significant", "Significant (p < 0.05)"),
    name   = NULL
  ) +
  ggplot2::labs(
    title = "Univariable PERMANOVAs (Bray–Curtis) — Non-stratified explained variance by predictor",
    x = "Explained variance (% R\u00B2)", y = NULL
  ) +
  ggplot2::theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  ggplot2::theme(
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor   = element_blank(),
    strip.text         = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text.y        = element_text(size = 9),
    plot.title         = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0),
    plot.margin        = ggplot2::margin(t = 4, r = 8, b = 4, l = 4)
  ) +
  ggplot2::geom_point(
    data = stars_legend_df,
    aes(x = x, y = y, shape = stars_level),
    inherit.aes = FALSE, alpha = 0, size = 0, show.legend = TRUE
  ) +
  ggplot2::scale_shape_manual(
    values = c("*" = 16, "**" = 16, "***" = 16),
    labels = c("*" = "* p < 0.05", "**" = "** p < 0.01", "***" = "*** p < 0.001"),
    name   = "Significance"
  ) +
  ggplot2::guides(fill = ggplot2::guide_legend(order = 1), shape = ggplot2::guide_legend(order = 2)) +
  ggplot2::coord_cartesian(clip = "off")

ggplot2::ggsave(file.path(out_dir_ns, "Univariable_PERMANOVAs_non_stratified.svg"),
       p_uni_nonstrat, width = 9, height = 5.2)

```
### Multivariable 
```{r}
lung_outcomes <- c("FEV1_pred","FVC_pred","FEV1FVC_pred","MMEF_pred")
covars_adj    <- c("Age","season_microbiome_sampling","Gender","Smoking_status", "RespDx")

q_lung_sig_thresh <- 0.25  # bar fill threshold for main effect (BH-adjusted)
perms             <- 999
min_overlap_dist  <- 3
n_min             <- 6
set.seed(202501)

pretty_outcomes <- c(
  "FEV1_pred"    = "FEV1 % predicted",
  "FVC_pred"     = "FVC % predicted",
  "FEV1FVC_pred" = "FEV1/FVC % predicted",
  "MMEF_pred"    = "MMEF % predicted"
)
desired_outcome_order <- c(
  "FEV1 % predicted","FVC % predicted","FEV1/FVC % predicted","MMEF % predicted"
)

out_dir_main <- "../Output/Cross_sectional/Beta_diversity/Multivariable/Non_stratified"
dir.create(out_dir_main, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

`%||%` <- function(a,b) if (!is.null(a) && length(a)) a else b
nice_ceiling <- function(x, step = 0.0025) step * ceiling(x / step)
parse_num <- function(x) suppressWarnings(readr::parse_number(as.character(x)))

# Robust p-column accessor (broom/vegan versions can differ)
get_pcol <- function(td_names) intersect(c("p.value","Pr(>F)","p"), td_names)[1]

samples_as_rows <- function(ps) {
  M <- as(otu_table(ps), "matrix")
  if (taxa_are_rows(ps)) M <- t(M)
  mode(M) <- "numeric"
  rownames(M) <- phyloseq::sample_names(ps)
  rownames(M) <- trimws(rownames(M))
  M
}

preprocess_dataset <- function(df) {
  # coerce common fields; use existing RespDx (do not rebuild)
  for (v in c("Age","FEV1_pred","FVC_pred","FEV1FVC_pred","MMEF_pred"))
    if (v %in% names(df)) df[[v]] <- parse_num(df[[v]])
  for (v in c("season_microbiome_sampling","Gender","Smoking_status","RespDx"))
    if (v %in% names(df)) df[[v]] <- as.factor(df[[v]])
  if ("RespDx" %in% names(df))
    df$RespDx <- factor(tolower(as.character(df$RespDx)), levels = c("no","yes"))
  df
}

prep_meta_keep_ids <- function(ps, preprocess_fn = preprocess_dataset) {
  meta_raw <- as(sample_data(ps), "data.frame")
  meta_raw$sample_id <- sample_names(ps)
  rownames(meta_raw) <- meta_raw$sample_id

  meta <- preprocess_fn(meta_raw)
  meta <- as.data.frame(meta)

  if (!"sample_id" %in% names(meta)) {
    if (!is.null(rownames(meta))) meta$sample_id <- rownames(meta)
    else stop("preprocess_dataset() removed rownames and sample_id; cannot align.")
  }
  meta$sample_id <- trimws(as.character(meta$sample_id))
  rownames(meta) <- meta$sample_id
  meta
}

align_and_bray <- function(otu_mat, meta_df, min_overlap = 3L) {
  rn_otu  <- trimws(rownames(otu_mat))
  rn_meta <- trimws(rownames(meta_df))
  common  <- intersect(rn_otu, rn_meta)
  if (length(common) < min_overlap) {
    message(sprintf("[WARN] overlap=%d < min_overlap=%d; skipping distance.",
                    length(common), min_overlap))
    return(NULL)
  }
  otu_mat <- otu_mat[common, , drop = FALSE]
  meta_df <- meta_df[common, , drop = FALSE]
  list(
    ord  = vegan::vegdist(otu_mat, method = "bray"),
    meta = meta_df
  )
}

choose_strata <- function(meta) {
  if ("WorkerID" %in% names(meta)) return(meta$WorkerID)
  if ("FarmID"   %in% names(meta)) return(meta$FarmID)
  NULL
}

var_is_testable <- function(df, var) {
  x <- df[[var]]
  if (is.null(x)) return(FALSE)
  x <- x[!is.na(x)]
  if (!length(x)) return(FALSE)
  if (is.numeric(x)) return(stats::sd(x) > 0)
  if (is.factor(x) || is.character(x)) {
    tab <- table(x)
    return(length(tab) >= 2L && all(tab >= 2L))
  }
  FALSE
}

run_multi_one <- function(ps, dataset_name, niche) {
  otu  <- samples_as_rows(ps)
  meta <- prep_meta_keep_ids(ps, preprocess_dataset)

  if (!"RespDx" %in% names(meta)) stop("RespDx not found in metadata.")
  meta$RespDx <- factor(tolower(as.character(meta$RespDx)), levels = c("no","yes"))

  al <- align_and_bray(otu, meta, min_overlap = min_overlap_dist)
  if (is.null(al)) {
    message(sprintf("[INFO %s] Not enough overlap to compute distances.", dataset_name))
    return(tibble::tibble())
  }
  ord  <- al$ord
  meta <- al$meta

  # diagnostics (optional)
  dx_tab <- table(meta$RespDx, useNA = "ifany")
  message(sprintf("[INFO %s] RespDx counts: %s", dataset_name,
                  paste(names(dx_tab), dx_tab, sep="=", collapse=", ")))

  out <- list()
  for (y in lung_outcomes) {
    need <- c(y, "RespDx", covars_adj)
    have <- need[need %in% names(meta)]
    if (!all(c(y, "RespDx") %in% have)) next

    df <- meta[, have, drop = FALSE] %>%
      dplyr::mutate(!!y := parse_num(.data[[y]])) %>%
      tidyr::drop_na()

    # initial quick testability
    if (!var_is_testable(df, "RespDx") || !var_is_testable(df, y)) next

    # align to distance labels
    ids <- intersect(attr(ord, "Labels"), rownames(df))
    if (length(ids) < n_min) next

    # subset, drop unused levels, re-check testability AFTER subsetting
    df_sub <- droplevels(df[ids, , drop = FALSE])
    if (!var_is_testable(df_sub, y) || !var_is_testable(df_sub, "RespDx")) next

    # recompute usable covariates on the subset
    kept_cov <- setdiff(have, c(y, "RespDx"))
    kept_cov <- kept_cov[vapply(kept_cov, function(v) var_is_testable(df_sub, v), logical(1))]

    # build distance and design on the same ids
    ord_sub <- as.dist(as.matrix(ord)[ids, ids, drop = FALSE])
    df_sub[[paste0(y,"_z")]] <- as.numeric(scale(df_sub[[y]]))

    rhs <- paste(c(glue::glue("`{y}_z`"), "`RespDx`", paste0("`", kept_cov, "`")), collapse = " + ")
    fml <- as.formula(glue::glue("ord_sub ~ {rhs}"))

    # optional blocking
    strata_vec <- choose_strata(df_sub)

    set.seed(202501)
    fit <- vegan::adonis2(
      fml, data = df_sub, permutations = perms, by = "margin",
      strata = strata_vec
    )
    td <- broom::tidy(fit) %>% dplyr::mutate(term_clean = gsub("`","",term))
    p_col <- get_pcol(names(td))

    row_lung <- td %>% dplyr::filter(term_clean == paste0(y,"_z")) %>% dplyr::slice_tail(n = 1)
    row_dx   <- td %>% dplyr::filter(term_clean == "RespDx")       %>% dplyr::slice_tail(n = 1)

    out[[length(out)+1]] <- tibble::tibble(
      dataset = dataset_name, niche = niche, outcome = y, n_used = length(ids),
      R2_lung = row_lung$R2 %||% NA_real_,  F_lung = row_lung$statistic %||% NA_real_, p_lung = row_lung[[p_col]] %||% NA_real_,
      R2_dx   = row_dx$R2   %||% NA_real_,  F_dx   = row_dx$statistic   %||% NA_real_, p_dx   = row_dx[[p_col]]   %||% NA_real_,
      covars_used = paste(kept_cov, collapse = ",")
    )
  }

  dplyr::bind_rows(out)
}

empty_schema <- tibble::tibble(
  dataset    = character(),
  niche      = character(),
  outcome    = character(),
  n_used     = integer(),
  R2_lung    = double(), F_lung = double(), p_lung = double(),
  R2_dx      = double(), F_dx   = double(), p_dx   = double(),
  covars_used = character()
)

# Provide your phyloseq objects here:
datasets <- list(
  list(ps = ps_vgo3_np_filtered, name = "VGO3_NP", niche = "NP"),
  list(ps = ps_vgo3_op_filtered, name = "VGO3_OP", niche = "OP")
)

multi_list <- purrr::map(datasets, function(d) {
  res <- try(run_multi_one(d$ps, d$name, d$niche), silent = TRUE)
  if (inherits(res, "try-error") || is.null(res)) return(empty_schema)
  if (!is.data.frame(res) || ncol(res) == 0)     return(empty_schema)
  res
})
multi_raw <- dplyr::bind_rows(multi_list)

if (!nrow(multi_raw)) {
  readr::write_csv(multi_raw, file.path(out_dir_main, "Multivar_PERMANOVA_results.csv"))
} else {
  multi_main <- multi_raw %>%
    dplyr::group_by(dataset) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(q_lung = p.adjust(p_lung, method = "BH")) %>%
    dplyr::ungroup() %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      outcome_lab = dplyr::recode(outcome, !!!pretty_outcomes, .default = outcome),
      outcome_f   = factor(outcome_lab, levels = rev(desired_outcome_order)),
      niche_f     = factor(niche, levels = c("NP","OP")),
      fill_q      = factor(dplyr::if_else(!is.na(q_lung) & q_lung <= q_lung_sig_thresh, "q \u2264 0.25", "ns"),
                           levels = c("ns","q \u2264 0.25")),
      stars_q     = dplyr::case_when(
        is.na(q_lung)  ~ "",
        q_lung <= 0.05 ~ "***",
        q_lung <= 0.10 ~ "**",
        q_lung <= 0.25 ~ "*",
        TRUE           ~ ""
      ),
      label_inside = stars_q   # no dagger here
    )

  readr::write_csv(multi_main, file.path(out_dir_main, "Multivar_PERMANOVA_results.csv"))

  xlim_all <- nice_ceiling(max(multi_main$R2_lung, na.rm = TRUE) * 1.05)
  stars_legend_df <- tibble::tibble(stars_level = factor(c("*","**","***"), levels = c("*","**","***")), x = 0, y = 0)

  p_multi_main <- ggplot2::ggplot(multi_main, aes(x = R2_lung * 100, y = outcome_f, fill = fill_q)) +
    ggplot2::geom_col(width = 0.7) +
    ggplot2::geom_text(
      data = dplyr::filter(multi_main, label_inside != ""),
      aes(x = pmax((R2_lung * 100) / 2, 0.1), y = outcome_f, label = label_inside),
      inherit.aes = FALSE, color = "white", fontface = "bold", size = 3.2, vjust = 0.6
    ) +
    ggplot2::facet_grid(cols = vars(niche_f), scales = "free_y", space = "free_y", drop = FALSE) +
    ggplot2::scale_x_continuous(
      limits = c(0, xlim_all * 100),
      breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 5),
      labels = scales::label_number(accuracy = 0.1),
      expand = ggplot2::expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05))
    ) +
    ggplot2::scale_fill_manual(
      values = c("ns" = "grey30", "q \u2264 0.25" = "#F28E2B"),
      labels = c("Non significant", "Significant (q \u2264 0.25)"),
      name   = NULL
    ) +
    ggplot2::labs(
      x = "Explained variance (% R\u00B2)", y = NULL
    ) +
    ggplot2::theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
    ggplot2::theme(
      panel.grid.major.y = ggplot2::element_blank(),
      panel.grid.minor   = ggplot2::element_blank(),
      strip.text         = ggplot2::element_text(face = "bold"),
      axis.text.y        = ggplot2::element_text(size = 9),
      plot.title         = ggplot2::element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0),
      plot.margin        = ggplot2::margin(t = 4, r = 8, b = 4, l = 4)
    ) +
    ggplot2::geom_point(
      data = stars_legend_df,
      aes(x = x, y = y, shape = stars_level),
      inherit.aes = FALSE, alpha = 0, size = 0, show.legend = TRUE
    ) +
    ggplot2::scale_shape_manual(
      values = c("*" = 16, "**" = 16, "***" = 16),
      labels = c("*" = "* q \u2264 0.25","**" = "** q \u2264 0.10","***" = "*** q \u2264 0.05"),
      name   = "Significance"
    ) +
    ggplot2::guides(fill = ggplot2::guide_legend(order = 1), shape = ggplot2::guide_legend(order = 2)) +
    ggplot2::coord_cartesian(clip = "off")

  ggplot2::ggsave(file.path(out_dir_main, "Multivar_PERMANOVA_results_barplot.svg"),
                  p_multi_main, width = 5, height = 3)
}

```
### Multivariable (no RespDx covariate)
```{r}
### Multivariable 
lung_outcomes <- c("FEV1_pred","FVC_pred","FEV1FVC_pred","MMEF_pred")
covars_adj    <- c("Age","season_microbiome_sampling","Gender","Smoking_status")  # RespDx removed

q_lung_sig_thresh <- 0.25  # bar fill threshold for main effect (BH-adjusted)
perms             <- 999
min_overlap_dist  <- 3
n_min             <- 6
set.seed(202501)

pretty_outcomes <- c(
  "FEV1_pred"    = "FEV1 % predicted",
  "FVC_pred"     = "FVC % predicted",
  "FEV1FVC_pred" = "FEV1/FVC % predicted",
  "MMEF_pred"    = "MMEF % predicted"
)
desired_outcome_order <- c(
  "FEV1 % predicted","FVC % predicted","FEV1/FVC % predicted","MMEF % predicted"
)

out_dir_main <- "../Output/Cross_sectional/Beta_diversity/Multivariable/Non_stratified"
dir.create(out_dir_main, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

`%||%` <- function(a,b) if (!is.null(a) && length(a)) a else b
nice_ceiling <- function(x, step = 0.0025) step * ceiling(x / step)
parse_num <- function(x) suppressWarnings(readr::parse_number(as.character(x)))

# Robust p-column accessor (broom/vegan versions can differ)
get_pcol <- function(td_names) intersect(c("p.value","Pr(>F)","p"), td_names)[1]

samples_as_rows <- function(ps) {
  M <- as(otu_table(ps), "matrix")
  if (taxa_are_rows(ps)) M <- t(M)
  mode(M) <- "numeric"
  rownames(M) <- phyloseq::sample_names(ps)
  rownames(M) <- trimws(rownames(M))
  M
}

preprocess_dataset <- function(df) {
  # coerce common fields
  for (v in c("Age","FEV1_pred","FVC_pred","FEV1FVC_pred","MMEF_pred"))
    if (v %in% names(df)) df[[v]] <- parse_num(df[[v]])
  for (v in c("season_microbiome_sampling","Gender","Smoking_status"))
    if (v %in% names(df)) df[[v]] <- as.factor(df[[v]])
  df
}

prep_meta_keep_ids <- function(ps, preprocess_fn = preprocess_dataset) {
  meta_raw <- as(sample_data(ps), "data.frame")
  meta_raw$sample_id <- sample_names(ps)
  rownames(meta_raw) <- meta_raw$sample_id

  meta <- preprocess_fn(meta_raw)
  meta <- as.data.frame(meta)

  if (!"sample_id" %in% names(meta)) {
    if (!is.null(rownames(meta))) meta$sample_id <- rownames(meta)
    else stop("preprocess_dataset() removed rownames and sample_id; cannot align.")
  }
  meta$sample_id <- trimws(as.character(meta$sample_id))
  rownames(meta) <- meta$sample_id
  meta
}

align_and_bray <- function(otu_mat, meta_df, min_overlap = 3L) {
  rn_otu  <- trimws(rownames(otu_mat))
  rn_meta <- trimws(rownames(meta_df))
  common  <- intersect(rn_otu, rn_meta)
  if (length(common) < min_overlap) {
    message(sprintf("[WARN] overlap=%d < min_overlap=%d; skipping distance.",
                    length(common), min_overlap))
    return(NULL)
  }
  otu_mat <- otu_mat[common, , drop = FALSE]
  meta_df <- meta_df[common, , drop = FALSE]
  list(
    ord  = vegan::vegdist(otu_mat, method = "bray"),
    meta = meta_df
  )
}

choose_strata <- function(meta) {
  if ("WorkerID" %in% names(meta)) return(meta$WorkerID)
  if ("FarmID"   %in% names(meta)) return(meta$FarmID)
  NULL
}

var_is_testable <- function(df, var) {
  x <- df[[var]]
  if (is.null(x)) return(FALSE)
  x <- x[!is.na(x)]
  if (!length(x)) return(FALSE)
  if (is.numeric(x)) return(stats::sd(x) > 0)
  if (is.factor(x) || is.character(x)) {
    tab <- table(x)
    return(length(tab) >= 2L && all(tab >= 2L))
  }
  FALSE
}

run_multi_one <- function(ps, dataset_name, niche) {
  otu  <- samples_as_rows(ps)
  meta <- prep_meta_keep_ids(ps, preprocess_dataset)

  al <- align_and_bray(otu, meta, min_overlap = min_overlap_dist)
  if (is.null(al)) {
    message(sprintf("[INFO %s] Not enough overlap to compute distances.", dataset_name))
    return(tibble::tibble())
  }
  ord  <- al$ord
  meta <- al$meta

  out <- list()
  for (y in lung_outcomes) {
    need <- c(y, covars_adj)
    have <- need[need %in% names(meta)]
    if (!all(y %in% have)) next

    df <- meta[, have, drop = FALSE] %>%
      dplyr::mutate(!!y := parse_num(.data[[y]])) %>%
      tidyr::drop_na()

    # initial quick testability
    if (!var_is_testable(df, y)) next

    # align to distance labels
    ids <- intersect(attr(ord, "Labels"), rownames(df))
    if (length(ids) < n_min) next

    # subset, drop unused levels, re-check testability AFTER subsetting
    df_sub <- droplevels(df[ids, , drop = FALSE])
    if (!var_is_testable(df_sub, y)) next

    # recompute usable covariates on the subset
    kept_cov <- setdiff(have, y)
    kept_cov <- kept_cov[vapply(kept_cov, function(v) var_is_testable(df_sub, v), logical(1))]

    # build distance and design on the same ids
    ord_sub <- as.dist(as.matrix(ord)[ids, ids, drop = FALSE])
    df_sub[[paste0(y,"_z")]] <- as.numeric(scale(df_sub[[y]]))

    rhs <- paste(c(glue::glue("`{y}_z`"), paste0("`", kept_cov, "`")), collapse = " + ")
    fml <- as.formula(glue::glue("ord_sub ~ {rhs}"))

    # optional blocking
    strata_vec <- choose_strata(df_sub)

    set.seed(202501)
    fit <- vegan::adonis2(
      fml, data = df_sub, permutations = perms, by = "margin",
      strata = strata_vec
    )
    td <- broom::tidy(fit) %>% dplyr::mutate(term_clean = gsub("`","",term))
    p_col <- get_pcol(names(td))

    row_lung <- td %>% dplyr::filter(term_clean == paste0(y,"_z")) %>% dplyr::slice_tail(n = 1)

    out[[length(out)+1]] <- tibble::tibble(
      dataset = dataset_name, niche = niche, outcome = y, n_used = length(ids),
      R2_lung = row_lung$R2 %||% NA_real_,  F_lung = row_lung$statistic %||% NA_real_, p_lung = row_lung[[p_col]] %||% NA_real_,
      covars_used = paste(kept_cov, collapse = ",")
    )
  }

  dplyr::bind_rows(out)
}

empty_schema <- tibble::tibble(
  dataset    = character(),
  niche      = character(),
  outcome    = character(),
  n_used     = integer(),
  R2_lung    = double(), F_lung = double(), p_lung = double(),
  covars_used = character()
)

# Provide your phyloseq objects here:
datasets <- list(
  list(ps = ps_vgo3_np_filtered, name = "VGO3_NP", niche = "NP"),
  list(ps = ps_vgo3_op_filtered, name = "VGO3_OP", niche = "OP")
)

multi_list <- purrr::map(datasets, function(d) {
  res <- try(run_multi_one(d$ps, d$name, d$niche), silent = TRUE)
  if (inherits(res, "try-error") || is.null(res)) return(empty_schema)
  if (!is.data.frame(res) || ncol(res) == 0)     return(empty_schema)
  res
})
multi_raw <- dplyr::bind_rows(multi_list)

if (!nrow(multi_raw)) {
  readr::write_csv(multi_raw, file.path(out_dir_main, "Multivar_PERMANOVA_results.csv"))
} else {
  multi_main <- multi_raw %>%
    dplyr::group_by(dataset) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(q_lung = p.adjust(p_lung, method = "BH")) %>%
    dplyr::ungroup() %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      outcome_lab = dplyr::recode(outcome, !!!pretty_outcomes, .default = outcome),
      outcome_f   = factor(outcome_lab, levels = rev(desired_outcome_order)),
      niche_f     = factor(niche, levels = c("NP","OP")),
      fill_q      = factor(dplyr::if_else(!is.na(q_lung) & q_lung <= q_lung_sig_thresh, "q \u2264 0.25", "ns"),
                           levels = c("ns","q \u2264 0.25")),
      stars_q     = dplyr::case_when(
        is.na(q_lung)  ~ "",
        q_lung <= 0.05 ~ "***",
        q_lung <= 0.10 ~ "**",
        q_lung <= 0.25 ~ "*",
        TRUE           ~ ""
      ),
      label_inside = stars_q   # no dagger here
    )

  readr::write_csv(multi_main, file.path(out_dir_main, "Multivar_PERMANOVA_results.csv"))

  xlim_all <- nice_ceiling(max(multi_main$R2_lung, na.rm = TRUE) * 1.05)
  stars_legend_df <- tibble::tibble(stars_level = factor(c("*","**","***"), levels = c("*","**","***")), x = 0, y = 0)

  p_multi_main <- ggplot2::ggplot(multi_main, aes(x = R2_lung * 100, y = outcome_f, fill = fill_q)) +
    ggplot2::geom_col(width = 0.7) +
    ggplot2::geom_text(
      data = dplyr::filter(multi_main, label_inside != ""),
      aes(x = pmax((R2_lung * 100) / 2, 0.1), y = outcome_f, label = label_inside),
      inherit.aes = FALSE, color = "white", fontface = "bold", size = 3.2, vjust = 0.6
    ) +
    ggplot2::facet_grid(cols = vars(niche_f), scales = "free_y", space = "free_y", drop = FALSE) +
    ggplot2::scale_x_continuous(
      limits = c(0, xlim_all * 100),
      breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 5),
      labels = scales::label_number(accuracy = 0.1),
      expand = ggplot2::expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05))
    ) +
    ggplot2::scale_fill_manual(
      values = c("ns" = "grey30", "q \u2264 0.25" = "#F28E2B"),
      labels = c("Non significant", "Significant (q \u2264 0.25)"),
      name   = NULL
    ) +
    ggplot2::labs(
      x = "Explained variance (% R\u00B2)", y = NULL
    ) +
    ggplot2::theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
    ggplot2::theme(
      panel.grid.major.y = ggplot2::element_blank(),
      panel.grid.minor   = ggplot2::element_blank(),
      strip.text         = ggplot2::element_text(face = "bold"),
      axis.text.y        = ggplot2::element_text(size = 9),
      plot.title         = ggplot2::element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0),
      plot.margin        = ggplot2::margin(t = 4, r = 8, b = 4, l = 4)
    ) +
    ggplot2::geom_point(
      data = stars_legend_df,
      aes(x = x, y = y, shape = stars_level),
      inherit.aes = FALSE, alpha = 0, size = 0, show.legend = TRUE
    ) +
    ggplot2::scale_shape_manual(
      values = c("*" = 16, "**" = 16, "***" = 16),
      labels = c("*" = "* q \u2264 0.25","**" = "** q \u2264 0.10","***" = "*** q \u2264 0.05"),
      name   = "Significance"
    ) +
    ggplot2::guides(fill = ggplot2::guide_legend(order = 1), shape = ggplot2::guide_legend(order = 2)) +
    ggplot2::coord_cartesian(clip = "off")

  ggplot2::ggsave(file.path(out_dir_main, "Multivar_PERMANOVA_results_barplot.svg"),
                  p_multi_main, width = 5, height = 3)
}

```



## Stratified
### Univariable
```{r}
# Stratified Univariable PERMANOVAs by RespDx (existing)
variables_common <- c(
  "Age","Gender","BMI","season_microbiome_sampling","Education_level",
  "Smoking_status","Asthma_ever","Covid_lastmonth","Atopic","Cortinhal_lastyr",
  "Pneumonia_lastyr","Antibiotics_lastmonth","Antibiotics_lastyr","Farm_childhood",
  "T1_wkprior_NH3","FEV1_pred","FVC_pred","FEV1FVC_pred","MMEF_pred"
)
phenotype_components <- c("Asthma_current","COPD_emphy_doc_diag")  # drop these within strata

stratum_levels <- c("No respiratory diagnosis","Respiratory diagnosis")
min_overlap <- 3L
min_stratum_n <- 5L

# Helpers (as in non-stratified)
samples_as_rows <- function(ps) { M <- as(otu_table(ps), "matrix"); if (taxa_are_rows(ps)) M <- t(M); rownames(M) <- sample_names(ps); rownames(M) <- trimws(rownames(M)); mode(M)<-"numeric"; M }
preprocess_dataset <- function(df) {
  # Coerce & ensure RespDx
  for (v in c("Age","BMI","T1_wkprior_NH3","FEV1_pred","FVC_pred","FEV1FVC_pred","MMEF_pred"))
    if (v %in% names(df)) df[[v]] <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(df[[v]])))
  for (v in c("Gender","Smoking_status","Education_level","season_microbiome_sampling","RespDx"))
    if (v %in% names(df)) df[[v]] <- as.factor(df[[v]])
  if (!"RespDx" %in% names(df)) stop("RespDx not found in metadata.")
  df$RespDx <- factor(tolower(as.character(df$RespDx)), levels = c("no","yes"))
  df
}
prep_meta_from_ps <- function(ps, preprocess_fn) {
  meta_raw <- as(sample_data(ps), "data.frame")
  meta_raw$sample_id <- sample_names(ps); rownames(meta_raw) <- meta_raw$sample_id
  meta <- preprocess_fn(meta_raw); meta <- as.data.frame(meta)
  if (!"sample_id" %in% names(meta)) {
    if (!is.null(rownames(meta))) meta$sample_id <- rownames(meta) else stop("Lost sample IDs.")
  }
  meta$sample_id <- trimws(as.character(meta$sample_id)); rownames(meta) <- meta$sample_id; meta
}
align_and_bray <- function(otu_mat, meta_df, min_overlap = 3L) {
  rn_otu  <- trimws(rownames(otu_mat)); rn_meta <- trimws(rownames(meta_df)); common  <- intersect(rn_otu, rn_meta)
  if (length(common) < min_overlap) stop(sprintf("Fewer than %d overlapping samples.", min_overlap))
  list(bray_mat = as.matrix(vegan::vegdist(otu_mat[common,,drop=FALSE], method="bray")),
       meta     = meta_df[common,,drop=FALSE])
}
var_is_testable <- function(df, var, min_n = 3L) {
  x <- df[[var]]; if (is.null(x)) return(FALSE); x <- x[!is.na(x)]; if (length(x) < min_n) return(FALSE)
  if (is.numeric(x)) return(stats::sd(x) > 0)
  if (is.factor(x) || is.character(x)) { tab <- table(x); return(length(tab) >= 2L && all(tab >= 2L)) }
  FALSE
}
beta_df <- function(dist_mat, meta, var) {
  m_sub <- meta[!is.na(meta[[var]]), , drop = FALSE]
  if (!"sample_id" %in% names(m_sub)) m_sub$sample_id <- rownames(m_sub)
  ids <- intersect(rownames(dist_mat), m_sub$sample_id)
  if (length(ids) < 3L) return(list(ord_sub = NULL, m_sub = NULL, ids = character(0)))
  list(ord_sub = as.dist(dist_mat[ids, ids, drop = FALSE]),
       m_sub   = m_sub[match(ids, m_sub$sample_id), , drop = FALSE],
       ids     = ids)
}
do_permanova <- function(ord, meta, var) {
  fit <- vegan::adonis2(as.formula(glue::glue("ord ~ {var}")), permutations = 999, data = meta)
  broom::tidy(fit) |> dplyr::filter(!term %in% c("Residual","Total"))
}
check_dispersion <- function(dist_matrix, meta, var) {
  sub_meta <- meta[!is.na(meta[[var]]), , drop = FALSE]
  if (!"sample_id" %in% names(sub_meta)) sub_meta$sample_id <- rownames(sub_meta)
  ids <- intersect(rownames(dist_matrix), sub_meta$sample_id)
  if (length(ids) < 3L)
    return(tibble::tibble(disp_p = NA_real_, disp_note = "Skipped: <3 overlapping samples"))
  d <- as.dist(dist_matrix[ids, ids, drop = FALSE]); sub_meta <- sub_meta[match(ids, sub_meta$sample_id), , drop = FALSE]
  x <- sub_meta[[var]]
  if (is.factor(x) || is.character(x)) {
    x <- as.factor(x); tab <- table(x)
    if (length(tab) < 2L || any(tab < 2L))
      return(tibble::tibble(disp_p = NA_real_, disp_note = "Skipped: <2 groups with ≥2 samples"))
    model <- vegan::betadisper(d, x); perm <- vegan::permutest(model)
    tibble::tibble(disp_p = perm$tab[1, "Pr(>F)"], disp_note = NA_character_)
  } else {
    dm <- as.matrix(d); dist_avg <- rowMeans(dm, na.rm = TRUE)
    p <- summary(lm(dist_avg ~ x))$coefficients[2, 4]
    tibble::tibble(disp_p = p, disp_note = NA_character_)
  }
}
sig_lab <- function(p) dplyr::case_when(is.na(p) ~ NA_character_, p < 0.001 ~ "***", p < 0.01 ~ "**", p < 0.05 ~ "*", TRUE ~ "")

run_dataset <- function(ps, dataset_name, niche, preprocess_fn = preprocess_dataset) {
  otu  <- samples_as_rows(ps)
  meta <- prep_meta_from_ps(ps, preprocess_fn)

  # Map RespDx -> two human-readable levels
  if (!"RespDx" %in% names(meta)) stop("RespDx not found.")
  meta$RespDx <- factor(tolower(as.character(meta$RespDx)), levels = c("no","yes"))
  meta$RespDx_stratum <- factor(ifelse(meta$RespDx == "yes", "Respiratory diagnosis", "No respiratory diagnosis"),
                                levels = stratum_levels)

  aligned <- align_and_bray(otu, meta, min_overlap = min_overlap)
  bray <- aligned$bray_mat
  meta <- aligned$meta

  message(sprintf("[%s] overlap after alignment: %d samples", dataset_name, nrow(meta)))

  out <- list()
  for (level in stratum_levels) {
    meta_s <- dplyr::filter(meta, RespDx_stratum == level)
    if (nrow(meta_s) < min_stratum_n) next

    test_vars <- setdiff(intersect(variables_common, names(meta_s)), phenotype_components)
    testable  <- purrr::keep(test_vars, ~ var_is_testable(meta_s, .x, min_n = 3L))
    if (!length(testable)) next

    out[[level]] <- purrr::map_dfr(testable, function(v) {
      parts <- beta_df(bray, meta_s, v)
      if (is.null(parts$ord_sub) || is.null(parts$m_sub) || !var_is_testable(parts$m_sub, v, 3L)) {
        return(tibble::tibble(term = v, sumsq = NA_real_, R2 = NA_real_, F = NA_real_, p.value = NA_real_,
                      n_used = ifelse(is.null(parts$ord_sub), 0L, length(attr(parts$ord_sub, "Labels"))),
                      variable = v, dataset = dataset_name, niche = niche, stratum = level,
                      disp_p = NA_real_, disp_note = "Skipped: insufficient data"))
      }
      fit  <- do_permanova(parts$ord_sub, parts$m_sub, v)
      disp <- check_dispersion(bray, meta_s, v)
      tibble::tibble(term = fit$term, sumsq = fit$sumsq, R2 = fit$R2, F = fit$statistic, p.value = fit$p.value,
             n_used = length(parts$ids), variable = v, dataset = dataset_name, niche = niche, stratum = level) |>
        dplyr::bind_cols(disp)
    })
  }

  results <- dplyr::bind_rows(out)

  counts <- meta |>
    dplyr::count(RespDx_stratum, name = "n_in_stratum") |>
    dplyr::mutate(dataset = dataset_name, niche = niche) |>
    dplyr::rename(stratum = RespDx_stratum) |>
    dplyr::mutate(niche_stratum_lab = paste0(niche, " (n=", n_in_stratum, ")"),
                  stratum_lab_xlsx  = paste0(stratum, " (n=", n_in_stratum, ")"))

  list(results = results, counts = counts)
}

datasets <- list(
  list(ps = ps_vgo3_np_filtered, name = "VGO3_NP", niche = "NP"),
  list(ps = ps_vgo3_op_filtered, name = "VGO3_OP", niche = "OP")
)

run_list   <- purrr::map(datasets, ~ run_dataset(ps = .x$ps, dataset_name = .x$name, niche = .x$niche))
perm_strat <- dplyr::bind_rows(purrr::map(run_list, "results"))
counts     <- dplyr::bind_rows(purrr::map(run_list, "counts"))

perm_strat <- perm_strat |>
  dplyr::group_by(dataset, stratum) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    q.value = p.adjust(p.value, method = "BH"),
    label_p = sig_lab(p.value),
    label_q = sig_lab(q.value)
  ) |>
  dplyr::ungroup() |>
  dplyr::left_join(counts, by = c("dataset","stratum","niche")) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    niche_stratum_lab = factor(
      niche_stratum_lab,
      levels = counts |> dplyr::arrange(match(stratum, stratum_levels), match(niche, c("NP","OP"))) |> dplyr::pull(niche_stratum_lab) |> unique()
    )
  )

out_dir <- "../Output/Cross_sectional/Beta_diversity/Univariable/Stratified"
dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
readr::write_csv(perm_strat, file.path(out_dir, "Univariable_PERMANOVAs_stratified.csv"))

# Plot (same as before)
pretty_labels_beta <- c(
  "Age"="Age","Gender"="Gender (Female vs Male)","BMI"="Body Mass Index",
  "season_microbiome_sampling"="Season of sampling","Education_level"="Education level",
  "Smoking_status"="Smoking status","Asthma_current"="Current asthma","Asthma_ever"="Asthma ever",
  "COPD_emphy_doc_diag"="COPD/emphysema (doctor diagnosed)","Covid_lastmonth"="COVID-19 in last month",
  "Atopic"="Atopic","Cortinhal_lastyr"="Corticosteroid inhaler (last year)",
  "Pneumonia_lastyr"="Pneumonia in last year","Antibiotics_lastmonth"="Antibiotics last month",
  "Antibiotics_lastyr"="Antibiotics last year","Farm_childhood"="Grew up on a farm",
  "T1_wkprior_NH3"="NH3 week prior to sampling",
  "FEV1_pred"="FEV1 % predicted","FVC_pred"="FVC % predicted",
  "FEV1FVC_pred"="FEV1/FVC % predicted","MMEF_pred"="MMEF % predicted"
)

desired_order_beta <- c(
  "Age","Gender (Female vs Male)","Body Mass Index","Season of sampling","Education level",
  "Smoking status","Current asthma","Asthma ever","Pneumonia in last year",
  "COPD/emphysema (doctor diagnosed)","COVID-19 in last month","Atopic",
  "Corticosteroid inhaler (last year)","Antibiotics last month","Antibiotics last year",
  "Grew up on a farm","NH3 week prior to sampling",
  "FEV1 % predicted","FVC % predicted","FEV1/FVC % predicted","MMEF % predicted"
)

bar_df <- perm_strat %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(R2)) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    term_lab = dplyr::recode(variable, !!!pretty_labels_beta, .default = variable),
    stratum  = factor(stratum, levels = c("No respiratory diagnosis","Respiratory diagnosis")),
    niche    = factor(niche, levels = c("NP","OP")),
    sig      = ifelse(!is.na(p.value) & p.value < 0.05, "p < 0.05", "ns"),
    stars_p  = dplyr::case_when(
      is.na(p.value)  ~ "",
      p.value < 0.001 ~ "***",
      p.value < 0.01  ~ "**",
      p.value < 0.05  ~ "*",
      TRUE            ~ ""
    )
  ) %>%
  dplyr::filter(term_lab %in% desired_order_beta) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(term_f = factor(term_lab, levels = rev(desired_order_beta)))

nice_ceiling <- function(x, step = 0.0025) step * ceiling(x / step)
lim_for <- function(v) { mx <- suppressWarnings(max(v, na.rm = TRUE)); if (!is.finite(mx)) mx <- 0.01; nice_ceiling(mx * 1.05) }
lim_top    <- lim_for(bar_df$R2[bar_df$stratum == "No respiratory diagnosis"])
lim_bottom <- lim_for(bar_df$R2[bar_df$stratum == "Respiratory diagnosis"])

make_panel <- function(df, xlim, panel_title, show_xlabel = FALSE, facet_gap_cm = 1.8, show_legend = TRUE) {
  stars_legend_df <- tibble::tibble(stars_level = factor(c("*","**","***"), levels = c("*","**","***")), x = 0, y = 0)

  g <- ggplot2::ggplot(df, aes(x = R2 * 100, y = term_f, fill = sig)) +
    ggplot2::geom_col(width = 0.7) +
    ggplot2::geom_text(
      data = dplyr::filter(df, sig == "p < 0.05" & stars_p != ""),
      aes(x = (R2 * 100) / 2, y = term_f, label = stars_p),
      color = "white", fontface = "bold", size = 3.2, vjust = 0.75
    ) +
    ggplot2::facet_grid(cols = vars(niche), scales = "free_y", space = "free_y", drop = FALSE) +
    ggplot2::scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, xlim * 100), breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 5),
                                labels = scales::label_number(accuracy = 0.1), expand = ggplot2::expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05))) +
    ggplot2::scale_fill_manual(values = c("p < 0.05" = "#F28E2B", "ns" = "grey30"),
                               breaks = c("ns","p < 0.05"),
                               labels = c("Non significant", "Significant (p < 0.05)"),
                               name   = NULL) +
    ggplot2::labs(title = panel_title, x = if (show_xlabel) "Explained variance (% R\u00B2)" else NULL, y = NULL) +
    ggplot2::theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
    ggplot2::theme(panel.grid.major.y = ggplot2::element_blank(),
                   panel.grid.minor   = ggplot2::element_blank(),
                   strip.text         = ggplot2::element_text(face = "bold"),
                   axis.text.y        = ggplot2::element_text(size = 9),
                   plot.title         = ggplot2::element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0),
                   plot.margin        = ggplot2::margin(t = 4, r = 8, b = 4, l = 4),
                   panel.spacing.x    = grid::unit(facet_gap_cm, "cm")) +
    ggplot2::geom_point(data = stars_legend_df, aes(x = x, y = y, shape = stars_level),
                        inherit.aes = FALSE, alpha = 0, size = 0, show.legend = TRUE) +
    ggplot2::scale_shape_manual(values = c("*" = 16, "**" = 16, "***" = 16),
                                labels = c("*" = "* p < 0.05","**" = "** p < 0.01","***" = "*** p < 0.001"),
                                name   = "Significance") +
    ggplot2::guides(fill = ggplot2::guide_legend(order = 1), shape = ggplot2::guide_legend(order = 2)) +
    ggplot2::coord_cartesian(clip = "off")
```
