```{r}
  if (!show_legend) g <- g + ggplot2::guides(fill = "none", shape = "none")
  g
}

p_top <- make_panel(dplyr::filter(bar_df, stratum == "No respiratory diagnosis"), lim_top, "No respiratory diagnosis", FALSE, 1.8, FALSE)
p_bot <- make_panel(dplyr::filter(bar_df, stratum == "Respiratory diagnosis"),   lim_bottom, "Respiratory diagnosis", TRUE,  1.8, TRUE)

p_beta_bars <- (p_top / p_bot) +
  patchwork::plot_layout(guides = "collect") +
  patchwork::plot_annotation(title = "Univariable PERMANOVAs (Bray–Curtis) — Explained variance by predictor") +
  ggplot2::theme(legend.position = "right")

ggplot2::ggsave(file.path(out_dir, "Univariable_PERMANOVAs_stratified.svg"),
       p_beta_bars, width = 9, height = 6.5)

```


### Multivariable
```{r}
# ============================================
# Stratified Multivariable PERMANOVAs by RespDx (existing)
# ============================================

lung_outcomes <- c("FEV1_pred","FVC_pred","FEV1FVC_pred","MMEF_pred")
covars_adj    <- c("Age","season_microbiome_sampling","Gender","Smoking_status")

stratum_levels <- c("No respiratory diagnosis","Respiratory diagnosis")
min_overlap <- 3L
min_stratum_n <- 5L

# Helpers (reuse from above)
samples_as_rows <- function(ps) { M <- as(otu_table(ps), "matrix"); if (taxa_are_rows(ps)) M <- t(M); rownames(M) <- sample_names(ps); rownames(M) <- trimws(rownames(M)); mode(M)<-"numeric"; M }
preprocess_dataset <- function(df) {
  for (v in c("Age","FEV1_pred","FVC_pred","FEV1FVC_pred","MMEF_pred"))
    if (v %in% names(df)) df[[v]] <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(df[[v]])))
  for (v in c("Gender","Smoking_status","season_microbiome_sampling","RespDx"))
    if (v %in% names(df)) df[[v]] <- as.factor(df[[v]])
  if (!"RespDx" %in% names(df)) stop("RespDx not found.")
  df$RespDx <- factor(tolower(as.character(df$RespDx)), levels = c("no","yes"))
  df
}
prep_meta_from_ps <- function(ps, preprocess_fn) {
  meta_raw <- as(sample_data(ps), "data.frame"); meta_raw$sample_id <- sample_names(ps); rownames(meta_raw) <- meta_raw$sample_id
  meta <- preprocess_fn(meta_raw); meta <- as.data.frame(meta)
  if (!"sample_id" %in% names(meta)) { if (!is.null(rownames(meta))) meta$sample_id <- rownames(meta) else stop("Lost sample IDs.") }
  meta$sample_id <- trimws(as.character(meta$sample_id)); rownames(meta) <- meta$sample_id; meta
}
align_and_bray <- function(otu_mat, meta_df, min_overlap = 3L) {
  rn_otu  <- trimws(rownames(otu_mat)); rn_meta <- trimws(rownames(meta_df)); common  <- intersect(rn_otu, rn_meta)
  if (length(common) < min_overlap) stop(sprintf("Fewer than %d overlapping samples.", min_overlap))
  list(bray_mat = as.matrix(vegan::vegdist(otu_mat[common,,drop=FALSE], method="bray")),
       meta     = meta_df[common,,drop=FALSE])
}
covar_usable <- function(df, v) {
  x <- df[[v]]
  if (is.null(x)) return(FALSE)
  if (is.numeric(x)) return(stats::sd(x, na.rm = TRUE) > 0)
  if (is.factor(x))  return(nlevels(droplevels(x)) >= 2)
  FALSE
}

coerce_for_model <- function(df, outcome) {
  df %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      dplyr::across(all_of(c(outcome, "Age")), ~ suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(.)))),
      dplyr::across(all_of(c("Gender","Smoking_status","season_microbiome_sampling")), ~ as.factor(.))
    )
}

run_dataset_multi <- function(ps, dataset_name, niche, preprocess_fn = preprocess_dataset) {
  otu  <- samples_as_rows(ps)
  meta <- prep_meta_from_ps(ps, preprocess_fn)

  # Stratum from existing RespDx
  meta$RespDx_stratum <- factor(ifelse(meta$RespDx == "yes","Respiratory diagnosis","No respiratory diagnosis"),
                                levels = stratum_levels)

  aligned <- align_and_bray(otu, meta, min_overlap = min_overlap)
  bray <- aligned$bray_mat
  meta <- aligned$meta

  message(sprintf("[MULTI %s] overlap after alignment: %d samples", dataset_name, nrow(meta)))

  out <- list()
  for (level in stratum_levels) {
    meta_s <- meta %>% dplyr::filter(RespDx_stratum == level)
    if (nrow(meta_s) < min_stratum_n) next

    for (y in lung_outcomes) {
      need <- intersect(c(y, covars_adj), names(meta_s))
      if (!length(need)) next

      m0 <- meta_s %>% dplyr::filter(dplyr::if_all(dplyr::all_of(need), ~ !is.na(.)))
      if (nrow(m0) < 3) {
        out[[length(out)+1]] <- tibble::tibble(term = y, R2 = NA_real_, p.value = NA_real_, statistic = NA_real_,
                                       n_used = nrow(m0), variable = y, dataset = dataset_name,
                                       niche = niche, stratum = level)
        next
      }
      m1 <- coerce_for_model(m0, y)

      kept_covars <- purrr::keep(covars_adj, ~ covar_usable(m1, .x))
      if (!covar_usable(m1, y)) {
        out[[length(out)+1]] <- tibble::tibble(term = y, R2 = NA_real_, p.value = NA_real_, statistic = NA_real_,
                                       n_used = nrow(m1), variable = y, dataset = dataset_name,
                                       niche = niche, stratum = level)
        next
      }

      ids <- intersect(rownames(bray), rownames(m1))
      if (length(ids) < 3) {
        out[[length(out)+1]] <- tibble::tibble(term = y, R2 = NA_real_, p.value = NA_real_, statistic = NA_real_,
                                       n_used = length(ids), variable = y, dataset = dataset_name,
                                       niche = niche, stratum = level)
        next
      }
      m1   <- m1[ids, , drop = FALSE]
      ord  <- as.dist(bray[ids, ids, drop = FALSE])

      rhs <- paste(c(glue::glue("`{y}`"), paste0("`", kept_covars, "`")), collapse = " + ")
      fml <- as.formula(glue::glue("ord ~ {rhs}"))

      fit  <- vegan::adonis2(fml, data = m1, permutations = 999, by = "margin")
      td   <- broom::tidy(fit); td$term_clean <- gsub("`", "", td$term)
      row_y <- td %>% dplyr::filter(term_clean == y)

      if (nrow(row_y) == 0) {
        out[[length(out)+1]] <- tibble::tibble(term = y, R2 = NA_real_, p.value = NA_real_, statistic = NA_real_,
                                       n_used = length(ids), variable = y, dataset = dataset_name,
                                       niche = niche, stratum = level)
      } else {
        out[[length(out)+1]] <- tibble::tibble(term = y,
                                       R2 = row_y$R2[1],
                                       p.value = row_y$p.value[1],
                                       statistic = row_y$statistic[1],
                                       n_used = length(ids),
                                       variable = y, dataset = dataset_name,
                                       niche = niche, stratum = level)
      }
    }
  }

  dplyr::bind_rows(out)
}

datasets <- list(
  list(ps = ps_vgo3_np_filtered, name = "VGO3_NP", niche = "NP"),
  list(ps = ps_vgo3_op_filtered, name = "VGO3_OP", niche = "OP")
)

multi_strat <- purrr::map_dfr(datasets, ~ run_dataset_multi(.x$ps, .x$name, .x$niche))

multi_strat <- multi_strat %>%
  dplyr::group_by(dataset, stratum) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    q.value = p.adjust(p.value, method = "BH"),
    sig_q   = dplyr::if_else(!is.na(q.value) & q.value <= 0.25, "q <= 0.25", "ns"),
    label_q = dplyr::case_when(
      is.na(q.value)    ~ "",
      q.value <= 0.05   ~ "***",
      q.value <= 0.10   ~ "**",
      q.value <= 0.25   ~ "*",
      TRUE              ~ ""
    )
  ) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup()

out_dir_multi <- "../Output/Cross_sectional/Beta_diversity/Multivariable/Stratified"
dir.create(out_dir_multi, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
readr::write_csv(multi_strat, file.path(out_dir_multi, "Multivariable_PERMANOVAs_stratified.csv"))

pretty_outcomes <- c(
  "FEV1_pred"     = "FEV1 % predicted",
  "FVC_pred"      = "FVC % predicted",
  "FEV1FVC_pred"  = "FEV1/FVC % predicted",
  "MMEF_pred"     = "MMEF % predicted"
)
desired_outcome_order <- c("FEV1 % predicted","FVC % predicted","FEV1/FVC % predicted","MMEF % predicted")

plot_df <- multi_strat %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    outcome_lab = dplyr::recode(variable, !!!pretty_outcomes, .default = variable),
    outcome_f   = factor(outcome_lab, levels = rev(desired_outcome_order)),
    stratum     = factor(stratum, levels = stratum_levels),
    niche       = factor(niche,   levels = c("NP","OP")),
    stars_q = dplyr::case_when(
      is.na(q.value)    ~ "",
      q.value <= 0.05   ~ "***",
      q.value <= 0.10   ~ "**",
      q.value <= 0.25   ~ "*",
      TRUE              ~ ""
    ),
    fill_q = factor(dplyr::if_else(!is.na(q.value) & q.value <= 0.25, "q \u2264 0.25", "ns"),
                    levels = c("ns","q \u2264 0.25"))
  )

nice_ceiling <- function(x, step = 0.0025) step * ceiling(x / step)
lim_top    <- nice_ceiling(max(plot_df$R2[plot_df$stratum == "No respiratory diagnosis"], na.rm = TRUE) * 1.05)
lim_bottom <- nice_ceiling(max(plot_df$R2[plot_df$stratum == "Respiratory diagnosis"],   na.rm = TRUE) * 1.05)

make_panel <- function(df, y_var, xlim, panel_title,
                       show_xlabel = FALSE, facet_gap_cm = 1.8, show_legend = TRUE) {

  stars_legend_df <- tibble::tibble(stars_level = factor(c("*","**","***"), levels = c("*","**","***")), x = 0, y = 0)

  g <- ggplot2::ggplot(df, aes(x = R2 * 100, y = !!rlang::ensym(y_var), fill = fill_q)) +
    ggplot2::geom_col(width = 0.7) +
    ggplot2::geom_text(
      data = dplyr::filter(df, stars_q != ""),
      aes(x = pmax((R2 * 100) / 2, 0.1), y = !!rlang::ensym(y_var), label = stars_q),
      inherit.aes = FALSE, color = "white", fontface = "bold",
      size = 3.2, vjust = 0.6
    ) +
    ggplot2::facet_grid(cols = vars(niche), scales = "free_y", space = "free_y", drop = FALSE) +
    ggplot2::scale_x_continuous(
      limits = c(0, xlim * 100),
      breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 5),
      labels = scales::label_number(accuracy = 0.1),
      expand = ggplot2::expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05))
    ) +
    ggplot2::scale_fill_manual(
      values = c("ns" = "grey30", "q \u2264 0.25" = "#F28E2B"),
      breaks = c("ns","q \u2264 0.25"),
      labels = c("Non significant", "Significant (q \u2264 0.25)"),
      name   = NULL
    ) +
    ggplot2::labs(
      title = panel_title,
      x = if (show_xlabel) "Explained variance (% R\u00B2)" else NULL,
      y = NULL
    ) +
    ggplot2::theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
    ggplot2::theme(
      panel.grid.major.y = ggplot2::element_blank(),
      panel.grid.minor   = ggplot2::element_blank(),
      strip.text         = ggplot2::element_text(face = "bold"),
      axis.text.y        = ggplot2::element_text(size = 9),
      plot.title         = ggplot2::element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0),
      plot.margin        = ggplot2::margin(t = 4, r = 8, b = 4, l = 4),
      panel.spacing.x    = grid::unit(facet_gap_cm, "cm")
    ) +
    ggplot2::geom_point(
      data = stars_legend_df,
      aes(x = x, y = y, shape = stars_level),
      inherit.aes = FALSE, alpha = 0, size = 2, show.legend = TRUE
    ) +
    ggplot2::scale_shape_manual(
      values = c("*" = 16, "**" = 16, "***" = 16),
      labels = c("*" = "* q \u2264 0.25",
                 "**" = "** q \u2264 0.10",
                 "***" = "*** q \u2264 0.05"),
      name   = "Significance"
    ) +
    ggplot2::guides(fill = ggplot2::guide_legend(order = 1), shape = ggplot2::guide_legend(order = 2)) +
    ggplot2::coord_cartesian(clip = "off")

  if (!show_legend) g <- g + ggplot2::guides(fill = "none", shape = "none")
  g
}

p_top <- make_panel(dplyr::filter(plot_df, stratum=="No respiratory diagnosis"),
                    y_var = outcome_f, xlim = lim_top,
                    panel_title = "Non-respiratory diagnosis",
                    show_xlabel = FALSE, show_legend = FALSE)

p_bot <- make_panel(dplyr::filter(plot_df, stratum=="Respiratory diagnosis"),
                    y_var = outcome_f, xlim = lim_bottom,
                    panel_title = "Respiratory diagnosis",
                    show_xlabel = TRUE, show_legend = TRUE)

p_multi_bars <- p_top / p_bot +
  patchwork::plot_layout(heights = c(1, 1)) +
  ggplot2::theme(legend.position = "right") +
  patchwork::plot_annotation(title = "Multivariable PERMANOVAs (Bray–Curtis) — Adjusted lung-function effects")

print(p_multi_bars)
ggplot2::ggsave(file.path(out_dir_multi, "Multivariable_PERMANOVAs_stratified.svg"),
       p_multi_bars, width = 7, height = 5)

```

## PCoAs
```{r}
# helper
`%||%` <- function(a, b) if (!is.null(a)) a else b

make_pretty_pcoa_cat <- function(ps, group_var,
                                 covars = NULL,
                                 group_levels = NULL,
                                 pretty_map = NULL,
                                 colors = NULL,   # <-- pass in call
                                 shapes = NULL,   # <-- optional
                                 title = "PCoA — Bray–Curtis",
                                 legend_title = NULL,
                                 perms = 999, seed = 202501) {

  stopifnot(inherits(ps, "phyloseq"))

  meta <- as(sample_data(ps), "data.frame")
  meta$sample_id <- rownames(meta)

  if (!group_var %in% names(meta)) stop(sprintf("'%s' not in metadata.", group_var))

  # coerce grouping var
  meta[[group_var]] <- as.character(meta[[group_var]])
  if (!is.null(group_levels)) meta[[group_var]][!meta[[group_var]] %in% group_levels] <- NA
  meta[[group_var]] <- factor(meta[[group_var]],
                              levels = group_levels %||% sort(unique(meta[[group_var]])))

  # complete cases for group (+ covars if adjusted)
  needed <- c(group_var, covars)
  meta_cc <- meta %>% tidyr::drop_na(dplyr::all_of(needed))

  ps_cc <- prune_samples(meta_cc$sample_id, ps)
  if (nsamples(ps_cc) < 3) stop("Too few samples after pruning.")

  # distance + align
  dist_bc <- phyloseq::distance(ps_cc, method = "bray")
  ids <- intersect(attr(dist_bc, "Labels"), rownames(meta_cc))
  dist_bc <- as.dist(as.matrix(dist_bc)[ids, ids, drop = FALSE])
  meta_cc <- meta_cc[ids, , drop = FALSE]

  # drop singleton levels
  tab <- table(meta_cc[[group_var]])
  keep_lv <- names(tab)[tab >= 2]
  meta_cc <- meta_cc[meta_cc[[group_var]] %in% keep_lv, , drop = FALSE]
  meta_cc[[group_var]] <- droplevels(meta_cc[[group_var]])
  dist_bc <- as.dist(as.matrix(dist_bc)[rownames(meta_cc), rownames(meta_cc), drop = FALSE])

  if (nlevels(meta_cc[[group_var]]) < 2) stop("Need at least 2 groups.")

  # PERMANOVA
  form <- reformulate(c(group_var, covars), response = "dist_bc")
  set.seed(seed)
  fit <- vegan::adonis2(form, data = meta_cc, permutations = perms, by = "margin")
  aov_tbl <- as.data.frame(fit); aov_tbl$term <- rownames(aov_tbl)

  row_term <- aov_tbl[aov_tbl$term == group_var, , drop = FALSE]
  R2_val <- if (nrow(row_term)) row_term$R2[1] else NA_real_
  p_val  <- if (nrow(row_term)) row_term$`Pr(>F)`[1] else NA_real_

  sig <- dplyr::case_when(
    is.na(p_val)  ~ "",
    p_val < 0.001 ~ "***",
    p_val < 0.01  ~ "**",
    p_val < 0.05  ~ "*",
    TRUE          ~ ""
  )

  lab_str <- sprintf("PERMANOVA%s\n%s: R² = %.3f, p = %.3g %s",
                     ifelse(is.null(covars), " (univariable)", " (adjusted)"),
                     ifelse(is.null(legend_title), group_var, legend_title),
                     R2_val, p_val, sig)

  # PCoA
  pco <- ape::pcoa(dist_bc)
  ax1_var <- round(100 * pco$values$Relative_eig[1], 1)
  ax2_var <- round(100 * pco$values$Relative_eig[2], 1)

  scr <- as.data.frame(pco$vectors[, 1:2, drop = FALSE])
  colnames(scr) <- c("PCoA1","PCoA2")
  scr$sample_id <- rownames(scr)

  df <- dplyr::left_join(scr, meta_cc, by = "sample_id")

  surv_lv <- levels(df[[group_var]])
  if (is.null(pretty_map)) pretty_map <- setNames(surv_lv, surv_lv)

  df$group_plot <- factor(as.character(df[[group_var]]),
                          levels = surv_lv,
                          labels = unname(pretty_map[surv_lv]))

  # colors: use what you pass; otherwise default ggplot hues
  if (is.null(colors)) {
    colors <- setNames(scales::hue_pal()(length(surv_lv)), surv_lv)
  } else {
    # allow unnamed vector; assume order matches levels
    if (is.null(names(colors))) colors <- setNames(colors, surv_lv)
  }

  # shapes: binary gets circle/triangle; multi-level all circles unless you pass shapes
  if (is.null(shapes)) {
    if (length(surv_lv) == 2) shapes <- setNames(c(16,17), surv_lv)
    else shapes <- setNames(rep(16, length(surv_lv)), surv_lv)
  } else {
    if (is.null(names(shapes))) shapes <- setNames(shapes, surv_lv)
  }

  # ellipses only if >=3 per group
  cnt <- table(df$group_plot)
  can_ell <- length(cnt) > 1 && all(cnt >= 3)

  p <- ggplot(df, aes(PCoA1, PCoA2,
                      color = .data[[group_var]],
                      shape = .data[[group_var]])) +
    geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.7) +
    scale_color_manual(values = colors, aesthetics = "colour") +
    scale_fill_manual(values  = colors, aesthetics = "fill") +
    scale_shape_manual(values = shapes) +
    { if (can_ell)
      stat_ellipse(aes(fill = .data[[group_var]], color = .data[[group_var]]),
                   type = "t", level = 0.95, size = 1,
                   geom = "polygon", alpha = 0.1,
                   show.legend = FALSE)
    } +
    labs(
      title = title,
      x = paste0("PCoA1 (", ax1_var, "%)"),
      y = paste0("PCoA2 (", ax2_var, "%)"),
      color = ifelse(is.null(legend_title), group_var, legend_title)
    ) +
    annotate("text", x = Inf, y = -Inf, label = lab_str,
             hjust = 1.05, vjust = -0.2, size = 4, color = "black") +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 0.8),
      legend.position = "right"
    ) +
    guides(
      fill  = "none",
      shape = "none",
      color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(
        shape = unname(shapes[surv_lv]),
        linetype = 0, fill = NA, alpha = 1, size = 3
      ))
    )

  attr(p, "permanova") <- fit
  return(p)
}




out_dir <- "../Output/Cross_sectional/Beta_diversity/Ordinations"

# FEV1/FVC category (univariable) — choose colours here
FEV1FVC_PCoA_NP <- make_pretty_pcoa_cat(
  ps           = ps_vgo3_np_filtered,
  group_var    = "FEV1FVC_category",
  group_levels = c("Normal","Obstructive"),
  colors       = c("Normal"="#80AFC2", "Obstructive"="#C29380"),
  title        = "PCoA — Bray–Curtis (VGO3 NP, FEV1/FVC category)",
  legend_title = "FEV1/FVC category"
)

FEV1FVC_PCoA_OP <- make_pretty_pcoa_cat(
  ps           = ps_vgo3_op_filtered,
  group_var    = "FEV1FVC_category",
  group_levels = c("Normal","Obstructive"),
  colors       = c("Normal"="#80AFC2", "Obstructive"="#C29380"),
  title        = "PCoA — Bray–Curtis (VGO3 OP, FEV1/FVC category)",
  legend_title = "FEV1/FVC category"
)

ggsave(file.path(out_dir, "FEV1FVC_category_PCoA_NP.svg"), FEV1FVC_PCoA_NP, width=7, height=5)
ggsave(file.path(out_dir, "FEV1FVC_category_PCoA_OP.svg"), FEV1FVC_PCoA_OP, width=7, height=5)


# RespDx (univariable) — colours here
RespDx_PCoA_NP <- make_pretty_pcoa_cat(
  ps           = ps_vgo3_np_filtered,
  group_var    = "RespDx",
  group_levels = c("no","yes"),
  pretty_map   = c("no"="No respiratory diagnosis", "yes"="Respiratory diagnosis"),
  colors       = c("no"="#80C293", "yes"="#9380C2"),
  title        = "PCoA — Bray–Curtis (VGO3 NP, Respiratory diagnosis)",
  legend_title = "Respiratory diagnosis"
)

RespDx_PCoA_OP <- make_pretty_pcoa_cat(
  ps           = ps_vgo3_op_filtered,
  group_var    = "RespDx",
  group_levels = c("no","yes"),
  pretty_map   = c("no"="No respiratory diagnosis", "yes"="Respiratory diagnosis"),
  colors       = c("no"="#80C293", "yes"="#9380C2"),
  title        = "PCoA — Bray–Curtis (VGO3 OP, Respiratory diagnosis)",
  legend_title = "Respiratory diagnosis"
)

ggsave(file.path(out_dir, "RespDx_PCoA_NP.svg"), RespDx_PCoA_NP, width=7, height=5)
ggsave(file.path(out_dir, "RespDx_PCoA_OP.svg"), RespDx_PCoA_OP, width=7, height=5)


# Smoking status (>2 levels) — set any palette you want here
Smoking_PCoA_NP <- make_pretty_pcoa_cat(
  ps           = ps_vgo3_np_filtered,
  group_var    = "Smoking_status",
  colors       = c("#d1663a","#F3D6A5","#9ABAA1"),  # <- change whenever
  title        = "PCoA — Bray–Curtis (VGO3 NP, Smoking status)",
  legend_title = "Smoking status"
)

Smoking_PCoA_OP <- make_pretty_pcoa_cat(
  ps           = ps_vgo3_op_filtered,
  group_var    = "Smoking_status",
  colors       = c("#d1663a","#F3D6A5","#9ABAA1"),  # same order as levels
  title        = "PCoA — Bray–Curtis (VGO3 OP, Smoking status)",
  legend_title = "Smoking status"
)

ggsave(file.path(out_dir, "Smoking_PCoA_NP.svg"), Smoking_PCoA_NP, width=7, height=5)
ggsave(file.path(out_dir, "Smoking_PCoA_OP.svg"), Smoking_PCoA_OP, width=7, height=5)  


# Grew up on farm (binary) — colours here

  ps           = ps_vgo3_np_filtered,
  group_var    = farm_var_np,
  group_levels = c("no","yes"),

)

Farmchild_PCoA_OP <- make_pretty_pcoa_cat(

  group_var    = farm_var_op,
  group_levels = c("no","yes"),

  colors       = c("no"="#e3b48b", "yes"="#138F70"),
  title        = "PCoA — Bray–Curtis (VGO3 OP, Grew up on farm)",
  legend_title = "Grew up on farm"
)
```
