```{r}
# Niche - NP vs OP
OPvsNP_PCoA <- make_pretty_pcoa_cat(
  ps           = ps_vgo3_npop_filtered,
  group_var    = "niche",
  colors       = c("#7987AF","#7c674d"), 
  title        = "PCoA — Niche (VGO3 NP vs OP)",
  legend_title = "Niche (OP vs NP)"
)

ggsave(file.path(out_dir, "Niche_OPvsNP_PCoA2.svg"), OPvsNP_PCoA, width=7, height=5)

```
# DA analysis
## Data processing
```{r}
# These ps objects are already filtered and converted to RA
ps_vgo3_np_filtered
ps_vgo3_op_filtered

# Quick counts
length(unique(as.data.frame(tax_table(ps_vgo3_np_filtered))$ASV))
length(unique(as.data.frame(tax_table(ps_vgo3_np_filtered))$Genus))
length(unique(as.data.frame(tax_table(ps_vgo3_op_filtered))$ASV))
length(unique(as.data.frame(tax_table(ps_vgo3_op_filtered))$Genus))

# Compute BC dissimilarity (optional diagnostics)
otu_vgo3_np <- as.data.frame(otu_table(ps_vgo3_np_filtered)) %>% t()
otu_vgo3_op <- as.data.frame(otu_table(ps_vgo3_op_filtered)) %>% t()
ord_vgo3_np <- vegdist(otu_vgo3_np, method = "bray")
ord_vgo3_op <- vegdist(otu_vgo3_op, method = "bray")
mean(ord_vgo3_np); mean(ord_vgo3_op)
```

## Convert to absolute abundances
```{r}
## Convert ASV RA -> "absolute" abundance via qPCR 
#### VGO3 NP ####
vgo3_np_otu  <- otu_tab_to_df(ps_vgo3_np_filtered) # has 'sample_id'
vgo3_np_meta <- meta_to_df(ps_vgo3_np_filtered, sample_name = "sample_id")

vgo3_np_otu <- vgo3_np_otu %>%
  dplyr::left_join(vgo3_np_meta[, c("sample_id","qPCR")], by = "sample_id") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(dplyr::across(-c(sample_id, qPCR), ~ .x * qPCR)) %>%
  dplyr::select(-qPCR) %>%
  as.data.frame()

rownames(vgo3_np_otu) <- vgo3_np_otu$sample_id
vgo3_np_otu <- vgo3_np_otu[,-1] %>% t() %>% as.data.frame()

vgo3_np_ps_abs <- phyloseq(
  otu_table(vgo3_np_otu, taxa_are_rows = TRUE),
  tax_table(ps_vgo3_np_filtered),
  sample_data(ps_vgo3_np_filtered)
)

#### VGO3 OP ####
vgo3_op_otu  <- otu_tab_to_df(ps_vgo3_op_filtered)
vgo3_op_meta <- meta_to_df(ps_vgo3_op_filtered, sample_name = "sample_id")

vgo3_op_otu <- vgo3_op_otu %>%
  dplyr::left_join(vgo3_op_meta[, c("sample_id","qPCR")], by = "sample_id") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(dplyr::across(-c(sample_id, qPCR), ~ .x * qPCR)) %>%
  dplyr::select(-qPCR) %>%
  as.data.frame()

rownames(vgo3_op_otu) <- vgo3_op_otu$sample_id
vgo3_op_otu <- vgo3_op_otu[,-1] %>% t() %>% as.data.frame()

vgo3_op_ps_abs <- phyloseq(
  otu_table(vgo3_op_otu, taxa_are_rows = TRUE),
  tax_table(ps_vgo3_op_filtered),
  sample_data(ps_vgo3_op_filtered)
)
```

## Agglomerate to genus level
```{r}
## Agglomerate absolute phyloseqs to Genus level  
set_genus_names <- function(ps) {
  tt <- as(phyloseq::tax_table(ps), "matrix")
  if ("Genus" %in% colnames(tt)) {
    g <- as.character(tt[, "Genus"])
    g[is.na(g) | g == ""] <- paste0("Unclassified_Genus_", seq_len(sum(is.na(g) | g == "")))
    if (any(duplicated(g))) {
      dup <- duplicated(g) | duplicated(g, fromLast = TRUE)
      g[dup] <- paste0(g[dup], "_", ave(seq_along(g[dup]), g[dup], FUN = seq_along))
    }
    taxa_names(ps) <- g
  }
  ps
}

vgo3_np_ps_genus_abs <- vgo3_np_ps_abs %>% tax_glom(taxrank = "Genus") %>% set_genus_names()
vgo3_op_ps_genus_abs <- vgo3_op_ps_abs %>% tax_glom(taxrank = "Genus") %>% set_genus_names()
```

## Additional filtering per dataset 
```{r}
rel_thresh <- 0.005
prev_frac  <- 0.10

# Helper: apply RA-based prevalence filter, return ABS pruned
filter_abs_by_RA_rule <- function(ps_abs, rel_thresh, prev_frac) {
  ps_ra <- phyloseq::transform_sample_counts(ps_abs, function(x) { s <- sum(x); if (s == 0) x else x/s })
  ns <- phyloseq::nsamples(ps_ra)
  need <- ceiling(ns * prev_frac)
  otu <- as(otu_table(ps_ra), "matrix")
  if (!taxa_are_rows(ps_ra)) otu <- t(otu)
  keep_taxa <- rownames(otu)[rowSums(otu >= rel_thresh) >= need]
  phyloseq::prune_taxa(keep_taxa, ps_abs)
}

#### ASV level ####
vgo3_np_ps_abs_filt <- filter_abs_by_RA_rule(vgo3_np_ps_abs, rel_thresh, prev_frac)
vgo3_op_ps_abs_filt <- filter_abs_by_RA_rule(vgo3_op_ps_abs, rel_thresh, prev_frac)

#### Genus level ####
vgo3_np_ps_genus_abs_filt <- filter_abs_by_RA_rule(vgo3_np_ps_genus_abs, rel_thresh, prev_frac)
vgo3_op_ps_genus_abs_filt <- filter_abs_by_RA_rule(vgo3_op_ps_genus_abs, rel_thresh, prev_frac)

# Per-niche lists (names are *niche only*, so folders will be <out_root>/<niche>/{ASV,Genus})
ps_list_DA_ASV <- list(
  VGO3_NP = vgo3_np_ps_abs_filt,
  VGO3_OP = vgo3_op_ps_abs_filt
)
ps_list_DA_genus <- list(
  VGO3_NP = vgo3_np_ps_genus_abs_filt,
  VGO3_OP = vgo3_op_ps_genus_abs_filt
)
```
## Non-stratified analysis
### MaAsLin2 
```{r}
#### Function #### 
# MaAsLin function 
do_maaslin2 <- function(ps, var, other_var, ref = NULL, out_dir = NULL,
                        stratify_by = NULL, strata_levels = NULL,
                        q_cutoff = 0.10, min_n = 10, verbose = TRUE) {
  stopifnot(inherits(ps, "phyloseq"))
  if (is.null(other_var)) other_var <- character(0)

  # Helper: base (non-stratified) run
  .run_single <- function(ps, var, other_var, ref, out_dir, q_cutoff) {
    fixed <- unique(c(var, other_var))

    # Drop samples with NA in model vars (based on a clean, flattened meta first)
    meta0 <- data.frame(as(phyloseq::sample_data(ps), "data.frame"), check.names = FALSE)
    miss <- setdiff(fixed, colnames(meta0))
    if (length(miss)) stop("Missing columns in metadata: ", paste(miss, collapse = ", "))

    keep <- stats::complete.cases(meta0[, fixed, drop = FALSE])
    ps <- phyloseq::prune_samples(keep, ps)

    ## 2) Rebuild and sanitize metadata (NO sample_id column)
    meta <- data.frame(as(phyloseq::sample_data(ps), "data.frame"), check.names = FALSE)

    # Drop/flatten non-atomic columns
    is_bad <- vapply(meta, function(x) is.list(x) || is.data.frame(x) || is.matrix(x), logical(1))
    if (any(is_bad)) {
      for (nm in names(meta)[is_bad]) meta[[nm]] <- as.character(meta[[nm]])
    }

    # Make ordered factors plain factors; characters -> factors; logical -> factors
    for (nm in names(meta)) {
      x <- meta[[nm]]
      if (is.ordered(x))             meta[[nm]] <- factor(x, ordered = FALSE)
      else if (is.character(x))      meta[[nm]] <- factor(x)
      else if (is.logical(x))        meta[[nm]] <- factor(x, levels = c(FALSE, TRUE))
      # leave numeric/integer as-is
    }
    
    if ("RespDx" %in% names(meta)) {
      raw <- trimws(tolower(as.character(meta$RespDx)))
      # be forgiving: map common labels to yes/no
      raw <- dplyr::recode(
        raw,
        "no respiratory diagnosis" = "no",
        "respiratory diagnosis"    = "yes",
        "0" = "no", "1" = "yes",
        .default = raw
      )
      meta$RespDx <- factor(raw, levels = c("no","yes"))
      if (any(is.na(meta$RespDx))) {
        warning("Some RespDx values were not recognized and became NA.")
      }
    }
    # Strongly expected numerics -> numeric  (remove Smoking_status; include caps)
    num_candidates <- intersect(
      c("age","Age","bmi","BMI","packyears",
        "FEV1_pred","FVC_pred","FEV1FVC_pred","MMEF_pred",
        "FEV1_pred_decline","FVC_pred_decline","FEV1FVC_pred_decline","MMEF_pred_decline"),
      fixed
    )
    for (nm in num_candidates) if (nm %in% names(meta))
      meta[[nm]] <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(meta[[nm]])))

    # Drop rows with NA in fixed effects after coercion
    keep2 <- stats::complete.cases(meta[, fixed, drop = FALSE])
    if (!all(keep2)) {
      meta <- meta[keep2, , drop = FALSE]
      ps   <- phyloseq::prune_samples(rownames(meta), ps)
    }

    # Drop zero-variance predictors (single-level factors or constant numerics)
    drop_fx <- vapply(fixed, function(nm) {
      x <- meta[[nm]]
      if (is.factor(x)) nlevels(x) < 2
      else if (is.numeric(x)) sd(x, na.rm = TRUE) == 0
      else FALSE
    }, logical(1))
    if (any(drop_fx)) {
      msg <- paste(fixed[drop_fx], collapse = ", ")
      warning("Dropping zero-variance predictors: ", msg)
      fixed <- fixed[!drop_fx]
    }
    if (!length(fixed)) stop("All predictors dropped (zero variance).")

    # Build OTU (samples as rows) and align strictly
    otu <- phyloseq::otu_table(ps)
    otu_df <- as.data.frame(otu)
    if (phyloseq::taxa_are_rows(ps)) otu_df <- t(otu_df)
    otu_df <- as.data.frame(otu_df, check.names = FALSE)
    # numeric ensure
    otu_df[] <- lapply(otu_df, function(x) suppressWarnings(as.numeric(x)))

    common <- intersect(rownames(meta), rownames(otu_df))
    meta   <- meta[common, , drop = FALSE]
    otu_df <- otu_df[common, , drop = FALSE]
    stopifnot(identical(rownames(meta), rownames(otu_df)))

    # Output dir
    if (is.null(out_dir)) out_dir <- file.path(tempdir(), paste0("Maaslin2_", var))

    # Run MaAsLin2
    ms <- Maaslin2::Maaslin2(
      input_data     = otu_df,
      input_metadata = meta,
      output         = out_dir,
      fixed_effects  = fixed,
      normalization  = "NONE",
      transform      = "LOG",
      min_abundance  = 0,
      min_prevalence = 0,
      plot_heatmap   = FALSE,
      plot_scatter   = FALSE,
      reference      = ref
    )

    # Post-process
    res <- ms$results
    if (is.null(res) || !nrow(res)) return(res)
    for (nm in c("coef","stderr","qval")) if (nm %in% names(res))
      res[[nm]] <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(res[[nm]]))
    res$var <- var
    res <- res[res$metadata == var, , drop = FALSE]
    if (!nrow(res)) return(res)
    res$conf.low  <- res$coef - 1.96 * res$stderr
    res$conf.high <- res$coef + 1.96 * res$stderr
    res$label <- dplyr::case_when(
      is.na(res$qval)        ~ NA_character_,
      res$qval <= 0.05       ~ "***",
      res$qval <= 0.10       ~ "**",
      res$qval <= 0.25       ~ "*",
      TRUE                   ~ NA_character_
)
    res
  }

  # If no stratification requested, just run once
  if (is.null(stratify_by)) {
    return(.run_single(ps, var, other_var, ref, out_dir, q_cutoff))
  }

  # Stratified path 
  meta_all <- data.frame(as(phyloseq::sample_data(ps), "data.frame"), check.names = FALSE)
  if (!stratify_by %in% names(meta_all))
    stop("stratify_by column not found in metadata: ", stratify_by)

  # Determine levels to iterate over
  strat_fac <- factor(meta_all[[stratify_by]])
  lvls <- if (!is.null(strata_levels)) strata_levels else levels(strat_fac)

  safe_name <- function(x) gsub("[^[:alnum:]_.-]+", "_", as.character(x))

  out_list <- list()
  for (lv in lvls) {
    idx <- which(strat_fac == lv & !is.na(strat_fac))
    if (length(idx) < min_n) {
      if (verbose) message("Skipping stratum '", lv, "' (n=", length(idx), " < ", min_n, ").")
      next
    }
    samp_ids <- rownames(meta_all)[idx]
    ps_sub <- phyloseq::prune_samples(samp_ids, ps)

    odir <- if (is.null(out_dir)) NULL else file.path(out_dir, paste0(stratify_by, "=", safe_name(lv)))

    res_lv <- try(.run_single(ps_sub, var, other_var, ref, odir, q_cutoff), silent = TRUE)
    if (inherits(res_lv, "try-error") || is.null(res_lv) || !nrow(res_lv)) {
      if (verbose) message("No results for stratum '", lv, "'.")
      next
    }
    res_lv[[stratify_by]] <- lv
    res_lv$n_samples <- phyloseq::nsamples(ps_sub)
    out_list[[lv]] <- res_lv
  }

  if (!length(out_list)) return(invisible(data.frame()))
  res_all <- do.call(rbind, out_list)
  rownames(res_all) <- NULL
  res_all
}

# Variables
vars_cont <- c("FEV1_pred_decline","FVC_pred_decline","FEV1FVC_pred_decline","MMEF_pred_decline")

# Covariates (fixed across all runs)
covars <- c("Age","Gender","season_microbiome_sampling","Smoking_status", "RespDx")

# Batch MaAsLin2 runner (kept your structure, but removed var_set + set label in filenames)
safe_name <- function(x) gsub("[^A-Za-z0-9._-]+", "_", x)

ensure_dirs <- function(out_root, ps_lists) {
  for (lvl in names(ps_lists)) {
    for (ds in names(ps_lists[[lvl]])) {
      subdir <- file.path(out_root, ds, lvl)  # <root>/<niche>/<ASV|Genus>
      dir.create(subdir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
      if (!dir.exists(subdir)) stop("Cannot create output dir: ", subdir)
    }
  }
}

run_maaslin_batch <- function(
  ps_lists,
  vars, 
  covars,
  out_root,
  refs = NULL,
  arrange_by = "coef",
  cont_decline = c("FEV1_pred","FVC_pred","FEV1FVC_pred","MMEF_pred")
) {
  all_out <- list()

  # 0) pre-create all dirs exactly as requested
  ensure_dirs(out_root, ps_lists)

  for (level in names(ps_lists)) {    
    ps_list <- ps_lists[[level]]

    for (dataset in names(ps_list)) {
      ps <- ps_list[[dataset]]

      # 1) create decline versions in sample_data (if present)
      meta <- as.data.frame(sample_data(ps), check.names = FALSE)
      for (v in cont_decline) {
        if (v %in% names(meta)) {
          meta[[paste0(v, "_decline")]] <- -1 * suppressWarnings(as.numeric(meta[[v]]))
        }
      }
      sample_data(ps) <- sample_data(meta)

      for (v in vars) {
        ref_spec <- if (!is.null(refs) && v %in% names(refs)) refs[[v]] else NULL

        res <- try(do_maaslin2(
          ps  = ps,
          var = v,
          other_var = covars,
          ref = ref_spec
        ), silent = TRUE)

        if (inherits(res, "try-error") || is.null(res) || !nrow(res)) {
          message("No results for: ", dataset, " | ", level, " | ", v)
          next
        }

        if (arrange_by %in% colnames(res)) {
          res <- dplyr::arrange(res, dplyr::desc(.data[[arrange_by]]))
        }

        res$dataset <- dataset
        res$level   <- level
        # (no var_set column anymore)

        key <- paste(level, dataset, v, sep = "___")
        all_out[[key]] <- res

        # 2) write to standardized folder (ASV / Genus), no "continuous" in filename
        subdir <- file.path(out_root, dataset, level)
        if (!dir.exists(subdir)) dir.create(subdir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
        if (!dir.exists(subdir)) stop("Output dir still missing: ", subdir)

        fn <- paste0(safe_name(dataset), "_", level, "_", safe_name(v), ".csv")
        utils::write.csv(res, file.path(subdir, fn), row.names = FALSE)
      }
    }
  }

  dplyr::bind_rows(all_out)
}

# Where to write outputs
out_root <- "../Output/Cross_sectional/DA/MaAsLin2/Non_stratified"

# Run all (ASV + Genus) and collect a single summary table
maaslin_summary <- run_maaslin_batch(
  ps_lists  = list(ASV = ps_list_DA_ASV, Genus = ps_list_DA_genus),
  vars      = vars_cont,  
  covars    = c("Age","Gender","season_microbiome_sampling","Smoking_status"),
  out_root  = out_root
)

# Optional combined summary file (CSV; you mentioned XLSX—no “continuous” label here)
readr::write_csv(maaslin_summary, file.path(out_root, "Maaslin2_all_results_summary.csv"))


```
#### MaAsLin2 redone (no RespDx covariate)
```{r}
### MaAsLin2 
#### Function #### 
# MaAsLin function 
do_maaslin2 <- function(ps, var, other_var, ref = NULL, out_dir = NULL,
                        stratify_by = NULL, strata_levels = NULL,
                        q_cutoff = 0.10, min_n = 10, verbose = TRUE) {
  stopifnot(inherits(ps, "phyloseq"))
  if (is.null(other_var)) other_var <- character(0)

  # Helper: base (non-stratified) run
  .run_single <- function(ps, var, other_var, ref, out_dir, q_cutoff) {
    fixed <- unique(c(var, other_var))

    # Drop samples with NA in model vars (based on a clean, flattened meta first)
    meta0 <- data.frame(as(phyloseq::sample_data(ps), "data.frame"), check.names = FALSE)
    miss <- setdiff(fixed, colnames(meta0))
    if (length(miss)) stop("Missing columns in metadata: ", paste(miss, collapse = ", "))

    keep <- stats::complete.cases(meta0[, fixed, drop = FALSE])
    ps <- phyloseq::prune_samples(keep, ps)

    ## 2) Rebuild and sanitize metadata (NO sample_id column)
    meta <- data.frame(as(phyloseq::sample_data(ps), "data.frame"), check.names = FALSE)

    # Drop/flatten non-atomic columns
    is_bad <- vapply(meta, function(x) is.list(x) || is.data.frame(x) || is.matrix(x), logical(1))
    if (any(is_bad)) {
      for (nm in names(meta)[is_bad]) meta[[nm]] <- as.character(meta[[nm]])
    }

    # Make ordered factors plain factors; characters -> factors; logical -> factors
    for (nm in names(meta)) {
      x <- meta[[nm]]
      if (is.ordered(x))             meta[[nm]] <- factor(x, ordered = FALSE)
      else if (is.character(x))      meta[[nm]] <- factor(x)
      else if (is.logical(x))        meta[[nm]] <- factor(x, levels = c(FALSE, TRUE))
      # leave numeric/integer as-is
    }

    # Strongly expected numerics -> numeric  (remove Smoking_status; include caps)
    num_candidates <- intersect(
      c("age","Age","bmi","BMI","packyears",
        "FEV1_pred","FVC_pred","FEV1FVC_pred","MMEF_pred",
        "FEV1_pred_decline","FVC_pred_decline","FEV1FVC_pred_decline","MMEF_pred_decline"),
      fixed
    )
    for (nm in num_candidates) if (nm %in% names(meta))
      meta[[nm]] <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(meta[[nm]])))

    # Drop rows with NA in fixed effects after coercion
    keep2 <- stats::complete.cases(meta[, fixed, drop = FALSE])
    if (!all(keep2)) {
      meta <- meta[keep2, , drop = FALSE]
      ps   <- phyloseq::prune_samples(rownames(meta), ps)
    }

    # Drop zero-variance predictors (single-level factors or constant numerics)
    drop_fx <- vapply(fixed, function(nm) {
      x <- meta[[nm]]
      if (is.factor(x)) nlevels(x) < 2
      else if (is.numeric(x)) sd(x, na.rm = TRUE) == 0
      else FALSE
    }, logical(1))
    if (any(drop_fx)) {
      msg <- paste(fixed[drop_fx], collapse = ", ")
      warning("Dropping zero-variance predictors: ", msg)
      fixed <- fixed[!drop_fx]
    }
    if (!length(fixed)) stop("All predictors dropped (zero variance).")

    # Build OTU (samples as rows) and align strictly
    otu <- phyloseq::otu_table(ps)
    otu_df <- as.data.frame(otu)
    if (phyloseq::taxa_are_rows(ps)) otu_df <- t(otu_df)
    otu_df <- as.data.frame(otu_df, check.names = FALSE)
    # numeric ensure
    otu_df[] <- lapply(otu_df, function(x) suppressWarnings(as.numeric(x)))

    common <- intersect(rownames(meta), rownames(otu_df))
    meta   <- meta[common, , drop = FALSE]
    otu_df <- otu_df[common, , drop = FALSE]
    stopifnot(identical(rownames(meta), rownames(otu_df)))

    # Output dir
    if (is.null(out_dir)) out_dir <- file.path(tempdir(), paste0("Maaslin2_", var))

    # Run MaAsLin2
    ms <- Maaslin2::Maaslin2(
      input_data     = otu_df,
      input_metadata = meta,
      output         = out_dir,
      fixed_effects  = fixed,
      normalization  = "NONE",
      transform      = "LOG",
      min_abundance  = 0,
      min_prevalence = 0,
      plot_heatmap   = FALSE,
      plot_scatter   = FALSE,
      reference      = ref
    )

    # Post-process
    res <- ms$results
    if (is.null(res) || !nrow(res)) return(res)
    for (nm in c("coef","stderr","qval")) if (nm %in% names(res))
      res[[nm]] <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(res[[nm]]))
    res$var <- var
    res <- res[res$metadata == var, , drop = FALSE]
    if (!nrow(res)) return(res)
    res$conf.low  <- res$coef - 1.96 * res$stderr
    res$conf.high <- res$coef + 1.96 * res$stderr
    res$label <- dplyr::case_when(
      is.na(res$qval)        ~ NA_character_,
      res$qval <= 0.05       ~ "***",
      res$qval <= 0.10       ~ "**",
      res$qval <= 0.25       ~ "*",
      TRUE                   ~ NA_character_
    )
    res
  }

  # If no stratification requested, just run once
  if (is.null(stratify_by)) {
    return(.run_single(ps, var, other_var, ref, out_dir, q_cutoff))
  }

  # Stratified path 
  meta_all <- data.frame(as(phyloseq::sample_data(ps), "data.frame"), check.names = FALSE)
  if (!stratify_by %in% names(meta_all))
    stop("stratify_by column not found in metadata: ", stratify_by)

  # Determine levels to iterate over
  strat_fac <- factor(meta_all[[stratify_by]])
  lvls <- if (!is.null(strata_levels)) strata_levels else levels(strat_fac)

  safe_name <- function(x) gsub("[^[:alnum:]_.-]+", "_", as.character(x))

  out_list <- list()
  for (lv in lvls) {
    idx <- which(strat_fac == lv & !is.na(strat_fac))
    if (length(idx) < min_n) {
      if (verbose) message("Skipping stratum '", lv, "' (n=", length(idx), " < ", min_n, ").")
      next
    }
    samp_ids <- rownames(meta_all)[idx]
    ps_sub <- phyloseq::prune_samples(samp_ids, ps)

    odir <- if (is.null(out_dir)) NULL else file.path(out_dir, paste0(stratify_by, "=", safe_name(lv)))

    res_lv <- try(.run_single(ps_sub, var, other_var, ref, odir, q_cutoff), silent = TRUE)
    if (inherits(res_lv, "try-error") || is.null(res_lv) || !nrow(res_lv)) {
      if (verbose) message("No results for stratum '", lv, "'.")
      next
    }
    res_lv[[stratify_by]] <- lv
    res_lv$n_samples <- phyloseq::nsamples(ps_sub)
    out_list[[lv]] <- res_lv
  }

  if (!length(out_list)) return(invisible(data.frame()))
  res_all <- do.call(rbind, out_list)
  rownames(res_all) <- NULL
  res_all
}

# Variables
vars_cont <- c("FEV1_pred_decline","FVC_pred_decline","FEV1FVC_pred_decline","MMEF_pred_decline")

# Covariates (fixed across all runs) - RespDx removed
covars <- c("Age","Gender","season_microbiome_sampling","Smoking_status")

# Batch MaAsLin2 runner (kept your structure, but removed var_set + set label in filenames)
safe_name <- function(x) gsub("[^A-Za-z0-9._-]+", "_", x)

ensure_dirs <- function(out_root, ps_lists) {
  for (lvl in names(ps_lists)) {
    for (ds in names(ps_lists[[lvl]])) {
      subdir <- file.path(out_root, ds, lvl)  # <root>/<niche>/<ASV|Genus>
      dir.create(subdir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
      if (!dir.exists(subdir)) stop("Cannot create output dir: ", subdir)
    }
  }
}

run_maaslin_batch <- function(
  ps_lists,
  vars, 
  covars,
  out_root,
  refs = NULL,
  arrange_by = "coef",
  cont_decline = c("FEV1_pred","FVC_pred","FEV1FVC_pred","MMEF_pred")
) {
  all_out <- list()

  # 0) pre-create all dirs exactly as requested
  ensure_dirs(out_root, ps_lists)

  for (level in names(ps_lists)) {    
    ps_list <- ps_lists[[level]]

    for (dataset in names(ps_list)) {
      ps <- ps_list[[dataset]]

      # 1) create decline versions in sample_data (if present)
      meta <- as.data.frame(sample_data(ps), check.names = FALSE)
      for (v in cont_decline) {
        if (v %in% names(meta)) {
          meta[[paste0(v, "_decline")]] <- -1 * suppressWarnings(as.numeric(meta[[v]]))
        }
      }
      sample_data(ps) <- sample_data(meta)

      for (v in vars) {
        ref_spec <- if (!is.null(refs) && v %in% names(refs)) refs[[v]] else NULL

        res <- try(do_maaslin2(
          ps  = ps,
          var = v,
          other_var = covars,   # uses covars without RespDx
          ref = ref_spec
        ), silent = TRUE)

        if (inherits(res, "try-error") || is.null(res) || !nrow(res)) {
          message("No results for: ", dataset, " | ", level, " | ", v)
          next
        }

        if (arrange_by %in% colnames(res)) {
          res <- dplyr::arrange(res, dplyr::desc(.data[[arrange_by]]))
        }

        res$dataset <- dataset
        res$level   <- level
        # (no var_set column anymore)

        key <- paste(level, dataset, v, sep = "___")
        all_out[[key]] <- res

        # 2) write to standardized folder (ASV / Genus), no "continuous" in filename
        subdir <- file.path(out_root, dataset, level)
        if (!dir.exists(subdir)) dir.create(subdir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
        if (!dir.exists(subdir)) stop("Output dir still missing: ", subdir)

        fn <- paste0(safe_name(dataset), "_", level, "_", safe_name(v), ".csv")
        utils::write.csv(res, file.path(subdir, fn), row.names = FALSE)
      }
    }
  }

  dplyr::bind_rows(all_out)
}

# Where to write outputs
out_root <- "../Output/Cross_sectional/DA/MaAsLin2/Non_stratified"

# Run all (ASV + Genus) and collect a single summary table
maaslin_summary <- run_maaslin_batch(
  ps_lists  = list(ASV = ps_list_DA_ASV, Genus = ps_list_DA_genus),
  vars      = vars_cont,  
  covars    = c("Age","Gender","season_microbiome_sampling","Smoking_status"),  # RespDx removed
  out_root  = out_root
)

# Optional combined summary file (CSV; you mentioned XLSX—no “continuous” label here)
readr::write_csv(maaslin_summary, file.path(out_root, "Maaslin2_all_results_summary.csv"))
```


#### MaAsLin2 heatmaps 
```{r}
# Settings
root_dir <- "../Output/Cross_sectional/DA/MaAsLin2/Non_stratified"

# ASV folders
asv_folders <- list(
  VGO3_NP = file.path(root_dir, "VGO3_NP", "ASV"),
  VGO3_OP = file.path(root_dir, "VGO3_OP", "ASV")
)

# Genus folders (datasets end with _genus)
genus_folders <- list(
  VGO3_NP = file.path(root_dir, "VGO3_NP", "Genus"),
  VGO3_OP = file.path(root_dir, "VGO3_OP", "Genus")
)

# Order on the x-axis (raw metadata names in CSV)
custom_metadata_order <- c(
  "FEV1_pred_decline","FVC_pred_decline", "FEV1FVC_pred_decline",  "MMEF_pred_decline"
)

# Pretty names to display on x-axis (same order)
pretty_labels <- c(
  "FEV1 % predicted (decline)",
  "FVC % predicted (decline)",
  "FEV1/FVC % predicted (decline)",
  "MMEF % predicted (decline)"
)

names(pretty_labels) <- custom_metadata_order

# Helper functions
# Read + tidy one dataset/level folder
read_heatmap_data <- function(folder) {
  files <- list.files(folder, pattern = "\\.csv$", full.names = TRUE)
  if (!length(files)) return(NULL)

  df <- lapply(files, function(f) {
    tryCatch(readr::read_csv(f, show_col_types = FALSE), error = function(e) NULL)
  }) |> bind_rows()

  if (is.null(df) || !nrow(df)) return(NULL)

  # Keep required columns; tolerate missing 'label'
  if (!"label" %in% names(df)) df$label <- NA_character_
  df <- df |> select(feature, metadata, coef, label)

  # x-axis handling: keep raw + pretty factor
  df$metadata_raw <- factor(df$metadata, levels = custom_metadata_order)
  # map to pretty labels with same order
  df$metadata_plot <- factor(pretty_labels[as.character(df$metadata_raw)],
                             levels = pretty_labels)

  df
}


#  Y-axis label formatter:
#    - replace underscores with spaces
#    - italicize the text part
#    - put trailing numbers at the end in parentheses, non-italic
format_feature_labels <- function(labels) {
  sapply(labels, function(lab) {
    lab <- gsub("_", " ", lab)  # underscores -> spaces
    if (grepl(" [0-9]+$", lab)) {
      text <- sub("([0-9]+)$", "", lab)   # remove trailing number
      num  <- sub(".* ([0-9]+)$", "\\1", lab)  # extract trailing number
      bquote(italic(.(text)) ~ "(" * .(num) * ")")
    } else {
      bquote(italic(.(lab)))
    }
  })
}


# Generic heatmap builder (works for both ASV/Genus)
make_heatmap <- function(df, title, italicize_features = TRUE) {
  if (is.null(df) || !nrow(df)) {
    return(ggplot() + theme_void() + ggtitle(paste0(title, " (no data)")))
  }

  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = metadata_plot, y = feature, fill = coef)) +
    geom_tile(color = "white") +
    # EXACT palette requested:
    scale_fill_gradient2(
      low = rcartocolor::carto_pal(7, "Geyser")[1],
      mid = rcartocolor::carto_pal(7, "Geyser")[4],
      high = rcartocolor::carto_pal(7, "Geyser")[7],
      midpoint = 0,
      name = "Coefficient"
    ) +
    # centered significance stars
    geom_text(aes(label = label), color = "black", size = 5,
              hjust = 0.5, vjust = 0.8, na.rm = TRUE) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
    theme(
      axis.text.x  = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
      axis.text.y  = element_text(),   # base; we format with scale_y_discrete
      axis.title.x = element_blank(),
      axis.title.y = element_blank(),
      panel.grid   = element_blank(),
      plot.title   = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
      plot.margin  = unit(c(6, 6, 6, 12), "pt")
    ) +
    ggtitle(title)

  if (italicize_features) {
    p + scale_y_discrete(labels = format_feature_labels)
  } else {
    # If you ever want Genus plain: change italicize_features=FALSE
    # Here we still italicize + remove underscores (same formatter)
    p + scale_y_discrete(labels = format_feature_labels)
  }
}

# Formatter for ASV labels: italics + trailing numbers in parentheses
format_asv_labels <- function(labels) {
  sapply(labels, function(lab) {
    lab <- gsub("_", " ", lab)  # underscores -> spaces
    if (grepl(" [0-9]+$", lab)) {
      text <- sub("([0-9]+)$", "", lab)   # remove trailing number
      num  <- sub(".* ([0-9]+)$", "\\1", lab)  # extract trailing number
      bquote(italic(.(text)) ~ "(" * .(num) * ")")
    } else {
      bquote(italic(.(lab)))
    }
  })
}

# Formatter for genus labels: italics only, no special number handling
format_genus_labels <- function(labels) {
  sapply(labels, function(lab) {
    lab <- gsub("_", " ", lab)  # underscores -> spaces
    bquote(italic(.(lab)))
  })
}

# Generic heatmap builder (choose formatter based on level)
make_heatmap <- function(df, title, level = c("ASV","Genus")) {
  level <- match.arg(level)

  if (is.null(df) || !nrow(df)) {
    return(ggplot() + theme_void() + ggtitle(paste0(title, " (no data)")))
  }

  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = metadata_plot, y = feature, fill = coef)) +
    geom_tile(color = "white") +
    scale_fill_gradient2(
      low = rcartocolor::carto_pal(7, "Geyser")[1],
      mid = rcartocolor::carto_pal(7, "Geyser")[4],
      high = rcartocolor::carto_pal(7, "Geyser")[7],
      midpoint = 0,
      name = "Coefficient"
    ) +
    geom_text(aes(label = label), color = "black", size = 5,
              hjust = 0.5, vjust = 0.8, na.rm = TRUE) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
    theme(
      axis.text.x  = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
      axis.text.y  = element_text(),
      axis.title.x = element_blank(),
      axis.title.y = element_blank(),
      panel.grid   = element_blank(),
      plot.title   = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
      plot.margin  = unit(c(6, 6, 6, 12), "pt")
    ) +
    ggtitle(title)

  if (level == "ASV") {
    p + scale_y_discrete(labels = format_asv_labels)
  } else {
    p + scale_y_discrete(labels = format_genus_labels)
  }
}


# Build individual plots
# ASV heatmaps
p_VGO3_NP_ASV <- make_heatmap(read_heatmap_data(asv_folders$VGO3_NP), "VGO3 NP (ASV)", "ASV")
p_VGO3_OP_ASV <- make_heatmap(read_heatmap_data(asv_folders$VGO3_OP), "VGO3 OP (ASV)", "ASV")

# Genus heatmaps
p_VGO3_NP_Gen <- make_heatmap(read_heatmap_data(genus_folders$VGO3_NP), "VGO3 NP (Genus)", "Genus")
p_VGO3_OP_Gen <- make_heatmap(read_heatmap_data(genus_folders$VGO3_OP), "VGO3 OP (Genus)", "Genus")

# Combine into 2×2 grids and save
asv_grid <- (p_VGO3_NP_ASV | p_VGO3_OP_ASV) +
            patchwork::plot_annotation(title = "MaAsLin2 Heatmaps — ASV Level")

genus_grid <- (p_VGO3_NP_Gen | p_VGO3_OP_Gen) +
              patchwork::plot_annotation(title = "MaAsLin2 Heatmaps — Genus Level")

ggsave(file.path(root_dir, "Heatmap_Maaslin_results_ASV.svg"),
       asv_grid, width = 10, height = 8)

ggsave(file.path(root_dir, "Heatmap_Maaslin_results_Genus.svg"),
       genus_grid, width = 10, height = 8)
```
#### MaAsLin2 volcano plots
```{r}
# settings 
root_dir <- "../Output/Cross_sectional/DA/MaAsLin2/Non_stratified"

asv_folders <- list(
  VGO3_NP = file.path(root_dir, "VGO3_NP", "ASV"),
  VGO3_OP = file.path(root_dir, "VGO3_OP", "ASV")
)
genus_folders <- list(
  VGO3_NP = file.path(root_dir, "VGO3_NP", "Genus"),
  VGO3_OP = file.path(root_dir, "VGO3_OP", "Genus")
)

custom_metadata_order <- c(
  "FEV1_pred_decline","FVC_pred_decline","FEV1FVC_pred_decline","MMEF_pred_decline"
)
pretty_labels <- c(
  "FEV1 % predicted (decline)",
  "FVC % predicted (decline)",
  "FEV1/FVC % predicted (decline)",
  "MMEF % predicted (decline)"
)
names(pretty_labels) <- custom_metadata_order


# Helper to prettify taxon labels for display
format_tax_label <- function(x) gsub("_", " ", x)

# 1) Reader (unchanged)
read_maaslin_folder <- function(folder) {
  files <- list.files(folder, pattern = "\\.csv$", full.names = TRUE)
  if (!length(files)) return(NULL)

  df <- lapply(files, function(f) {
    tryCatch(readr::read_csv(f, show_col_types = FALSE), error = function(e) NULL)
  }) |> dplyr::bind_rows()

  if (is.null(df) || !nrow(df)) return(NULL)

  if (!"label" %in% names(df)) df$label <- NA_character_

  df <- df |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      # order by your raw variable names
      metadata_raw  = factor(metadata, levels = custom_metadata_order),
      # pretty labels with full set of levels so empty facets still show
      metadata_plot = factor(pretty_labels[as.character(metadata_raw)],
                             levels = pretty_labels),
      sign          = ifelse(coef >= 0, "↑ worse lung function", "↓ worse lung function")
    )
  df
}



# Build plotmath label: italicised taxon name (underscores -> spaces), number not italic
# e.g. "Faecalibacterium_prausnitzii_1294" ->
#      italic(Faecalibacterium)~italic(prausnitzii)~'1294'
# Build plotmath label for ASV or Genus
format_tax_label_expr <- function(feature, stars = "") {
  m <- regexpr("_(\\d+)$", feature)
  has_id <- m[[1]] != -1

  if (has_id) {
    num <- substr(feature, m[[1]] + 1, nchar(feature))
    tax <- substr(feature, 1, m[[1]] - 1)
  } else {
    num <- NA_character_
    tax <- feature
  }

  # Split on underscores, drop empties, keep only safe chars for plotmath symbols
  tokens <- strsplit(tax, "_")[[1]]
  tokens <- tokens[tokens != ""]
  tokens <- gsub("[^A-Za-z0-9]", "", tokens)
  if (!length(tokens)) return(NA_character_)

  # italic(Genus)~italic(species)~...
  italic_part <- paste0("italic(", tokens, ")", collapse = "~")

  # Append number if present (plain text in parentheses)
  expr <- italic_part
  if (!is.na(num) && nzchar(num)) expr <- paste0(expr, "~'(", num, ")'")

  # Append significance stars (also plain text)
  if (!is.na(stars) && nzchar(stars)) expr <- paste0(expr, "~'", stars, "'")

  expr
}

# 2) Volcano plotter with fixes
plot_volcano <- function(df, title, top_n_labels = 8) {
  if (is.null(df) || !nrow(df) || !"qval" %in% names(df)) {
    return(ggplot2::ggplot() + ggplot2::theme_void() +
             ggplot2::ggtitle(paste0(title, " (no data)")))
  }

  pal <- rcartocolor::carto_pal(7, "Geyser")
  col_neg <- pal[2]
  col_pos <- pal[6]

  df2 <- df |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      qval_plot  = pmax(qval, 1e-300),
      neglog10q  = -log10(qval_plot),
      stars      = dplyr::case_when(
        qval <= 0.05 ~ "***",
        qval <= 0.10 ~ "**",
        qval <= 0.25 ~ "*",
        TRUE         ~ ""
      ),
      colour_group = dplyr::case_when(
        qval <= 0.25 & coef <  0 ~ "Significant (↓ worse)",
        qval <= 0.25 & coef >= 0 ~ "Significant (↑ worse)",
        TRUE                      ~ "Not significant"
      ) |> factor(levels = c("Not significant",
                             "Significant (↓ worse)", "Significant (↑ worse)"))
    )

  # Label only top hits per facet
  top_lab <- df2 |>
    dplyr::filter(qval <= 0.25) |>
    dplyr::group_by(metadata_plot) |>
    dplyr::arrange(qval, dplyr::desc(abs(coef))) |>
    dplyr::slice_head(n = top_n_labels) |>
    dplyr::ungroup() |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      label_expr = vapply(
        seq_len(n()),
        function(i) format_tax_label_expr(feature[i], stars[i]),
        character(1)
      )
    )

  ggplot2::ggplot(df2, ggplot2::aes(x = coef, y = neglog10q, color = colour_group)) +
    ggplot2::geom_point(alpha = 0.7) +
    ggplot2::scale_color_manual(
      values = c(
        "Not significant"         = "grey80",
        "Significant (↓ worse)"   = col_neg,
        "Significant (↑ worse)"   = col_pos
      ),
      name = "Points"
    ) +
    # IMPORTANT: parse = TRUE to use plotmath; labels from label_expr
    ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
  data = top_lab,
  ggplot2::aes(label = label_expr),
  parse = TRUE,
  seed = 2025, show.legend = FALSE,
  size = 3,
  max.overlaps = 100, box.padding = 0.35, point.padding = 0.2,
  min.segment.length = 0, segment.size = 0.3

    
    
    
    
    
    ) +
    ggplot2::facet_wrap(~ metadata_plot, scales = "free_x", drop = FALSE, nrow = 2) +
    ggplot2::labs(
      title = title,
      x = "Coefficient (effect per 1% predicted decrease)",
      y = expression(-log[10](q))
    ) +
    ggplot2::theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
    ggplot2::coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
    ggplot2::theme(
      panel.background = ggplot2::element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
      strip.placement  = "outside",
      strip.background = ggplot2::element_rect(fill = "grey40", color = NA),
      strip.text       = ggplot2::element_text(face = "bold", colour = "white",
                                               margin = ggplot2::margin(2, 4, 2, 4)),
      panel.grid.minor = ggplot2::element_blank(),
      panel.border     = ggplot2::element_rect(color = "grey40", fill = NA, linewidth = 0.2),
      panel.spacing    = grid::unit(8, "pt"),
      legend.title     = ggplot2::element_text(),
      legend.key       = ggplot2::element_rect(fill = "white", colour = NA)
    )
}

# --- Build & save (ASV and Genus) ---

# ASV
np_asv <- read_maaslin_folder(asv_folders$VGO3_NP)
op_asv <- read_maaslin_folder(asv_folders$VGO3_OP)

p_asv_volcano <- (plot_volcano(np_asv, "VGO3 NP — ASV") |
                  plot_volcano(op_asv, "VGO3 OP — ASV")) +
  patchwork::plot_annotation(title = "MaAsLin2 — Volcano plots (ASV)")

ggplot2::ggsave(file.path(root_dir, "Volcano_Maaslin_ASV.svg"),
                p_asv_volcano, width = 12, height = 7)

# Genus
np_gen <- read_maaslin_folder(genus_folders$VGO3_NP)
op_gen <- read_maaslin_folder(genus_folders$VGO3_OP)

p_gen_volcano <- (plot_volcano(np_gen, "VGO3 NP — Genus") |
                  plot_volcano(op_gen, "VGO3 OP — Genus")) +
  patchwork::plot_annotation(title = "MaAsLin2 — Volcano plots (Genus)")

ggplot2::ggsave(file.path(root_dir, "Volcano_Maaslin_Genus.svg"),
                p_gen_volcano, width = 12, height = 7)

```
### ANCOMBC2 
```{r}
# Make tree summarised experiment data
np_asv_tse <- mia::makeTreeSummarizedExperimentFromPhyloseq(vgo3_np_ps_abs_filt)
op_asv_tse <- mia::makeTreeSummarizedExperimentFromPhyloseq(vgo3_op_ps_abs_filt)
np_genus_tse <- mia::makeTreeSummarizedExperimentFromPhyloseq(vgo3_np_ps_genus_abs_filt)
op_genus_tse <- mia::makeTreeSummarizedExperimentFromPhyloseq(vgo3_op_ps_genus_abs_filt)

custom_metadata_order <- c(
  "FEV1_pred_decline","FVC_pred_decline","FEV1FVC_pred_decline","MMEF_pred_decline"
)
pretty_labels <- c(
  "FEV1 % predicted (decline)",
  "FVC % predicted (decline)",
  "FEV1/FVC % predicted (decline)",
  "MMEF % predicted (decline)"
)

models <- list(
  FEV1 = "FEV1_pred_decline + Age + Gender + season_microbiome_sampling + Smoking_status + RespDx",
  FVC = "FVC_pred_decline + Age + Gender + season_microbiome_sampling + Smoking_status + RespDx",
  FEV1FVC = "FEV1FVC_pred_decline + Age + Gender + season_microbiome_sampling + Smoking_status + RespDx",
  staph = "MMEF_pred_decline + Age + Gender + season_microbiome_sampling + Smoking_status + RespDx"
)


# create *_decline variables in your metadata 
# vars to convert
decline_vars <- c("FEV1_pred","FVC_pred","FEV1FVC_pred","MMEF_pred")

add_decline_vars <- function(obj, vars = decline_vars) {
  if (inherits(obj, c("TreeSummarizedExperiment","SummarizedExperiment"))) {
    cd <- SummarizedExperiment::colData(obj)
    for (v in vars) {
      if (v %in% colnames(cd)) {
        cd[[paste0(v, "_decline")]] <- -1 * suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(cd[[v]])))
      } else {
        warning("Column not found in colData: ", v)
      }
    }
    SummarizedExperiment::colData(obj) <- cd
    return(obj)
  }

  # phyloseq
  if (inherits(obj, "phyloseq")) {
    md <- data.frame(phyloseq::sample_data(obj), check.names = FALSE)
    for (v in vars) {
      if (v %in% names(md)) {
        md[[paste0(v, "_decline")]] <- -1 * suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(md[[v]])))
      } else {
        warning("Column not found in sample_data: ", v)
      }
    }
    phyloseq::sample_data(obj) <- phyloseq::sample_data(md)
    return(obj)
  }

  stop("Unsupported object class: ", class(obj)[1])
}

# Apply to the object(s) you are analyzing
np_asv_tse <- add_decline_vars(np_asv_tse)
op_asv_tse <- add_decline_vars(op_asv_tse)
np_genus_tse <- add_decline_vars(np_genus_tse)
op_genus_tse <- add_decline_vars(op_genus_tse)


np_asv_tse@colData  %>%
  mutate(
    Gender = factor(Gender, levels = c("Male", "Female")),
    season_microbiome_sampling = factor(season_microbiome_sampling, levels = c("Winter",  "Spring",  "Summer", "Autumn")),
    Smoking_status = factor(Smoking_status, levels = c("non", "former", "current"))
  )  
    

# What you want as references
refs <- list(
  Gender = "male",
  season_microbiome_sampling = "winter",
  Smoking_status = "non",
  RespDx = "no"
)

# Minimal helper: relevel selected columns if they exist
relevel_tse <- function(tse, refs) {
  cd <- as.data.frame(SummarizedExperiment::colData(tse), check.names = FALSE)
  for (nm in names(refs)) {
    if (nm %in% names(cd)) cd[[nm]] <- stats::relevel(factor(cd[[nm]]), ref = refs[[nm]])
  }
  SummarizedExperiment::colData(tse) <- S4Vectors::DataFrame(cd, row.names = rownames(cd))
  tse
}

# Apply to each object
np_asv_tse <- relevel_tse(np_asv_tse, refs)
op_asv_tse <- relevel_tse(op_asv_tse, refs)
np_genus_tse <- relevel_tse(np_genus_tse, refs)
op_genus_tse <- relevel_tse(op_genus_tse, refs)


# Run ANCOM-BC2 analyses for all models
ancom_np_asv <- map(models, ~ ANCOMBC::ancombc2(
  data = np_asv_tse,
  fix_formula = .x,
  rand_formula = NULL,
  p_adj_method = "BH",
  prv_cut = 0,
  lib_cut = 0,
  struc_zero = FALSE,
  alpha = 0.05,
  global = FALSE,
  pairwise = FALSE
))

# Process and save results 
ancom_np_asv <- map(ancom_np_asv, ~ mutate_if(.x$res, is.numeric, round, 2))

# Define output paths
output_dir <- "../Output/Cross_sectional/DA/ANCOMBC2/Non_stratified/NP/ASV"
file_names <- c("FEV1", "FVC", "FEV1FVC", "MMEF")

# Save results as CSV
walk2(ancom_np_asv, file_names, ~ write_csv(.x, file.path(output_dir, paste0("ANCOMBC2_NP_ASV_", .y, ".csv"))))


#### OP ASV level ####
# Run ANCOM-BC2 analyses for all models
ancom_op_asv <- map(models, ~ ANCOMBC::ancombc2(
  data = op_asv_tse,
  fix_formula = .x,
  rand_formula = NULL,
  p_adj_method = "BH",
  prv_cut = 0,
  lib_cut = 0,
  struc_zero = FALSE,
  alpha = 0.05,
  global = FALSE,
  pairwise = FALSE
))

# Process and save results 
ancom_op_asv <- map(ancom_op_asv, ~ mutate_if(.x$res, is.numeric, round, 2))

# Define output paths
output_dir <- "../Output/Cross_sectional/DA/ANCOMBC2/OP/ASV"
file_names <- c("FEV1", "FVC", "FEV1FVC", "MMEF")

# Save results as CSV
walk2(ancom_op_asv, file_names, ~ write_csv(.x, file.path(output_dir, paste0("ANCOMBC2_OP_ASV_", .y, ".csv"))))



#### NP Genus level ####
ancom_np_genus <- map(models, ~ ANCOMBC::ancombc2(
  data = np_genus_tse,
  fix_formula = .x,
  rand_formula = NULL,
  p_adj_method = "BH",
  prv_cut = 0,
  lib_cut = 0,
  struc_zero = FALSE,
  alpha = 0.05,
  global = FALSE,
  pairwise = FALSE
))

# Process and save results 
ancom_np_genus <- map(ancom_np_genus, ~ mutate_if(.x$res, is.numeric, round, 2))

# Define output paths
output_dir <- "../Output/Cross_sectional/DA/ANCOMBC2/NP/Genus"
file_names <- c("FEV1", "FVC", "FEV1FVC", "MMEF")

# Save results as CSV
walk2(ancom_np_genus, file_names, ~ write_csv(.x, file.path(output_dir, paste0("ANCOMBC2_NP_genus_", .y, ".csv"))))


#### OP Genus level ####
ancom_op_genus <- map(models, ~ ANCOMBC::ancombc2(
  data = op_genus_tse,
  fix_formula = .x,
  rand_formula = NULL,
  p_adj_method = "BH",
  prv_cut = 0,
  lib_cut = 0,
  struc_zero = FALSE,
  alpha = 0.05,
  global = FALSE,
  pairwise = FALSE
))

# Process and save results 
ancom_op_genus <- map(ancom_op_genus, ~ mutate_if(.x$res, is.numeric, round, 2))

# Define output paths
output_dir <- "../Output/Cross_sectional/DA/ANCOMBC2/OP/Genus"
file_names <- c("FEV1", "FVC", "FEV1FVC", "MMEF")

# Save results as CSV
walk2(ancom_op_genus, file_names, ~ write_csv(.x, file.path(output_dir, paste0("ANCOMBC2_OP_genus_", .y, ".csv"))))
```

### ANCOMBC2 (no RespDx covariate)
```{r}
# Make tree summarised experiment data
np_asv_tse <- mia::convertFromPhyloseq(vgo3_np_ps_abs_filt)
op_asv_tse <- mia::convertFromPhyloseq(vgo3_op_ps_abs_filt)
np_genus_tse <- mia::convertFromPhyloseq(vgo3_np_ps_genus_abs_filt)
op_genus_tse <- mia::convertFromPhyloseq(vgo3_op_ps_genus_abs_filt)

custom_metadata_order <- c(
  "FEV1_pred_decline","FVC_pred_decline","FEV1FVC_pred_decline","MMEF_pred_decline"
)
pretty_labels <- c(
  "FEV1 % predicted (decline)",
  "FVC % predicted (decline)",
  "FEV1/FVC % predicted (decline)",
  "MMEF % predicted (decline)"
)

models <- list(
  FEV1 = "FEV1_pred_decline + Age + Gender + season_microbiome_sampling + Smoking_status",
  FVC = "FVC_pred_decline + Age + Gender + season_microbiome_sampling + Smoking_status",
  FEV1FVC = "FEV1FVC_pred_decline + Age + Gender + season_microbiome_sampling + Smoking_status",
  staph = "MMEF_pred_decline + Age + Gender + season_microbiome_sampling + Smoking_status"
)


# create *_decline variables in your metadata 
# vars to convert
decline_vars <- c("FEV1_pred","FVC_pred","FEV1FVC_pred","MMEF_pred")

add_decline_vars <- function(obj, vars = decline_vars) {
  if (inherits(obj, c("TreeSummarizedExperiment","SummarizedExperiment"))) {
    cd <- SummarizedExperiment::colData(obj)
    for (v in vars) {
      if (v %in% colnames(cd)) {
        cd[[paste0(v, "_decline")]] <- -1 * suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(cd[[v]])))
      } else {
        warning("Column not found in colData: ", v)
      }
    }
    SummarizedExperiment::colData(obj) <- cd
    return(obj)
  }

  # phyloseq
  if (inherits(obj, "phyloseq")) {
    md <- data.frame(phyloseq::sample_data(obj), check.names = FALSE)
    for (v in vars) {
      if (v %in% names(md)) {
        md[[paste0(v, "_decline")]] <- -1 * suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(md[[v]])))
      } else {
        warning("Column not found in sample_data: ", v)
      }
    }
    phyloseq::sample_data(obj) <- phyloseq::sample_data(md)
    return(obj)
  }

  stop("Unsupported object class: ", class(obj)[1])
}

# Apply to the object(s) you are analyzing
np_asv_tse <- add_decline_vars(np_asv_tse)
op_asv_tse <- add_decline_vars(op_asv_tse)
np_genus_tse <- add_decline_vars(np_genus_tse)
op_genus_tse <- add_decline_vars(op_genus_tse)

meta <- as.data.frame(colData(np_asv_tse))

meta <- meta %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Gender = factor(Gender, levels = c("Male", "Female")),
    season_microbiome_sampling = factor(season_microbiome_sampling, 
                                        levels = c("Winter", "Spring", "Summer", "Autumn")),
    Smoking_status = factor(Smoking_status, 
                            levels = c("non", "former", "current"))
  )

# Assign back
colData(np_asv_tse) <- S4Vectors::DataFrame(meta)

    

# What you want as references
refs <- list(
  Gender = "Male",
  season_microbiome_sampling = "Winter",
  Smoking_status = "non")

# Minimal helper: relevel selected columns if they exist
relevel_tse <- function(tse, refs) {
  cd <- as.data.frame(SummarizedExperiment::colData(tse), check.names = FALSE)
  for (nm in names(refs)) {
    if (nm %in% names(cd)) cd[[nm]] <- stats::relevel(factor(cd[[nm]]), ref = refs[[nm]])
  }
  SummarizedExperiment::colData(tse) <- S4Vectors::DataFrame(cd, row.names = rownames(cd))
  tse
}

# Apply to each object
np_asv_tse <- relevel_tse(np_asv_tse, refs)
op_asv_tse <- relevel_tse(op_asv_tse, refs)
np_genus_tse <- relevel_tse(np_genus_tse, refs)
op_genus_tse <- relevel_tse(op_genus_tse, refs)

# Run ANCOM-BC2 analyses for all models
ancom_np_asv <- map(models, ~ ANCOMBC::ancombc2(
  data = np_asv_tse,
  fix_formula = .x,
  rand_formula = NULL,
  p_adj_method = "BH",
  prv_cut = 0,
  lib_cut = 0,
  struc_zero = FALSE,
  alpha = 0.05,
  global = FALSE,
  pairwise = FALSE
))

# Process and save results 
ancom_np_asv <- map(ancom_np_asv, ~ mutate_if(.x$res, is.numeric, round, 2))

# Define output paths
output_dir <- "../Output/Cross_sectional/DA/ANCOMBC2/Non_stratified/NP/ASV"
file_names <- c("FEV1", "FVC", "FEV1FVC", "MMEF")

# Save results as CSV
walk2(ancom_np_asv, file_names, ~ write_csv(.x, file.path(output_dir, paste0("ANCOMBC2_NP_ASV_", .y, ".csv"))))


#### OP ASV level ####
# Run ANCOM-BC2 analyses for all models
ancom_op_asv <- map(models, ~ ANCOMBC::ancombc2(
  data = op_asv_tse,
  fix_formula = .x,
  rand_formula = NULL,
  p_adj_method = "BH",
  prv_cut = 0,
  lib_cut = 0,
  struc_zero = FALSE,
  alpha = 0.05,
  global = FALSE,
  pairwise = FALSE
))

# Process and save results 
ancom_op_asv <- map(ancom_op_asv, ~ mutate_if(.x$res, is.numeric, round, 2))

# Define output paths
output_dir <- "../Output/Cross_sectional/DA/ANCOMBC2/Non_stratified/OP/ASV"
file_names <- c("FEV1", "FVC", "FEV1FVC", "MMEF")

# Save results as CSV
walk2(ancom_op_asv, file_names, ~ write_csv(.x, file.path(output_dir, paste0("ANCOMBC2_OP_ASV_", .y, ".csv"))))



#### NP Genus level ####
ancom_np_genus <- map(models, ~ ANCOMBC::ancombc2(
  data = np_genus_tse,
  fix_formula = .x,
  rand_formula = NULL,
  p_adj_method = "BH",
  prv_cut = 0,
  lib_cut = 0,
  struc_zero = FALSE,
  alpha = 0.05,
  global = FALSE,
  pairwise = FALSE
))

# Process and save results 
ancom_np_genus <- map(ancom_np_genus, ~ mutate_if(.x$res, is.numeric, round, 2))

# Define output paths
output_dir <- "../Output/Cross_sectional/DA/ANCOMBC2/Non_stratified/NP/Genus"
file_names <- c("FEV1", "FVC", "FEV1FVC", "MMEF")

# Save results as CSV
walk2(ancom_np_genus, file_names, ~ write_csv(.x, file.path(output_dir, paste0("ANCOMBC2_NP_genus_", .y, ".csv"))))


#### OP Genus level ####
ancom_op_genus <- map(models, ~ ANCOMBC::ancombc2(
  data = op_genus_tse,
  fix_formula = .x,
  rand_formula = NULL,
  p_adj_method = "BH",
  prv_cut = 0,
  lib_cut = 0,
  struc_zero = FALSE,
  alpha = 0.05,
  global = FALSE,
  pairwise = FALSE
))

# Process and save results 
ancom_op_genus <- map(ancom_op_genus, ~ mutate_if(.x$res, is.numeric, round, 2))

# Define output paths
output_dir <- "../Output/Cross_sectional/DA/ANCOMBC2/Non_stratified/OP/Genus"
file_names <- c("FEV1", "FVC", "FEV1FVC", "MMEF")

# Save results as CSV
walk2(ancom_op_genus, file_names, ~ write_csv(.x, file.path(output_dir, paste0("ANCOMBC2_OP_genus_", .y, ".csv"))))
```
#### ANCOM-BC2 heatmaps 
```{r}
# ANCOM-BC2 heatmaps — NP & OP combined, ASV & Genus
root_ancom <- "../Output/Cross_sectional/DA/ANCOMBC2/Non_stratified"
paths <- list(
  NP_ASV    = file.path(root_ancom, "NP", "ASV"),
  OP_ASV    = file.path(root_ancom, "OP", "ASV"),
  NP_Genus  = file.path(root_ancom, "NP", "Genus"),
  OP_Genus  = file.path(root_ancom, "OP", "Genus")
)

# X-axis order & pretty labels (like your MaAsLin heatmaps)
custom_metadata_order <- c("FEV1","FVC","FEV1FVC","MMEF")
pretty_labels <- c(
  "FEV1 % predicted (decline)",
  "FVC % predicted (decline)",
  "FEV1/FVC % predicted (decline)",
  "MMEF % predicted (decline)"
)
names(pretty_labels) <- custom_metadata_order

# Y-axis formatters (match your MaAsLin style)
# ASV: italic taxon text; trailing number non-italic in parentheses
format_asv_labels <- function(labels) {
  sapply(labels, function(lab) {
    lab <- gsub("_", " ", lab)
    if (grepl(" [0-9]+$", lab)) {
      text <- sub("([0-9]+)$", "", lab)
      num  <- sub(".* ([0-9]+)$", "\\1", lab)
      bquote(italic(.(trimws(text))) ~ "(" * .(num) * ")")
    } else {
      bquote(italic(.(lab)))
    }
  })
}
# Genus: italic only (underscores -> spaces)
format_genus_labels <- function(labels) {
  sapply(labels, function(lab) {
    lab <- gsub("_", " ", lab)
    bquote(italic(.(lab)))
  })
}

# need this for str_match()
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(stringr))

read_ancom_folder <- function(folder) {
  files <- list.files(folder, pattern = "\\.csv$", full.names = TRUE)
  if (!length(files)) return(NULL)

  out <- lapply(files, function(f) {
    df <- suppressMessages(readr::read_csv(f, show_col_types = FALSE))
    if (!nrow(df)) return(NULL)

    # Which lung function variable is this file?
    b <- basename(f)
    var <- stringr::str_match(b, "_(FEV1FVC|FEV1|FVC|MMEF)\\.csv$")[, 2]
    if (is.na(var)) return(NULL)

    # Standardize names
    nms <- names(df); nms_lower <- tolower(nms)

    # Find taxon column
    tax_idx <- which(nms_lower == "taxon")
    if (!length(tax_idx)) return(NULL)
    tax_col <- nms[tax_idx[1]]

    # Find matching lfc/q/passed columns for this var
    key <- paste0(tolower(var), "_pred_decline")
    lfc_col <- nms[grepl(paste0("^lfc_.*",       key, "$"), nms_lower)]
    q_col   <- nms[grepl(paste0("^q_.*",         key, "$"), nms_lower)]
    ps_col  <- nms[grepl(paste0("^passed_ss_.*", key, "$"), nms_lower)]
    if (!length(lfc_col) || !length(q_col) || !length(ps_col)) return(NULL)

    tibble::tibble(
      feature   = df[[tax_col]],
      metadata  = var,
      coef      = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(df[[lfc_col[1]]])),   # <-- extra ']' added
      q_value   = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(df[[q_col[1]]])),     # <-- extra ']' added
      passed_ss = as.logical(df[[ps_col[1]]]),
      label = dplyr::case_when(
        is.na(q_value)        ~ "",
        q_value <= 0.05       ~ "***",
        q_value <= 0.10       ~ "**",
        q_value <= 0.25       ~ "*",
        TRUE                  ~ ""
        ))
    })

  d <- dplyr::bind_rows(out)
  if (!nrow(d)) return(NULL)

  d$metadata_raw  <- factor(d$metadata, levels = custom_metadata_order)
  d$metadata_plot <- factor(pretty_labels[as.character(d$metadata_raw)],
                            levels = pretty_labels)
  d
}

# Generic heatmap builder
make_heatmap <- function(df, title, level = c("ASV","Genus")) {
  level <- match.arg(level)
  if (is.null(df) || !nrow(df)) {
    return(ggplot() + theme_void() + ggtitle(paste0(title, " (no data)")))
  }

  pal <- rcartocolor::carto_pal(7, "Geyser")

  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = metadata_plot, y = feature, fill = coef)) +
    geom_tile(color = "white") +
    scale_fill_gradient2(
      low = pal[1], mid = pal[4], high = pal[7],
      midpoint = 0, name = "Coefficient"
    ) +
    # star colour: black if passed structural-zero screen; white otherwise
    geom_text(
      aes(label = label, color = ifelse(passed_ss, "black", "white")),
      size = 5, na.rm = TRUE
    ) +
    scale_color_identity(
      guide = guide_legend(
        title = "Structural-zero screen",
        override.aes = list(label = "*", size = 5),
        labels = c("Passed (black *)", "Not passed (white *)")
      ),
      breaks = c("black","white")
    ) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
    theme(
      axis.text.x  = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
      axis.title.x = element_blank(),
      axis.title.y = element_blank(),
      panel.grid   = element_blank(),
      plot.title   = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
      plot.margin  = unit(c(6, 6, 6, 12), "pt")
    ) +
    ggtitle(title)

  # Y-axis taxon label formatting
  if (level == "ASV") {
    p + scale_y_discrete(labels = format_asv_labels)
  } else {
    p + scale_y_discrete(labels = format_genus_labels)
  }
}

# Read + plot (NP vs OP) for ASV 
np_asv <- read_ancom_folder(paths$NP_ASV)
op_asv <- read_ancom_folder(paths$OP_ASV)

p_np_asv <- make_heatmap(np_asv, "VGO3 NP (ASV)",  "ASV")
p_op_asv <- make_heatmap(op_asv, "VGO3 OP (ASV)",  "ASV")

p_asv_grid <- (p_np_asv | p_op_asv) +
  patchwork::plot_annotation(title = "ANCOM-BC2 Heatmaps — ASV level")

ggsave(file.path(root_ancom, "Heatmap_ANCOMBC2_ASV_combined.svg"),
       p_asv_grid, width = 11, height = 8)

# Read + plot (NP vs OP) for Genus
np_gen <- read_ancom_folder(paths$NP_Genus)
op_gen <- read_ancom_folder(paths$OP_Genus)

p_np_gen <- make_heatmap(np_gen, "VGO3 NP (Genus)", "Genus")
p_op_gen <- make_heatmap(op_gen, "VGO3 OP (Genus)", "Genus")

p_gen_grid <- (p_np_gen | p_op_gen) +
  patchwork::plot_annotation(title = "ANCOM-BC2 Heatmaps — Genus level")

ggsave(file.path(root_ancom, "Heatmap_ANCOMBC2_Genus_combined.svg"),
       p_gen_grid, width = 11, height = 8)
```

## Stratified analysis (by RespDx)
### MaAsLin2 
```{r}
# Helper to prune phyloseq by a metadata level
prune_ps_by_level <- function(ps, var, level) {
  md <- data.frame(sample_data(ps), check.names = FALSE)
  if (!var %in% names(md)) stop("Column not found in metadata: ", var)

  vv <- trimws(tolower(as.character(md[[var]])))
  keep_ids <- rownames(md)[vv == tolower(level) & !is.na(vv)]

  if (!length(keep_ids)) {
    warning("No samples for ", var, " = ", level)
    return(NULL)
  }
  prune_samples(keep_ids, ps)
}

# Set levels
resp_levels  <- c("no","yes")
covars_strat <- c("Age","Gender","season_microbiome_sampling","Smoking_status")

#### MaAsLin2 — STRATIFIED by RespDx ####
out_root_strat <- "../Output/Cross_sectional/DA/MaAsLin2/Stratified"
dir.create(out_root_strat, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# Helper used to prune phyloseq by RespDx level
prune_ps_by_level <- function(ps, var = "RespDx", level = "no") {
  md <- data.frame(sample_data(ps), check.names = FALSE)
  if (!var %in% names(md)) stop("Column not found in metadata: ", var)

  vv <- trimws(tolower(as.character(md[[var]])))
  keep_ids <- rownames(md)[vv == tolower(level) & !is.na(vv)]
  if (!length(keep_ids)) return(NULL)

  ps_sub <- prune_samples(keep_ids, ps)
  if (nsamples(ps_sub) == 0) return(NULL)

  ps_sub
}

# Create stratified lists
ps_list_DA_ASV_strat   <- list()
ps_list_DA_genus_strat <- list()

for (lv in resp_levels) {
  ps_list_DA_ASV_strat[[paste0("RespDx_", lv)]] <- list(
    VGO3_NP = prune_ps_by_level(vgo3_np_ps_abs_filt, "RespDx", lv),
    VGO3_OP = prune_ps_by_level(vgo3_op_ps_abs_filt, "RespDx", lv)
  )
  ps_list_DA_genus_strat[[paste0("RespDx_", lv)]] <- list(
    VGO3_NP = prune_ps_by_level(vgo3_np_ps_genus_abs_filt, "RespDx", lv),
    VGO3_OP = prune_ps_by_level(vgo3_op_ps_genus_abs_filt, "RespDx", lv)
  )
}

# ensure output dirs exist
maaslin_strat_summaries <- list()

for (tag in names(ps_list_DA_ASV_strat)) {
  ps_asv_tag   <- Filter(Negate(is.null), ps_list_DA_ASV_strat[[tag]])
  ps_genus_tag <- Filter(Negate(is.null), ps_list_DA_genus_strat[[tag]])
  if (length(ps_asv_tag) == 0 && length(ps_genus_tag) == 0) {
    message("Skipping ", tag, " (no samples).")
    next
  }
  out_tag <- file.path(out_root_strat, tag)
  dir.create(out_tag, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

  # create needed subfolders
  make_dirs_for_pslists(out_tag, list(ASV = ps_asv_tag, Genus = ps_genus_tag))
  summ_tag <- run_maaslin_batch(
    ps_lists = list(ASV = ps_asv_tag, Genus = ps_genus_tag),
    vars     = vars_cont,
    covars   = covars_strat,
    out_root = out_tag
  )

  summ_tag$RespDx_stratum <- tag
  maaslin_strat_summaries[[tag]] <- summ_tag
}

maaslin_summary_strat <- dplyr::bind_rows(maaslin_strat_summaries)

readr::write_csv(
  maaslin_summary_strat,
  file.path(out_root_strat, "Maaslin2_all_results_summary_stratified_by_RespDx.csv")
)
```
#### MaAsLin2 heatmaps
```{r}
#### MaAsLin2 HEATMAPS — STRATIFIED BY RespDx ####

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(tidyr)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(readr)
  library(patchwork)
  library(rcartocolor)
  library(grid)
})

root_dir_strat <- "../Output/Cross_sectional/DA/MaAsLin2/Stratified"

resp_levels <- c("no","yes")
datasets    <- c("VGO3_NP","VGO3_OP")
tax_levels  <- c("ASV","Genus")

# Order on x-axis (raw metadata names in CSV)
custom_metadata_order <- c(
  "FEV1_pred_decline",
  "FVC_pred_decline",
  "FEV1FVC_pred_decline",
  "MMEF_pred_decline"
)

# Pretty x-axis labels
pretty_labels <- c(
  "FEV1 % predicted (decline)",
  "FVC % predicted (decline)",
  "FEV1/FVC % predicted (decline)",
  "MMEF % predicted (decline)"
)
names(pretty_labels) <- custom_metadata_order


# -------------------------
# Y-axis label formatters
# -------------------------
format_asv_labels <- function(labels) {
  sapply(labels, function(lab) {
    lab <- gsub("_", " ", lab)
    if (grepl(" [0-9]+$", lab)) {
      text <- sub("([0-9]+)$", "", lab)
      num  <- sub(".* ([0-9]+)$", "\\1", lab)
      bquote(italic(.(trimws(text))) ~ "(" * .(num) * ")")
    } else {
      bquote(italic(.(lab)))
    }
  })
}

format_genus_labels <- function(labels) {
  sapply(labels, function(lab) {
    lab <- gsub("_", " ", lab)
    bquote(italic(.(lab)))
  })
}


# -------------------------
# Reader: one folder -> tidy df
# -------------------------
read_heatmap_data <- function(folder) {
  files <- list.files(folder, pattern = "\\.csv$", full.names = TRUE)
  if (!length(files)) return(NULL)

  df <- lapply(files, function(f) {
    tryCatch(readr::read_csv(f, show_col_types = FALSE), error = function(e) NULL)
  }) |> bind_rows()

  if (is.null(df) || !nrow(df)) return(NULL)

  # tolerate missing label column
  if (!"label" %in% names(df)) df$label <- NA_character_

  df <- df |> 
    select(feature, metadata, coef, label) |> 
    filter(metadata %in% custom_metadata_order)

  # x-axis handling
  df$metadata_raw  <- factor(df$metadata, levels = custom_metadata_order)
  df$metadata_plot <- factor(pretty_labels[as.character(df$metadata_raw)],
                             levels = pretty_labels)

  df
}


# -------------------------
# Heatmap plotter
# -------------------------
make_heatmap <- function(df, title, level = c("ASV","Genus")) {
  level <- match.arg(level)

  if (is.null(df) || !nrow(df)) {
    return(ggplot() + theme_void() + ggtitle(paste0(title, " (no data)")))
  }

  pal <- rcartocolor::carto_pal(7, "Geyser")

  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = metadata_plot, y = feature, fill = coef)) +
    geom_tile(color = "white") +
    scale_fill_gradient2(
      low = pal[1], mid = pal[4], high = pal[7],
      midpoint = 0, name = "Coefficient"
    ) +
    geom_text(aes(label = label), color = "black", size = 5,
              hjust = 0.5, vjust = 0.8, na.rm = TRUE) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
    theme(
      axis.text.x  = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
      axis.title.x = element_blank(),
      axis.title.y = element_blank(),
      panel.grid   = element_blank(),
      plot.title   = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
      plot.margin  = unit(c(6, 6, 6, 12), "pt")
    ) +
    ggtitle(title)

  if (level == "ASV") {
    p + scale_y_discrete(labels = format_asv_labels)
  } else {
    p + scale_y_discrete(labels = format_genus_labels)
  }
}


# -------------------------
# Build 2×2 grids per level
# -------------------------
plots <- list()

for (tax_level in tax_levels) {

  for (lv in resp_levels) {
    for (ds in datasets) {

      folder <- file.path(
        root_dir_strat,
        paste0("RespDx_", lv),
        ds,
        tax_level
      )

      df <- read_heatmap_data(folder)

      panel_title <- paste0(
        ds, " (", tax_level, ")\nRespDx ", lv
      )

      key <- paste(tax_level, ds, lv, sep="__")
      plots[[key]] <- make_heatmap(df, panel_title, level = tax_level)
    }
  }

  # Arrange as:
  #   [NP no | OP no]
  #   [NP yes| OP yes]
  grid_tax <- (
    plots[[paste(tax_level, "VGO3_NP", "no",  sep="__")]] |
    plots[[paste(tax_level, "VGO3_OP", "no",  sep="__")]]
  ) /
  (
    plots[[paste(tax_level, "VGO3_NP", "yes", sep="__")]] |
    plots[[paste(tax_level, "VGO3_OP", "yes", sep="__")]]
  ) +
  patchwork::plot_annotation(
    title = paste0("MaAsLin2 Heatmaps — ", tax_level, " level (RespDx stratified)")
  )

  ggsave(
    file.path(root_dir_strat,
              paste0("Heatmap_Maaslin_results_", tax_level, "_RespDx_stratified.svg")),
    grid_tax, width = 10, height = 15
  )
}



```


### ANCOM-BC2
```{r}
# helper to subset TSE by RespDx
subset_tse_by_level <- function(tse, var = "RespDx", level = "no") {
  cd <- as.data.frame(SummarizedExperiment::colData(tse), check.names = FALSE)
  if (!var %in% names(cd)) stop("Column not found in colData: ", var)

  vv <- trimws(tolower(as.character(cd[[var]])))
  keep <- which(vv == tolower(level) & !is.na(vv))
  if (!length(keep)) {
    warning("No samples for ", var, " = ", level)
    return(NULL)
  }
  tse[, keep, drop = FALSE]
}

# outcomes (RespDx removed because we stratify)
outcomes <- c(
  FEV1    = "FEV1_pred_decline",
  FVC     = "FVC_pred_decline",
  FEV1FVC = "FEV1FVC_pred_decline",
  MMEF    = "MMEF_pred_decline"
)

# covariates INSIDE strata
covars_strat <- c("Age","Gender","season_microbiome_sampling","Smoking_status")

# drop single-level covariates within a stratum
keep_covars_in_stratum <- function(cd, covars) {
  covars[vapply(covars, function(v) {
    if (!v %in% names(cd)) return(FALSE)
    x <- cd[[v]]
    ux <- unique(na.omit(x))
    if (is.numeric(x)) {
      return(stats::sd(x, na.rm = TRUE) > 0)
    } else {
      return(length(ux) >= 2)
    }
  }, logical(1))]
}

# build safe formula per model/stratum
build_fix_formula <- function(cd, outcome, covars) {
  cov_keep <- keep_covars_in_stratum(cd, covars)
  paste(c(outcome, cov_keep), collapse = " + ")
}

# output root
root_ancom_strat <- "../Output/Cross_sectional/DA/ANCOMBC2/Stratified"

# function to run + save one TSE set
run_ancom_strat_one <- function(tse, niche, level_tag, tax_level = c("ASV","Genus")) {
  tax_level <- match.arg(tax_level)
  if (is.null(tse)) return(invisible(NULL))

  cd <- as.data.frame(SummarizedExperiment::colData(tse), check.names = FALSE)

  # droplevel all factor covariates within stratum
  for (v in covars_strat) {
    if (v %in% names(cd) && !is.numeric(cd[[v]])) {
      cd[[v]] <- droplevels(factor(cd[[v]]))
    }
  }
  SummarizedExperiment::colData(tse) <- S4Vectors::DataFrame(cd, row.names = rownames(cd))

  res_list <- purrr::imap(outcomes, function(outcome, nm) {

    fix_formula <- build_fix_formula(cd, outcome, covars_strat)

    ANCOMBC::ancombc2(
      data = tse,
      fix_formula = fix_formula,
      rand_formula = NULL,
      p_adj_method = "BH",
      prv_cut = 0,
      lib_cut = 0,
      struc_zero = FALSE,
      alpha = 0.05,
      global = FALSE,
      pairwise = FALSE
    )$res
  })

  # (Optional) round for readability AFTER saving if you prefer
  res_list_round <- purrr::map(res_list, ~ dplyr::mutate_if(.x, is.numeric, round, 2))

  out_dir <- file.path(root_ancom_strat, level_tag, niche, tax_level)
  dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

  purrr::walk2(res_list_round, names(res_list_round), ~ readr::write_csv(
    .x, file.path(out_dir, paste0("ANCOMBC2_", niche, "_", tax_level, "_", .y, ".csv"))
  ))

  invisible(res_list)
}

# loop strata and run for NP/OP + ASV/Genus
for (lv in resp_levels) {
  level_tag <- paste0("RespDx_", lv)

  np_asv_lv   <- subset_tse_by_level(np_asv_tse,   "RespDx", lv)
  op_asv_lv   <- subset_tse_by_level(op_asv_tse,   "RespDx", lv)
  np_gen_lv   <- subset_tse_by_level(np_genus_tse, "RespDx", lv)
  op_gen_lv   <- subset_tse_by_level(op_genus_tse, "RespDx", lv)

  run_ancom_strat_one(np_asv_lv, "NP", level_tag, "ASV")
  run_ancom_strat_one(op_asv_lv, "OP", level_tag, "ASV")
  run_ancom_strat_one(np_gen_lv, "NP", level_tag, "Genus")
  run_ancom_strat_one(op_gen_lv, "OP", level_tag, "Genus")
}

message("Done: RespDx-stratified ANCOM-BC2.")
```
#### ANCOM-BC2 heatmaps
```{r}
# ANCOM-BC2 heatmaps — NP & OP combined, ASV & Genus
root_ancom_strat <- "../Output/Cross_sectional/DA/ANCOMBC2/Stratified"

paths_strat <- list(
  NP_ASV_RespDx_no = file.path(root_ancom_strat, "RespDx_no", "NP", "ASV"),
  NP_ASV_RespDx_yes = file.path(root_ancom_strat, "RespDx_yes", "NP", "ASV"),
  OP_ASV_RespDx_no = file.path(root_ancom_strat, "RespDx_no", "OP", "ASV"),
  OP_ASV_RespDx_yes = file.path(root_ancom_strat, "RespDx_yes", "OP", "ASV"),
  NP_Genus_RespDx_no = file.path(root_ancom_strat, "RespDx_no", "NP", "Genus"),
  NP_Genus_RespDx_yes = file.path(root_ancom_strat, "RespDx_yes", "NP", "Genus"),
  OP_Genus_RespDx_no = file.path(root_ancom_strat, "RespDx_no", "OP", "Genus"),
  OP_Genus_RespDx_yes = file.path(root_ancom_strat, "RespDx_yes", "OP", "Genus")
)

# X-axis order & pretty labels (like your MaAsLin heatmaps)
custom_metadata_order <- c("FEV1","FVC","FEV1FVC","MMEF")
pretty_labels <- c(
  "FEV1 % predicted (decline)",
  "FVC % predicted (decline)",
  "FEV1/FVC % predicted (decline)",
  "MMEF % predicted (decline)"
)
names(pretty_labels) <- custom_metadata_order

# Y-axis formatters 
# ASV: italic taxon text, trailing number non-italic in parentheses
format_asv_labels <- function(labels) {
  sapply(labels, function(lab) {
    lab <- gsub("_", " ", lab)
    if (grepl(" [0-9]+$", lab)) {
      text <- sub("([0-9]+)$", "", lab)
      num  <- sub(".* ([0-9]+)$", "\\1", lab)
      bquote(italic(.(trimws(text))) ~ "(" * .(num) * ")")
    } else {
      bquote(italic(.(lab)))
    }
  })
}

# Genus: italic only (underscores -> spaces)
format_genus_labels <- function(labels) {
  sapply(labels, function(lab) {
    lab <- gsub("_", " ", lab)
    bquote(italic(.(lab)))
  })
}

# need this for str_match()
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(stringr))

read_ancom_folder <- function(folder) {
  files <- list.files(folder, pattern = "\\.csv$", full.names = TRUE)
  if (!length(files)) return(NULL)

  out <- lapply(files, function(f) {
    df <- suppressMessages(readr::read_csv(f, show_col_types = FALSE))
    if (!nrow(df)) return(NULL)

    # Which lung function variable is this file?
    b <- basename(f)
    var <- stringr::str_match(b, "_(FEV1FVC|FEV1|FVC|MMEF)\\.csv$")[, 2]
    if (is.na(var)) return(NULL)

    # Standardize names
    nms <- names(df); nms_lower <- tolower(nms)

    # Find taxon column
    tax_idx <- which(nms_lower == "taxon")
    if (!length(tax_idx)) return(NULL)
    tax_col <- nms[tax_idx[1]]

    # Find matching lfc/q/passed columns for this var
    key <- paste0(tolower(var), "_pred_decline")
    lfc_col <- nms[grepl(paste0("^lfc_.*",       key, "$"), nms_lower)]
    q_col   <- nms[grepl(paste0("^q_.*",         key, "$"), nms_lower)]
    ps_col  <- nms[grepl(paste0("^passed_ss_.*", key, "$"), nms_lower)]
    if (!length(lfc_col) || !length(q_col) || !length(ps_col)) return(NULL)

    tibble::tibble(
      feature   = df[[tax_col]],
      metadata  = var,
      coef      = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(df[[lfc_col[1]]])),   # <-- extra ']' added
      q_value   = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(df[[q_col[1]]])),     # <-- extra ']' added
      passed_ss = as.logical(df[[ps_col[1]]]),
      label     = ifelse(!is.na(q_value) & q_value < 0.10, "*", "")
    )
  })

  d <- dplyr::bind_rows(out)
  if (!nrow(d)) return(NULL)

  d$metadata_raw  <- factor(d$metadata, levels = custom_metadata_order)
  d$metadata_plot <- factor(pretty_labels[as.character(d$metadata_raw)],
                            levels = pretty_labels)
  d
}

# Generic heatmap builder
make_heatmap <- function(df, title, level = c("ASV","Genus")) {
  level <- match.arg(level)
  if (is.null(df) || !nrow(df)) {
    return(ggplot() + theme_void() + ggtitle(paste0(title, " (no data)")))
  }

  pal <- rcartocolor::carto_pal(7, "Geyser")

  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = metadata_plot, y = feature, fill = coef)) +
    geom_tile(color = "white") +
    scale_fill_gradient2(
      low = pal[1], mid = pal[4], high = pal[7],
      midpoint = 0, name = "Coefficient"
    ) +
    # star colour: black if passed structural-zero screen; white otherwise
    geom_text(
      aes(label = label, color = ifelse(passed_ss, "black", "white")),
      size = 5, na.rm = TRUE
    ) +
    scale_color_identity(
      guide = guide_legend(
        title = "Structural-zero screen",
        override.aes = list(label = "*", size = 5),
        labels = c("Passed (black *)", "Not passed (white *)")
      ),
      breaks = c("black","white")
    ) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
    theme(
      axis.text.x  = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
      axis.title.x = element_blank(),
      axis.title.y = element_blank(),
      panel.grid   = element_blank(),
      plot.title   = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
      plot.margin  = unit(c(6, 6, 6, 12), "pt")
    ) +
    ggtitle(title)

  # Y-axis taxon label formatting
  if (level == "ASV") {
    p + scale_y_discrete(labels = format_asv_labels)
  } else {
    p + scale_y_discrete(labels = format_genus_labels)
  }
}

# Read + plot (NP vs OP) for ASV 
np_asv_respdx_no <- read_ancom_folder(paths_strat$NP_ASV_RespDx_no)
np_asv_respdx_yes <- read_ancom_folder(paths_strat$NP_ASV_RespDx_yes)
op_asv_respdx_no <- read_ancom_folder(paths_strat$OP_ASV_RespDx_no)
op_asv_respdx_yes <- read_ancom_folder(paths_strat$OP_ASV_RespDx_no)

p_np_asv_respdx_no <- make_heatmap(np_asv_respdx_no, "VGO3 NP (ASV) - No respiratory disease",  "ASV")
p_np_asv_respdx_yes <- make_heatmap(np_asv_respdx_yes, "VGO3 NP (ASV) - Respiratory disease",  "ASV")
p_op_asv_respdx_no <- make_heatmap(op_asv_respdx_no, "VGO3 OP (ASV) - No respiratory disease",  "ASV")
p_op_asv_respdx_yes <- make_heatmap(op_asv_respdx_yes, "VGO3 OP (ASV) - Respiratory disease",  "ASV")



p_asv_grid_ancom <- (p_np_asv_respdx_no | p_op_asv_respdx_no)/ (p_np_asv_respdx_yes| p_op_asv_respdx_yes) +
  patchwork::plot_annotation(title = "ANCOM-BC2 Heatmaps — ASV level")

ggsave("../Output/Cross_sectional/DA/ANCOMBC2/Stratified/Heatmap_ANCOMBC2_ASV_combined.svg",
       p_asv_grid_ancom, width = 10, height = 12)

# Read + plot (NP vs OP) for Genus
np_genus_respdx_no <- read_ancom_folder(paths_strat$NP_Genus_RespDx_no)
np_genus_respdx_yes <- read_ancom_folder(paths_strat$NP_Genus_RespDx_yes)
op_genus_respdx_no <- read_ancom_folder(paths_strat$OP_Genus_RespDx_no)
op_genus_respdx_yes <- read_ancom_folder(paths_strat$OP_Genus_RespDx_yes)

p_np_gen_respdx_no <- make_heatmap(np_genus_respdx_no, "VGO3 NP (Genus) - No respiratory disease",  "ASV")
p_np_gen_respdx_yes <- make_heatmap(np_genus_respdx_yes, "VGO3 NP (Genus) - Respiratory disease",  "ASV")
p_op_gen_respdx_no <- make_heatmap(op_genus_respdx_no, "VGO3 OP (Genus) - No respiratory disease",  "ASV")
p_op_gen_respdx_yes <- make_heatmap(op_genus_respdx_yes, "VGO3 OP (Genus) - Respiratory disease",  "ASV")


p_gen_grid_ancom <- (p_np_gen_respdx_no | p_op_gen_respdx_no)/ (p_np_gen_respdx_yes| p_op_gen_respdx_yes) +
  patchwork::plot_annotation(title = "ANCOM-BC2 Heatmaps — ASV level")

ggsave("../Output/Cross_sectional/DA/ANCOMBC2/Stratified/Heatmap_ANCOMBC2_genus_combined.svg",
       p_gen_grid_ancom, width = 9, height = 11)




#### ANCOM-BC2 HEATMAPS — STRATIFIED BY RespDx ####

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(tidyr)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(readr)
  library(stringr)
  library(patchwork)
  library(rcartocolor)
  library(grid)
})

root_ancom_strat <- "../Output/Cross_sectional/DA/ANCOMBC2/Stratified"

resp_levels <- c("no","yes")
niches      <- c("NP","OP")
tax_levels  <- c("ASV","Genus")

# X-axis order & pretty labels
custom_metadata_order <- c("FEV1","FVC","FEV1FVC","MMEF")
pretty_labels <- c(
  "FEV1 % predicted (decline)",
  "FVC % predicted (decline)",
  "FEV1/FVC % predicted (decline)",
  "MMEF % predicted (decline)"
)
names(pretty_labels) <- custom_metadata_order


# -------------------------
# Y-axis label formatters
# -------------------------
format_asv_labels <- function(labels) {
  sapply(labels, function(lab) {
    lab <- gsub("_", " ", lab)
    if (grepl(" [0-9]+$", lab)) {
      text <- sub("([0-9]+)$", "", lab)
      num  <- sub(".* ([0-9]+)$", "\\1", lab)
      bquote(italic(.(trimws(text))) ~ "(" * .(num) * ")")
    } else {
      bquote(italic(.(lab)))
    }
  })
}

format_genus_labels <- function(labels) {
  sapply(labels, function(lab) {
    lab <- gsub("_", " ", lab)
    bquote(italic(.(lab)))
  })
}


# -------------------------
# Reader: one folder -> tidy df
# -------------------------
read_ancom_folder <- function(folder) {
  files <- list.files(folder, pattern = "\\.csv$", full.names = TRUE)
  if (!length(files)) return(NULL)

  out <- lapply(files, function(f) {
    df <- suppressMessages(readr::read_csv(f, show_col_types = FALSE))
    if (!nrow(df)) return(NULL)

    # Which lung function variable is this file?
    b <- basename(f)
    var <- stringr::str_match(b, "_(FEV1FVC|FEV1|FVC|MMEF)\\.csv$")[, 2]
    if (is.na(var)) return(NULL)

    nms <- names(df); nms_lower <- tolower(nms)

    # Find taxon column
    tax_idx <- which(nms_lower == "taxon")
    if (!length(tax_idx)) return(NULL)
    tax_col <- nms[tax_idx[1]]

    key <- paste0(tolower(var), "_pred_decline")

    lfc_col <- nms[grepl(paste0("^lfc_.*",       key, "$"), nms_lower)]
    q_col   <- nms[grepl(paste0("^q_.*",         key, "$"), nms_lower)]
    ps_col  <- nms[grepl(paste0("^passed_ss_.*", key, "$"), nms_lower)]

    if (!length(lfc_col) || !length(q_col) || !length(ps_col)) return(NULL)

    tibble(
      feature   = df[[tax_col]],
      metadata  = var,
      coef      = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(df[[lfc_col[1]]])),
      q_value   = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(df[[q_col[1]]])),
      passed_ss = as.logical(df[[ps_col[1]]]),
      label     = ifelse(!is.na(q_value) & q_value < 0.10, "*", "")
    )
  })

  d <- bind_rows(out)
  if (!nrow(d)) return(NULL)

  d$metadata_raw  <- factor(d$metadata, levels = custom_metadata_order)
  d$metadata_plot <- factor(pretty_labels[as.character(d$metadata_raw)],
                            levels = pretty_labels)
  d
}


# -------------------------
# Heatmap plotter
# -------------------------
make_heatmap <- function(df, title, level = c("ASV","Genus")) {
  level <- match.arg(level)

  if (is.null(df) || !nrow(df)) {
    return(ggplot() + theme_void() + ggtitle(paste0(title, " (no data)")))
  }

  pal <- rcartocolor::carto_pal(7, "Geyser")

  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = metadata_plot, y = feature, fill = coef)) +
    geom_tile(color = "white") +
    scale_fill_gradient2(
      low = pal[1], mid = pal[4], high = pal[7],
      midpoint = 0, name = "Coefficient"
    ) +
    geom_text(
      aes(label = label, color = ifelse(passed_ss, "black", "white")),
      size = 5, na.rm = TRUE
    ) +
    # FIXED legend: labels belong to the scale, not guide_legend()
    scale_color_identity(
      breaks = c("black","white"),
      labels = c("Passed (black *)", "Not passed (white *)"),
      guide  = guide_legend(
        title = "Structural-zero screen",
        override.aes = list(label = "*", size = 5)
      )
    ) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
    theme(
      axis.text.x  = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
      axis.title.x = element_blank(),
      axis.title.y = element_blank(),
      panel.grid   = element_blank(),
      plot.title   = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
      plot.margin  = unit(c(6, 6, 6, 12), "pt")
    ) +
    ggtitle(title)

  if (level == "ASV") {
    p + scale_y_discrete(labels = format_asv_labels)
  } else {
    p + scale_y_discrete(labels = format_genus_labels)
  }
}


# Build 2×2 grids per level
plots <- list()

for (tax_level in tax_levels) {

  for (lv in resp_levels) {
    for (niche in niches) {

      folder <- file.path(
        root_ancom_strat,
        paste0("RespDx_", lv),
        niche,
        tax_level
      )

      df <- read_ancom_folder(folder)

      panel_title <- paste0(
        "VGO3 ", niche, " (", tax_level, ")\nRespDx ", lv
      )

      key <- paste(tax_level, niche, lv, sep = "__")
      plots[[key]] <- make_heatmap(df, panel_title, level = tax_level)
    }
  }

  # Arrange as:
  #   [NP no | OP no]
  #   [NP yes| OP yes]
  p_grid <- (plots[[paste(tax_level,"NP","no",sep="__")]] |
             plots[[paste(tax_level,"OP","no",sep="__")]]) /
            (plots[[paste(tax_level,"NP","yes",sep="__")]] |
             plots[[paste(tax_level,"OP","yes",sep="__")]]) +
            patchwork::plot_annotation(
              title = paste0("ANCOM-BC2 Heatmaps — ", tax_level, " level (RespDx stratified)")
            )

  ggsave(
    file.path(root_ancom_strat,
              paste0("Heatmap_ANCOMBC2_", tax_level, "_RespDx_stratified.svg")),
    p_grid, width = 10, height = 16
  )
}
```
